_It’s true!_ **Next month** Virginia will hold pivotal state legislative elections that will determine the future of abortion rights, voting rights, and more.

According to _Daily Kos_ , this will be “one of the most consequential election battles of the year.” If Republicans flip just two seats in the state senate, they’ll win full control of Virginia’s state government, giving them unchecked power to pass their extreme MAGA agenda.
[**_The NDRC is working to support candidates who will protect our rights and strengthen our democracy. Will you make an urgent donation to help power our efforts nationwide?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70836477/430471878/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231001_FR_10B_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc5NzljNmRmLTgxNjEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9OkAu_6hzi5nwukPnbLyug4PnKGvcn-OGF3yQUIQmlg=)

| Yesterday, I was on State of the Union with Jake Tapper. I discussed the path forward following the House narrowly avoiding a government shutdown. I was proud to advocate for ways we can push back against the extremism that is taking hold of Congress and my home in West Michigan.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70836844/430479386/664569766?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231002-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ2MDU4Zi04NDYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=31vZfg9eO0QqAkIAvpvmX6os760ArGfST8zduJCfGUc=)

Our best chance to defeat these harmful manifestations of extremism across our country is by organizing early. In 2022, we did the early work that needed to be done and West Michigan rejected extremism outright – helping me defeat my far-right opponent and send a leader to Congress committed to common-sense problem-solving. I’m dedicated to continuing my work advocating for West Michiganders in Congress and helping to dismantle the extremist resurgence at home and across the country, but I need your support. clean_body: I was proud to advocate for ways we can push back against the extremism that is taking hold of Congress and my home in West Michigan. | = | Yesterday, I was on State of the Union with Jake Tapper. I discussed the path forward following the House narrowly avoiding a government shutdown. I was proud to advocate for ways we can push back against the extremism that is taking hold of Congress and my home in West Michigan. = | = Our best chance to defeat these harmful manifestations of extremism across our country is by organizing early. In 2022, we did the early work that needed to be done and West Michigan rejected extremism outright – helping me defeat my far-right opponent and send a leader to Congress committed to common-sense problem-solving. I’m dedicated to continuing my work advocating for West Michiganders in Congress and helping to dismantle the extremist resurgence at home and across the country, but I need your support. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . As soon as it became clear that Vote-By-Mail is a cornerstone of our democracy, _**Republicans set their sights on DESTROYING it!**_

And you can bet they’re going after our Postal Service to do so – _Trump’s handpicked crony Postmaster General Louis DeJoy is at the helm!_

**IF** we don’t show a SWEEPING wave of support for our Postal Service, Republicans will run it into the GROUND!

**BUT IF** we send the strongest message possible, we can support our Postal Service and make sure every American can cast their ballot! [ **10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: Do you approve of your local Postal Worker?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20231002_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20258%2E4449941%2E6GaktG) [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20231002_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20258%2E4449941%2E6GaktG) | [YES, I APPROVE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20231002_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20258%2E4449941%2E6GaktG)

[I AM UNSURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20231002_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=20258%2E4449941%2E6GaktG)
**IF YOU DO NOT RESPOND BEFORE MIDNIGHT, YOUR RESPONSE WILL BE MARKED AS “ NO” – PLEASE ANSWER URGENTLY.**
Thank you,

_– FFR_

name: Doug White
subject: This game just got real and we are ramping it up!
body:
Central Washington's largest pro-Democrat action ever!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/36Og9_cOF/c?w=yb8sK7k0cJFQSzn5vHZFAjYdGF7nIVELr5xXkfqwYP4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvLzM2T2c5X2NPRj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | The Importance of visibility, Voice and Representation:the Erasing of Democrats in Central Washington
---
| | Why should you care about Rural Americans United's [Districtwide Media Campaign](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/36Og9_cOF/c?w=q7-lExVAnZZ3IdoiX13xi9UMof5DkuINh7gxnKlLkV4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9nby5ydXJhbGFtZXJpY2Fuc3VuaXRlZC5vcmcvRGVtTWVkaWFDYW1wYWlnbiIsInIiOiJjOTU0M2YxYi01OTAwLTRlNWItOTlmZS1iNTA0Mzg1NTdjZDgiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)! Have you wondered how a small minority of far-right or MAGA Republicans can be everywhere all at once? Ever wonder why Republicans seem to always have the quotes in the media? And more importantly, do you ever wonder why Democrats don’t? At the most basic level, a far-right Republican will NEVER think that the time is never right to speak up or that it is not the time to voice their opinion. We, as Democrats, are at risk of losing relevance in Central Washington. We can reverse this by taking bold actions and raising our game to meet the far-right head on. We will not resort to intimidation and bullying, but we will leverage the tools that bring Democratic representation and relevance to a community; increasing representation initially through media outreach. . A Master Class in media manipulation from far-right Republicans Read further to better understand why Rural American United’s [district wide media campaign](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/36Og9_cOF/c?w=q7-lExVAnZZ3IdoiX13xi9UMof5DkuINh7gxnKlLkV4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9nby5ydXJhbGFtZXJpY2Fuc3VuaXRlZC5vcmcvRGVtTWVkaWFDYW1wYWlnbiIsInIiOiJjOTU0M2YxYi01OTAwLTRlNWItOTlmZS1iNTA0Mzg1NTdjZDgiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ) is essential to stopping the erasing of Democrats in Central Washington from the public record and public conscience.

---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/36Og9_cOF/c?w=2sL62R-TGTzmnu3gmtoLV5BVlfwVe6MKJMw2SBLJhr8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiJjZmZiZTc3Ny05YTFlLTRlMDEtOWFhOC1lYjNkYWVmMjg5MWEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | Walmartgate: A successful media campaign starts by creating or seizing on buzz. Buzz gets people excited and media outlets are ready to publish content that touches a breadth of viewers and continues the story across different dimensions that touch on emotion and intellect. Most importantly, it should have an ending. Walmartgate had it all! Buzz: A golden opportunity arose for the far-right fanatics. Our elected officials doing what they are supposed to do inadvertently created a hook for the far-right to twist into a painful lie that played all too well to their base. Phone calls, social media and blog posts started popping up and there was a buzz. It is important to note that the spark that ignited it was from far-right petitioners outside of Walmart. It was just a short jump to get clown college dropout Tim Eyman on board to capture the jaded hearts of the media and turn the volume up even further. This egregious attack from the far-right was opportunistic, but fully in line with the MAGA strategy that relies on highly visible intimidation and bullying with their goal being total submission and retreat, which essentially erases Democrats. Diversify the topic and introduce critical take aways: Sara Kate, writer for the Walla Walla Union Bulletin, managed to land a Sunday front page article unashamedly titled “The fabric of Republican politics is changing Central and Eastern Washington”. Despite there being Republicans in Walla Walla, the writer chose to give most time to Yakima City Council Member Matt Brown. The article was about Republicans without input from Democrats. Democrats were erased.[https://www.yakimaherald.com/news/local/government/elections/the-fabric-of-republican-politics-in-central-and-eastern-wa-is-changing/article_0864d010-e158-53c6-ad89-15e0de736ca2.html](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/36Og9_cOF/c?w=ItvZnB5XpSc5-5H1O8gDLMxiKAIx90zrchXj6MfSz70.)
The most brilliant ending: What was the most significant point the Republicans wanted to make? Remember the petitioners I mentioned earlier that created the spark that lit the fuse? Well, the most recent article was written by Danny Westneat of the Seattle Times. This article solidified the legitimacy of the petitioners because they are backed by $5 million. [https://www.yakimaherald.com/opinion/column-dumb-money-a-redmond-man-bets-5-million-on-resurrecting-the-state-gop/article_1226cde2-c429-541b-a198-e4139c0bb1d9.html](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/36Og9_cOF/c?w=LSXCc1n8df-SNEN1Qz1kGmfZQ19d5K9fYpkDETMaMg0.)
This media campaign went full circle from scandalous petitioners to pillars of the community that are working to restore the integrity of Washington State with the very clear intent of erasing Democrats.
I find the far-right’s methods reprehensible, but their strategy has been highly effective in occupying much of rural America, controlling two-thirds of State Houses and erasing Democrats from rural community consciousness. What have Republicans done differently than Democrats? They speak up everywhere all at once and the media listens!
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Are we ready for 2024?
---
| | The smartest thing I ever did was ask the chairs of every Democratic county and LD to be part of my campaign. My argument then is even more salient today. Each local Democratic party has decades of deep knowledge of their communities and political machinations. They have access to resources, media and donors. They know the community event schedule better and can make the most informed decisions on how to maneuver a candidate for the best results. I, in my informed opinion, believe that the path to victory for Democrats is for the local Democratic parties to come together as a singular campaign structure and execute an integrated strategy. Our local Democratic organizations have the strength to get a Representative elected or anything else. I believe in these people and I have the esteemed honor to call them friends. Sometimes I think my belief may be a bit intimidating at times, but it is only because I am so very grateful for what they do every day and it is a debt we can never fully repay. Fundraisers are already starting for Dan Newhouse despite the fact that he does not need them. Is this a sign they need to shore up local support early on?

clean_body: Central Washington's largest pro-Democrat action ever! | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | | | The Importance of visibility, Voice and Representation:the Erasing of Democrats in Central Washington | | Why should you care about Rural Americans United's ! Have you wondered how a small minority of far-right or MAGA Republicans can be everywhere all at once? Ever wonder why Republicans seem to always have the quotes in the media? And more importantly, do you ever wonder why Democrats don’t? At the most basic level, a far-right Republican will NEVER think that the time is never right to speak up or that it is not the time to voice their opinion. We, as Democrats, are at risk of losing relevance in Central Washington. We can reverse this by taking bold actions and raising our game to meet the far-right head on. We will not resort to intimidation and bullying, but we will leverage the tools that bring Democratic representation and relevance to a community; increasing representation initially through media outreach. . A Master Class in media manipulation from far-right Republicans Read further to better understand why Rural American United’s is essential to stopping the erasing of Democrats in Central Washington from the public record and public conscience. | | | | Walmartgate: A successful media campaign starts by creating or seizing on buzz. Buzz gets people excited and media outlets are ready to publish content that touches a breadth of viewers and continues the story across different dimensions that touch on emotion and intellect. Most importantly, it should have an ending. Walmartgate had it all! Buzz: A golden opportunity arose for the far-right fanatics. Our elected officials doing what they are supposed to do inadvertently created a hook for the far-right to twist into a painful lie that played all too well to their base. Phone calls, social media and blog posts started popping up and there was a buzz. It is important to note that the spark that ignited it was from far-right petitioners outside of Walmart. It was just a short jump to get clown college dropout Tim Eyman on board to capture the jaded hearts of the media and turn the volume up even further. This egregious attack from the far-right was opportunistic, but fully in line with the MAGA strategy that relies on highly visible intimidation and bullying with their goal being total submission and retreat, which essentially erases Democrats. Diversify the topic and introduce critical take aways: Sara Kate, writer for the Walla Walla Union Bulletin, managed to land a Sunday front page article unashamedly titled “The fabric of Republican politics is changing Central and Eastern Washington”. Despite there being Republicans in Walla Walla, the writer chose to give most time to Yakima City Council Member Matt Brown. The article was about Republicans without input from Democrats. Democrats were erased. The most brilliant ending: What was the most significant point the Republicans wanted to make? Remember the petitioners I mentioned earlier that created the spark that lit the fuse? Well, the most recent article was written by Danny Westneat of the Seattle Times. This article solidified the legitimacy of the petitioners because they are backed by $5 million. This media campaign went full circle from scandalous petitioners to pillars of the community that are working to restore the integrity of Washington State with the very clear intent of erasing Democrats. I find the far-right’s methods reprehensible, but their strategy has been highly effective in occupying much of rural America, controlling two-thirds of State Houses and erasing Democrats from rural community consciousness. What have Republicans done differently than Democrats? They speak up everywhere all at once and the media listens! | | | | | | Are we ready for 2024? | | The smartest thing I ever did was ask the chairs of every Democratic county and LD to be part of my campaign. My argument then is even more salient today. Each local Democratic party has decades of deep knowledge of their communities and political machinations. They have access to resources, media and donors. They know the community event schedule better and can make the most informed decisions on how to maneuver a candidate for the best results. I, in my informed opinion, believe that the path to victory for Democrats is for the local Democratic parties to come together as a singular campaign structure and execute an integrated strategy. Our local Democratic organizations have the strength to get a Representative elected or anything else. I believe in these people and I have the esteemed honor to call them friends. Sometimes I think my belief may be a bit intimidating at times, but it is only because I am so very grateful for what they do every day and it is a debt we can never fully repay. Fundraisers are already starting for Dan Newhouse despite the fact that he does not need them. Is this a sign they need to shore up local support early on? | | | | | | | Visible about Central Washington! | | | | | | | | | | | | | 2023 Central Washington Candidates | | Rural Americans United offered to publish candidate information provided by the local Democratic parties. This is not an endorsement and if you have questions about the local Democratic party's position and the selection process for these candidates, please contact them directly. | | | | | Share on social | | | | This email was sent from .

subject: Losing a Senator could have won California greater representation

The passing of one of San Francisco's oligarchs revealed Gavin Newsom's reliance on identity politics to the detriment of working Californians.

# [Losing a Senator could have won California greater representation](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137609596&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3NjA5NTk2LCJpYXQiOjE2OTYyOTYzMDAsImV4cCI6MTY5ODg4ODMwMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HWD1z3mkYxO714z95pqLouOu-uydbxXtWnRQZ2QdY_s)
### The passing of one of San Francisco's oligarchs revealed Gavin Newsom's reliance on identity politics to the detriment of working Californians.
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/64838b45-8081-41f6-b7f3-be4759345387?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Oct 3| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/64838b45-8081-41f6-b7f3-be4759345387?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137609596&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3NjA5NTk2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY5NjI5NjMwMCwiZXhwIjoxNjk4ODg4MzAwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.UXnmfV7la5dWfOMZ0u4vf9NkoZh_klCQsfYuYKMXaMA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137609596&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3NjA5NTk2LCJpYXQiOjE2OTYyOTYzMDAsImV4cCI6MTY5ODg4ODMwMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HWD1z3mkYxO714z95pqLouOu-uydbxXtWnRQZ2QdY_s&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137609596&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3NjA5NTk2LCJpYXQiOjE2OTYyOTYzMDAsImV4cCI6MTY5ODg4ODMwMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HWD1z3mkYxO714z95pqLouOu-uydbxXtWnRQZ2QdY_s)
---
| | [](https://substack..u3luV6Ybo8twwSu0sCabSIcXRqeDw5kgrMOM4kGzdro?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/losing-a-senator-could-have-won-california?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
The passing of the late Senator Dianne Feinstein represents not only the end of an era, but also a [potential turning point](https://substack.com/redirect/4310869c-9813-42f4-83c5-01f0b26a1313?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in how California is represented in Washington. As our nation's most populous and prosperous state, the stakes are bigger than they might appear from afar.
_When Dianne Feinstein was writing blank checks to the surveillance state and cheerleading for wars, Barbara Lee did her part to try to stop them._
### An unlikely and tragic inflection point
Feinstein owes her [long career in Washington](https://substack.com/redirect/e03006a4-3487-4ce8-b2d4-d5dffa75bd82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to an assassination. And I don't mean the kind of [character assassination](https://substack.com/redirect/82666227-8acf-4c76-86b7-0e94e36107ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that enabled Nancy Pelosi to [hold her seat](https://substack.com/redirect/b5a4a743-4136-48c6-b4e7-a4584ee594aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Congress despite 35 years of ducking debates, but rather a literal assassination, in which America's first openly gay policymaker was murdered alongside a sitting mayor.
Feinstein was the member of the Board of Supervisors who [cradled her dying colleagues](https://substack.com/redirect/4bdff283-4c0f-4b4d-a733-db0b2ccad7e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the late Mayor George Moscone and Supervisor Harvey Milk, as they passed away after a shooting inside San Francisco City Hall in November, 1978. She tried to administer first aid, which led her to appear before the city in blood-stained clothes announcing their deaths.
Before the assassination, Feinstein's career [appeared over](https://substack.com/redirect/4a053b52-fdf5-48d6-b7e8-9bec45593f42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Her time on the Board of Supervisors had not especially distinguished her. She had even publicly insinuated her plans to retire, until serving as a [calming voice for a city besieged by terror](https://substack.com/redirect/d4df2e20-137b-48dc-a3cd-d1b741e45c07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the week of the incident secured her public position and ultimately made her Mayor.
In that respect, Feinstein shares a lot with George W. Bush, whose reassuring demeanor in the wake of the 9-11 attacks seemed to win him support among confused observers. Too many deferred to the tragic--and [unconstitutional, yet ultimately bipartisan](https://substack.com/redirect/8b8a438d-5383-4b19-88a5-5899d935a0b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--centralization of power under the Executive Branch during his administrations.
Over 20,000 people read this newsletter. Fewer than 100 support it. If you're able to afford a subscription, please join me to help expand my continuing work! If not, you can subscribe for free.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..93ZV4Rakf8EIBXrk_Fy3LJZK3NWgRvYJtxrAv_ocGhQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=137609596)
It is important to note that the assassin who murdered Mayor George Moscone and Harvey Milk was a colleague of theirs on the Board of Supervisors, a former police officer named Dan White.
It's one thing for cops to kill Americans, as they do with [disturbing frequency](https://substack.com/redirect/d62eeecd-4b81-47cc-9eb5-da527654fafc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It's another thing for former police officers to serve on legislative bodies, as one [currently does](https://substack.com/redirect/445c5778-4861-4978-a7f0-2083c24945a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in San Francisco.
It is an entirely different thing for former police officers to murder their legislative colleagues in cold blood.
The assassinations of Harvey Milk and George Moscone defined San Francisco for a generation, and indicated the future backlash that eventually turned City Hall to the right--but they have been papered over by those who perpetually inflate the city's progressive culture while ignoring its consistently conservative politics.
The inheritors of Milk & Moscone's political legacies have repeatedly betrayed their visions.
One of them was Dianne Feinstein.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b69ea285-2083-4a96-964f-a6f8f5c10414?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
On the one hand, she diversified the Senate. As Rebecca Solnit [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/d4df2e20-137b-48dc-a3cd-d1b741e45c07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in _The Guardian_ :
> [Feinstein] was one of California's first two women senators (Barbara Boxer won office in the same 1992 election) and the nation's first two Jewish women senators, the first female member of the Senate judiciary committee, first woman to chair the Senate rules committee, and in 2009, the first woman to preside over a presidential inauguration.
### Punching down--and left--in the Senate
As a senator, however, Feinstein wielded a reliable vote for Wall Street against the interests of working Americans. A wealthy oligarch herself who was [born wealthy](https://substack.com/redirect/0fa9fee2-ee9d-4ae8-b0c5-c90504e334bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [married a private equity mogul](https://substack.com/redirect/93643df5-d6fa-403e-abe6-1647eb400cbb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), she consistently supported tax breaks for the wealthy, unprovoked and fraudulent wars, and unconstitutional mass surveillance.
The surveillance regime, in particular, owes a great deal to Senator Feinstein. As former chair of the Senate Intelligence Committee, she was in a particular position to help hold accountable the FBI, the NSA, and the CIA over the years that they ran roughshod over constitutional rights, civilian oversight, and international human rights. With one quite notable exception, she declined.
Having challenged the agencies to which Feinstein deferred--only to face a character assassination that ended my career once I ran for office--I rely on readers to share my writing. Please share this post with your friends!
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137609596&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3NjA5NTk2LCJpYXQiOjE2OTYyOTYzMDAsImV4cCI6MTY5ODg4ODMwMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HWD1z3mkYxO714z95pqLouOu-uydbxXtWnRQZ2QdY_s)
The intelligence committees in the Senate and the House owe their existence to a series of leaks in the 1970s that exposed [decades of criminal activity](https://substack.com/redirect/560c43ce-88cb-4c6c-a8ee-e88e7c04e48f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) under the guise of so-called "national security." Congress was so alarmed by its findings in the Church and Pike committee investigations that it created bipartisan standing committees dedicated to overseeing the "three-letter" executive agencies. Under Feinstein's watch, those agencies co-opted and largely [neutralized the congressional committees](https://substack.com/redirect/fefc74e5-32b7-469c-bcf7-eaba9f60b37b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) charged with independent oversight.
Having spent 20 years [myself](https://substack.com/redirect/1d0c5e92-30b1-4283-bded-4862eacbff07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [fighting](https://substack.com/redirect/bde20415-eb89-41b7-9e25-bc3c082a8ae0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the surveillance apparatus that Feinstein helped engineer as a policymaker who fell asleep at the oversight switch and felt no hesitation writing blank checks for mass constitutional violations, it is difficult not to see Feinstein's passing as an opportunity for California's voice to become more sincerely represented in the nation's capital.
### One righteous struggle
To her credit, Feinstein did show up for work as chair of the Senate Intelligence Committee at least once: when she prolifically--but unsuccessfully--[stood up and tried to expose](https://substack.com/redirect/e8f6dd86-839c-4f9f-9206-c054fa7686d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the CIA's criminal history of torture.
The international legal prohibition against torture was [established](https://substack.com/redirect/f5081a9a-4e20-4f5d-a47d-e3590cbca54f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the Second World War, and our victory over a country that shamelessly committed torture. Resigning the legal principle that we fought World War II to establish, President Bush sanctioned torture, and President Obama approved an ongoing cover up--but Senator Feinstein [did her part](https://substack.com/redirect/07d92bd1-c3c5-4d09-a802-74ebd65a4997?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to try to make sure that the American public knew how vast the CIA's criminal enterprise ranged.
While Feinstein was unable to secure Obama's approval to publicly release the report that she and the Senate Intelligence Committee staff spent years compiling, they did win Obama's approval to publish [an executive summary](https://substack.com/redirect/32aafb77-81c8-4907-b7d9-6ff5191b7837?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It makes clear that the CIA's deranged activities included outright crimes--but because it leaves unnamed the crucial figures in the sage, it offered no accountability despite its attempt at transparency.
Hollywood [commemorated](https://substack.com/redirect/5f26f7c4-80d1-4c27-ba86-e11f1bcf25eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this era of Feinstein's career in a fascinating film, [the Report](https://substack.com/redirect/1c063506-5810-4911-bf77-0355e245c37a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It stars Adam Driver (whose other credits include Star Wars) depicting a courageous Senate staffer as he investigates the CIA's criminal torture program.
The film does a fair job of depicting real events. Throughout, Feinstein remains the resolute interlocutor, committed to human rights principles that, for some reason, didn't matter to her so much when she served as a cheerleader for wars from Nicaragua to Afghanistan.
While Feinstein's struggle to hold the CIA accountable for (some of) its crimes was righteous, it was ultimately unsuccessful. The Agency's quarterback for pushing back against the Senate--which included destroying video evidence of torture, hacking the Senate to steal evidence investigators had collected, and threatening them with criminal prosecution--served as [CIA Director](https://substack.com/redirect/f1e3e18d-bbe9-422a-bb6d-33cf78a3cc40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for three years under the Trump administration.
But that figure is a woman, which makes it easier to celebrate her as a feminist success story, breaking down doors in a male-dominated field, than to hold her accountable as an international criminal. In that respect, former CIA Director Gina Haspel has a lot in common with the late Senator Feinstein, not to mention Hillary Clinton or Nancy Pelosi. All are wealthy white women who have played key policy roles enabling human rights violations.
Few things enrage me more than watching [powerful figures enjoy impunity](https://substack.com/redirect/05808aae-c8cf-4108-9f4a-90b2a8a0975d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for grave offenses at the same time that powerless people find our families and communities the objects of relentless assaults.
_Newsom panders, putting identity politics ahead of California 's interests_
Because she passed away in the middle of her term, Feinstein has been replaced by Governor Gavin Newsom. Ironically, they came from the same political network, having both served as mayor of the same city, roughly 20 years apart.
Newsom previously pledged to appoint a Black woman to fill Feinstein's shoes should she become incapacitated, but recently announced that he would perceive his appointment as that of a caretaker--although he ultimately [declined to extract a promise](https://substack.com/redirect/01da0e32-1e89-43b4-8a1d-bc6f746cb358?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from his nominee that they would step down in 2024.
The pattern hints at one to which Newsom has long seem committed: pandering.
Newsom recognizes how deeply Democrats rely on the Black vote, and also how under represented California's Black communities are on both the state and the national stage. Of course, Kamala Harris, who served as San Francisco district attorney under Gavin Newsom, is now the Vice President of the United States, and the first Black person to serve in that role.
But Kamala's presence is largely theatrical. If anything, her work has [undermined](https://substack.com/redirect/0607d687-42f7-43a4-b6b6-ad05f6601407?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the interests of minority communities both in San Francisco and across the United States. From her [legacy as a predatory prosecutor](https://substack.com/redirect/4ef1e96a-a15b-4c9b-a8f5-ea0ddc8a84ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to her inability to meaningfully reform [continuing human rights abuses](https://substack.com/redirect/8f0ed559-a69d-4091-a255-b0986ea673f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at our nation's borders, Harris has been a tool for the establishment since the very beginning of her career.
Their dueling presidential aspirations might help explain why Newsom pledged to appoint a Black woman to fill the Senate seat vacated by Feinstein. Most eyes turned to representative Barbara Lee, who has already announced a Senate candidacy.
Yet Newsom appointed Laphonza Butler, a protege of Kamala Harris who previously led EMILY's List and worked in the labor movement while living in Maryland.
Newsom's choice to pass over a social justice champion to instead embrace a moderate voice who checks many demographic boxes is a disappointing reflection of the Democratic Party's [broader strategy premised on co-opting minority communities](https://substack.com/redirect/7876eae3-8dc3-469c-95fa-45ede2a240fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Barbara Lee is one of the most visionary voices in the House of Representatives. She is [the only voice in Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/476435c4-adbc-4756-a8c1-e9f530a7c0ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to have stood up against the Bush administration's warmongering, and to challenge the 2001 Authorization for the Use of Military Force that served as the legal cover for everything from the invasion of Afghanistan to CIA torture.
It would be especially fitting that Barbara Lee should represent California in Washington, because she has done so more capably as a representative of Oakland, than any of her colleagues across the state. When Dianne Feinstein was writing blank checks to the surveillance state and cheerleading for wars, Barbara Lee did her part to try to stop them.
History vindicated Barbara Lee's concerns, yet an ignorant political culture continues to throw its weight behind discredited oligarchs whose conflicts of interest somehow manage to routinely escape attention in polite corners.
Newsom's decision to appoint Butler may appear progressive, but that perception relies on a shortsighted emphasis on identity rather than track record. As a Black woman and a lesbian, Butler is certainly poised to expand the Senate's diversity.
All things being equal, that's a good thing.
But LaPhonza Butler is in no way Barbara Lee's equal...

_**"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."**_

They can’t stand that President Trump defended Christianity against the Woke Mob.
They’re enraged that his Supreme Court Justices ended Roe v Wade.
And now that Trump has been arrested, they hope to take out the biggest defender of religious liberty & the unborn our country has ever seen.
**Democrats hope that if they throw Trump behind bars, Christian conservatives will never show up to the polls again._Then they’ll have free reign to trample our religious liberties._ **

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Who will fight the abortion extremists in 2024?
body:
Take our poll at the link below and let us know which pro-life candidate is our next National Defender of Life!

__
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zteok5krivdk8fu14gh88n7ul17jkgn3tj11sa0g_rp22sh2s8i66p73cph6eoj2c5h2bs)

[
---
---
| |
---
---
---
| |
Dear Pro-Life Partner,

When I was in Milwaukee at the first Republican presidential debate of 2024 election cycle, it was clear to me which candidates are and are not prepared to be a National Defender of Life. As a supporter of the pro-life movement, I'm sure you noticed this too!

Some were bold in thier statements, sharing the plight of the unborn, and calling for pretections. Others had positions that were simply unacceptable.

Without a doubt, the pro-life issue will make a big impact on who the GOP nominee will be this election as 72% of Americans support abortion limits by no later than 15 weeks of a baby's development when they can feel pain.

**That's 7 in 10 Americans speaking up for the pro-life cause and standing up for protections of the unborn and their mothers. We have the majortiy voice. But there's a problem.

** Several of the Republican candidates keep playing a game of defense rather than offensively attacking the issue with the same vehemence our opponents across the aisle are. Big Abortion and its extremists in American halls of power work hard every day to gain ground in this fight. We must offensively fight harder in the same battle over the next 12 months as we see the very fabric of our country changing before our eyes.

So who in your opinion will be the best National Defender of life? Who would you select to go head to head with the extreme abortion agenda and fight for the unborn in our contry?

**Take our poll at the link below and let us know which pro-life candidate is our next National Defender of Life!

**[https://action.sbaprolife.org/best-presidential-candidate-poll

](https://action.sbaprolife.org/best-presidential-candidate-poll?utm_campaign=presidential_candidate_poll&utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=email&appeal_id=1018&package_id=23803&utm_content=PA-GOPP-20231003)I hope you'll take just 1-minute and share your view on this critical topic. Make your voice heard as we head into the 2024 election cycle.

name: John Kennedy
subject: all due respect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’ll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase:

| |

---
| | | Hey folks -- John Kennedy here.

I respect you too much to beat around the bush. You're busy. I'm busy. So I'll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase:

My Republican colleagues over there in the People's House have a very, VERY big deadline coming down the pike, and they sent me a note saying they're falling **DANGEROUSLY** behind their big October goal.

They also made it abundantly clear to me that they'd have a real mess on their hands if they came up short.

_**[So with all due respect, I'm humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We've only got days left before the big deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkmh53ifa55n1is3miobuim5u13fsgl5e7a6lnog_rp22sh2s8i66p73cph6eoj4c3h2bs "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We’ve only got days left before the big deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help. ")**_

_Do you think you could do that? For me?_

Look, this deadline was important before... but now I'm hearing Biden and the Democrat National Committee are unloading 25 million bucks in the most competitive states in the country -- **yep, enough states for a DEMOCRAT SWEEP in the next election.**

And I'm afraid this much cash could be enough to push Liberals over the top...

With an ARMY of Liberal donors whipping out their credit cards every time they flip on CNN - and Conservatives missing their goal - it could be all over for us. **That's why I 'm pleading for your help right here and now:**
---
| | | [Send In Ten Bucks Now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuvpfe9ube57c0vife9lg5mtbd4tpeoomaf79oi8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cph6eoj4c3h2bs "Send In Ten Bucks Now")

---
| | | [Send In More Now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrnst1gkd6ae8rurc9tt7jkk0cs35hkdu6k6ipjo_rp22sh2s8i66p73cph6eoj4c3h2bs "Send In More Now")
---
I know Kevin McCarthy reached out...
I know James Comer reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Jim Jordan reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...

And I sure as heck know you're probably tired of hearing from us, but we don't have time to stand around - not if we want to win!!!

_**[So in the short time we have left before the deadline, I'm personally asking for your help to save our Republican friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4cklregt647m8nsb3pq2o550r3sa2gbrh0i1pgo_rp22sh2s8i66p73cph6eoj4c3h2bs "So in the short time we have left before the deadline, I’m personally asking for your help to save our Republican friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.")**_

God bless you,

John N. Kennedy

# TUESDAY, OCTOBER 3, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today is the 160th anniversary of the day Abraham Lincoln, grateful for the Union victory at Gettysburg, proclaimed that the nation would [celebrate an official Thanksgiving holiday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1urDAQQOGnMZ2R_zB3Cxe3odu0KdHgsfEkxl6BBeLto0QpU3_N0Xl_zk-gTGV9gy24FusMvtEZZim45krPqkMXQ1BBd8FJ-7Bam39WdskBKhw8DMr6JT7MaAcTPC4ahgVlMKIjp4TSUggtHoMRsl9QoonjGAVGsyyWGRGQWt37j0qlpRDzXc-w975uXXaptdfB9H-mJqam67r6REer-_3tTE0t0cERbk6F_wpTU6biay78tVefgbaD1xjJE2TeEpTPY6WTyspTzYRwd7vD10U502FHZsS6AeWfgPbnjq8AAAD__0gvZR8) on the fourth Thursday of November every year. ## Gaetz Forces Vote on McCarthy
GOP Rep. Matt Gaetz filed a motion Monday [to remove House Speaker Kevin McCarthy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSpCAQgOGn0QwLgcGbgOASs7n0QquFRvsGwZIevdmn39qNN_6Tv76_j-kBlCgvf2BDx7FM4JlOnHoptFB6Um1wEVGhbtH19m61Nr9s365ukBiVRkAYDBo0swrxBireb1ZLZYeWnJJK91Jqeb8Z2Xdz6IOJwxBliGaebWMkBuJydP8KZV4xpnc58eh82drkVua9Nvp3o8ZGjdd1dbH8z3jVr96ocS-JmHxt1LgBs1gA-UNQ5qOEl8cqtsJUsjjBA6OABShXFmt5VRR1R3jiIZ54Uhab93Dw-m4PF_aLUqJqh8bIZQNK3zv8I85nAAAA__-uJ2oR) from his role as Speaker. The House must vote within two days on whether to keep McCarthy in his leadership role. Gaetz and McCarthy have been at angry loggerheads over budget bills for months. Gaetz conceded that McCarthy could [probably survive this first effort](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLmO5CAUAL8GZ1hc7SMg2MRZb7qhxfGwWWGw4LWtnq8f9cSTlVRJqf4916eJKebtrzlAYyircRgvWDmjkgq5is7rACBAdqD5MA9Sqmng3a7txCcPo3XWC6XUIOQkZy6Bm_mhHrPqohZMSM6YZPNDMd5bz70K4xiYD8ragSgGPmKp_f8SM-4Q0rtcUHtXji7pHfFsRP4hYiFiue-7z9ZluNvHE7GcJUWMrhGxuJK3Cu2DFU66GcAv6kp24KHRwzlTcX_TsxZrbHpTZzJtr3rFC2iItSG9CgItr4a0umw4nxSfu6r9eceUYhtGoth2mJh-4vDXVd8BAAD__4_6bRM) to oust him, but only if he got Democrats to support him. Few Republicans have expressed interest in ousting McCarthy, and House Democrats have been [mum about supporting the Speaker](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2P4yAQQH-N3RFhwAYXFNeky7VXWsMw2Fzwh_DIUfbXr7L1lk-veXr_HtMDcsnb_BdW8pz2CZDzRVMnhRZKT6qNPhEp0i35bhgHrY0bunbxQVMMDnqH5HCU2kGvx2QooY3GgWuzV1LpTkotx97I7hZiF02yNsmYTAhDYyTFzHu9_d_zxgul8t4vqjfc17b4hfk4G_2nUfdG3eHY6HV-1AcqZyzUqPuTrryJFREqL2-xArOYgfhLnAfBk6q4AIFJ4L7Nlc5TkKUeEQdMdkQMqQ8GbLA6jLEHDdRWH49XLiWfg22MnFfI5SeJfx30HQAA___--mk2). It's also not at all clear who would replace McCarthy. It took 15 ballots to elect him the first time.
## Newsom Senate Choice Sparks Controversy
California Gov. Gavin Newsom's appointment of Laphonza Butler--leader of the liberal fundraising group Emily's List--to serve out the late Barbara Feinstein's Senate term [has already sparked controversy.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1u7CAUhJ8Gd1j8Lb4uKLaxbrNpU1oYDuuTYHCAXWvz9JFTp5qRRiN9-t5v881ixHR_sxuYFvJsXcMnzJxRSYWcRedNABAgOzBcj1pK9U_zbjWDkiNbnOd8DFaOoxZaBQcu2OUCUsoOjWBCcsYkGy-K8X7x3KswDIH5oJZFE8XAY8ul_8iY2gohvvITSu_y1kWztrZXIq9ETERMx3H0W03nRsQEiT4qEVOC44w9R2zozhrtvub0benyaBFKpSkn6mzEkEtCSwtU9JAc0GKxQqVfD6gNczrPttDrla-v_5-xK8bvB8aIVQ9EsftmMf6StT89_QQAAP__oOhsXQ) Butler lives in Maryland, but references to her East Coast residence have been scrubbed online, and she says she also has a home in California. Rep. Darrell Issa called it [a potential violation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0Ltu6zAQBNCvkToKfEi0XbC4jTrfNqWw0i4tJnwIJGPG-fpAqdOewQCDebsvd3Dexcd_CGSqTQts1T1pEZwpJtUiezSWSJLqyQh900qNVy363QiBqDRtWqDicBVXTopbq4TecIJp6p2RXCrBueK3aeRiWFHgaC8Xy9GO66q7kRO6mvLwnlysO1n_Sk_Kw5ZC781e61E69a-Tcyfn1tpg01ekVs68k_ORvKtuK52cH-lgHlqAD8rMlQIMKUDEwiCWRrmws5cCKxShEvMEeKqHY0_xG9j6Wf0JAfLLQ0SWqTikuL36bPBozntX9KUb-SOA878L659__QQAAP__t0ZxPg) of the California constitution. Newsom is appointing a black woman, as he promised he would, but he [passed over Rep. Barbara Lee,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFu7CAQANDT4M7WMLB4XVD8hm5_m9LCZrCJsLFgsqvk9FFS5wRP7-0xP3zK6dz--4MsxzL7ldOTZgm96lHN2AUbiZBUR1aaySil70Z2u9XTNJI3d4x4jzpMq54WMGq8eZDLiKFLFgGVBFAw3TTIYQky6DiOEULUy2KEBgqJSx3eSzp5p5g_y5PqsJajy3ZnvppQ_wQ6gW71-fDMVNtQ6ibQXSUnTmsT6H4cgU6CQJf9tZfzy_fLB2eqfaPTM_UnvVo5BLqu2nC9Us6pmVFo2A6f8q_If_6_AwAA__-rvluZ) an iconic black congresswoman who is running for Feinstein's seat, angering many on the left.
## Drive-Thru Race: Taco Bell's the Fastest
Honors for the fastest drive-thru service in 2023 [goes to Taco Bell for speed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFywyAQBb8GdedBgJFVqEijzmlTahAc4hIkPHC2J3-fsetUr3jF7uzXdbk6ynRsn27HiWNZnGd64NJL0KD0orowRUSFusOpt6PV2lxs36XJRGONG60fwjjioM9Sj2PQZ2NXr-LqOpqUVLqXUsvxbGR_WkMfTByGKEM062qFkRiISz19Fzo4Ycy_5YH15Mve5Skx35rQH0LNQs2cMFHOr0-o2Sd3bHRs4Has5J1QMx6VfNrxYKFmV7mBv2e-VxRqNkobbS7wTI4bcEKIrjE2fi_EUgKESg8ETvUOxEDtYPCJ_A9EyvACdHUKtyflTM0Owshtd_T26fjfcn8BAAD__7wqcRE) and to Chick-Fil-A for accuracy in getting the order right, according to the annual drive-thru study by Intouch Insight. Overall, the analysis found that drive-thru speed has [improved by 30 seconds](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO8yAQhJ8Gd1iwODgpKP7GXf72Sgu8S7wnbCwgse7tT7lrr5piRqNP38d9vntOvD_--41ci3n2S-MXzVpJI8HM0KGLRECmI6ftzRozXK3uVnc1y-hD1JfhEhAtBBvNO0aM6FVYOnagwGiljLpdBqX7gBqHOI5RYRxCsGJQhNxy6T8z722lmL7yi0q_5K1Lbm3tqML8EzAJmM7z7Jc9LO9SwPS-FjBpJWBSIGCKvjYZc0aJhV8k21qeMvmdqqwHEcrnIX2VkU4qv5NS5em5Sd5l4p36tW2pKw6Pk1PiakcxqMfmOf3wtD_tfAcAAP__xIlm7g) since the pandemic, though it's still a bit slower than in 2019. The fastest service, Taco Bell's this year, was just short of five minutes, followed by Carl's Jr. and then KFC. Chick-Fil-A was the slowest at 7-1/2 minutes but was tops in accuracy and food quality. The biggest accuracy issue: Drinks having ice in them despite the order asking for no ice. You can see the [full study results here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFywyAQBb8GdedBgJFVqEijzmlTahAc4hIkPHC2J3-fsetUr3jF7uzXdbk6ynRsn27HiWNZnGd64NJL0KD0orowRUSFusOpt6PV2lxs36XJRGONG60fwjjioM9Sj2PQZ2NXr-LqOpqUVLqXUsvxbGR_WkMfTByGKEM062qFkRiISz19Fzo4Ycy_5YH15Mve5Skx35rQH0LNQs2cMFHOr0-o2Sd3bHRs4Has5J1QMx6VfNrxYKFmV7mBv2e-VxRqNkobbS7wTI4bcEKIrjE2fi_EUgKESg8ETvUOxEDtYPCJ_A9EyvACdHUKtyflTM0Owshtd_T26fjfcn8BAAD__7wqcRE)

clean_body: GOP Rep. Matt Gaetz filed a motion Monday to remove House Speaker Kevin McCarthy from his role as Speaker. The House must vote within two days on whether to keep McCarthy in his leadership role. | | | | . | | TUESDAY, OCTOBER 3, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today is the 160th anniversary of the day Abraham Lincoln, grateful for the Union victory at Gettysburg, proclaimed that the nation would on the fourth Thursday of November every year. If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, Have something to say? Head on over to our . Enjoying The Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, "NativePath". | Gaetz Forces Vote on McCarthy GOP Rep. Matt Gaetz filed a motion Monday from his role as Speaker. The House must vote within two days on whether to keep McCarthy in his leadership role. Gaetz and McCarthy have been at angry loggerheads over budget bills for months. Gaetz conceded that McCarthy could to oust him, but only if he got Democrats to support him. Few Republicans have expressed interest in ousting McCarthy, and House Democrats have been . It's also not at all clear who would replace McCarthy. It took 15 ballots to elect him the first time. Newsom Senate Choice Sparks Controversy California Gov. Gavin Newsom's appointment of Laphonza Butler--leader of the liberal fundraising group Emily's List--to serve out the late Barbara Feinstein's Senate term Butler lives in Maryland, but references to her East Coast residence have been scrubbed online, and she says she also has a home in California. Rep. Darrell Issa called it of the California constitution. Newsom is appointing a black woman, as he promised he would, but he an iconic black congresswoman who is running for Feinstein's seat, angering many on the left. Drive-Thru Race: Taco Bell's the Fastest Honors for the fastest drive-thru service in 2023 and to Chick-Fil-A for accuracy in getting the order right, according to the annual drive-thru study by Intouch Insight. Overall, the analysis found that drive-thru speed has since the pandemic, though it's still a bit slower than in 2019. The fastest service, Taco Bell's this year, was just short of five minutes, followed by Carl's Jr. and then KFC. Chick-Fil-A was the slowest at 7-1/2 minutes but was tops in accuracy and food quality. The biggest accuracy issue: Drinks having ice in them despite the order asking for no ice. Dear Pro-Life Partner,

When I was in Milwaukee at the first Republican presidential debate of 2024 election cycle, it was clear to me which candidates are and are not prepared to be a National Defender of Life. As a supporter of the pro-life movement, I'm sure you noticed this too!

Some were bold in thier statements, sharing the plight of the unborn, and calling for pretections. Others had positions that were simply unacceptable.

Without a doubt, the pro-life issue will make a big impact on who the GOP nominee will be this election as 72% of Americans support abortion limits by no later than 15 weeks of a baby's development when they can feel pain.

**That's 7 in 10 Americans speaking up for the pro-life cause and standing up for protections of the unborn and their mothers. We have the majortiy voice. But there's a problem.

** Several of the Republican candidates keep playing a game of defense rather than offensively attacking the issue with the same vehemence our opponents across the aisle are. Big Abortion and its extremists in American halls of power work hard every day to gain ground in this fight. We must offensively fight harder in the same battle over the next 12 months as we see the very fabric of our country changing before our eyes.

So who in your opinion will be the best National Defender of life? Who would you select to go head to head with the extreme abortion agenda and fight for the unborn in our contry?

**Take our poll at the link below and let us know which pro-life candidate is our next National Defender of Life!

**[https://action.sbaprolife.org/best-presidential-candidate-poll

](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7f12c44acd4140a7a04baa7ad5775105&_e=QZqnlC4mfpx6sPmGcU6exJt77lsGp7dpmkUw6KsrH8in5gnT2Uu2kDzPwPEB0Dn7BWC6CnMqeOFPL0fzMQbJDt37FAABABOfYVkUMlSY8qblmj1noeHqYxfpHa9yF8Dt2OrMzpZYR5vFMA7in7nA51qw62JmTQYsAFtInjOkHL2rd6SW4tSOpG7UFFyxR7Eb1E_zw3qusna123-oCEbsItI3cAEI368vJsdPMNbzPDNMuJDoNAlQy3OLOiUZgw5m4GPvtuQMsm4bZSAK7Dm48ANkUYMMksISeNUe_U1N6wzEGuSKOI_DWeH_8YkGOVhOw_9UwUrudO1sUbt9h5k7kGcVq37_2QhZVFdY4PtJ2SqgE0GZOaKNdjCB_TufkYdqD3hqEYisTHdC1xEEpJwjv4lLgccE6tHdsI9Tn3YtOlCIVlNxGklZVx6KTOV_6DFd)I hope you'll take just 1-minute and share your view on this critical topic. Make your voice heard as we head into the 2024 election cycle.

body:
The Radical Democrats nationwide are circling the wagons to INVALIDATE your vote and shatter President Trump's campaign ONCE AND FOR ALL.

| |

---
| | | **Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on radical attempts to REMOVE Trump from the 2024 ballot:**

"This entire movement is a vile assault on the electoral process directed at a single individual: Donald Trump. However, if it succeeds, the implications will live far beyond today. We are left not with the rule of law but the rule of men - and in this case, the rule of Democrat Party officials and operatives and their academic allies... The Democrat Party is behind another unconstitutional scheme that seeks to disenfranchise tens of millions of Americans, specifically Republican voters."

Mark struck gold with this one.

The Radical Democrats nationwide are circling the wagons to INVALIDATE your vote and shatter President Trump's campaign ONCE AND FOR ALL. That's why they're calling to remove him from the ballot in:

_Not one, two, three, four, five...but EIGHT key states!_

They're throwing everything but the kitchen sink at Trump to make an example out of him: This is what happens if you dare challenge the Democrat Machine.

**STEP ONE:** Scrub Trump's name from the ballot. **STEP TWO:** Make it impossible for you to vote for Trump.**STEP THREE:** Disenfranchise MILLIONS of GOP voters. **STEP FOUR:** Establish COMPLETE DEMOCRAT CONTROL.

That's one way the 2024 election can unfold...

Luckily, we have another option: **We're calling on Conservatives with enough grit and determination to shut down this Liberal plot right here, right now. **

_**[GO ON THE RECORD: Sign the petition to KEEP Trump on your 2024 ballot >>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=149436073a9948d68e9849334ed265e9&_e=9nfucFxbW9KEBqR6yjZ31U0PMELNXEfSybGyurXlj8TXcmGZosU7dzAaRIAGPjoJXAWelV3T37sm_v3eLY2zpOph_7S4yXSleVnzp83u8NdYsBUxjNUYoQzD4SXDgAcgVMg_HTPNwxIw3LrO_9lLgIyu8-p_Bp0rMJiy6Ak75ugkKgVCy7Snct5JnCNNkCqRo0qCFKEn3WmwWOL6Ad0Bk6rFbWhwj9A-aEnUL4Xlm8ZOphppp9t6BOV7UibI_boBa1hSWK8u6sOP6yNNxZDb0Klh7VcyuDl_5Ju_4srahso4usJTt8n171kHDtmIltsW6wz5f0qukg_y9NRTgFPF8uE3ZS0wz94t-ZpxESnDmHpBAuUbRdodW8xKC5YT3LYCoGUioHxOE03RTNzIZK_Y32eZkwynjvZvuHy15iwu5qgCYCvu0dnMR0lbtXArhg1xjPdf-b1kA_R7IqeOgyetur9PhBjq7hu4JxkbFpttcQA%3D "GO ON THE RECORD: Sign the petition to KEEP Trump on your 2024 ballot >>")**_

We'll be honest:

This isn't going to be a simple task. We'll need an OVERWHELMING number of brave Conservatives - at least 1,000,000 strong - to speak up and prove that these radicals don't control the will of the American People.

But it will be impossible to make the case without **YOU.**

So, if there was ever a moment to act with some haste - THAT MOMENT IS RIGHT NOW.

name: LTC(R) Christian Castelli
subject: Thank you!
body:
At the Petty Fish Fry. One of five events from last weekend!

Peter, I cannot thank you enough for all the support, hard work, and contributions you've provided my campaign. I asked a lot of you last week, and your generosity did not go unnoticed.

I'm Christian Castelli. 22 Year Combat Veteran. Decorated Green Beret. Former Inspector General.

I am ready and would be honored to serve as your next congressman.

A quick update. . . We are told to expect a decision on the new congressional district lines by the end of this week. We then expect the new lines to be voted on and approved by the North Carolina General Assembly next week.

At that point, we will know the district and we will begin our mission to bring conservative, experienced, and tested leadership to Congress.

**We will not retreat. We will not fail. We will succeed and win with your support.**

Unfortunately, fundraising never stops in campaigns. So, your continued support is greatly appreciated.

[](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)
Again, thank you, and God bless you.

R. Christian Castelli
Lieutenant Colonel (Retired)
U.S. Army Special Forces
Republican Candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives
(336) 810-8100
<https://castellifornc.com>
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** from **colonel@castellifornc.com**.
If you do not wish to receive further messages from us, [ please click here to unsubscribe](https://emailtracking-cm.aristotle.com/frmEmailUnsubscribe.aspx?databaseId=b33a3810-9cbf-4584-a3d2-01672886537a&activityID=b8df8a8b-d543-41fd-aec5-a8dd9c78001f).

name: Nicole, Accountable Tech
subject: Google is tracking who visits abortion clinics… here’s why that’s a problem
body:
Time to Act:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc07d7a24-b340-45f4-83c7-336abcfba697/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf628707-ae14-4392-bb0b-37e9930d20b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Google promised to delete sensitive user data that could be weaponized to prosecute those seeking reproductive health care across state lines. Peter, they haven’t kept their promise. [Join us in holding Google accountable: Add your name to demand Google stop collecting and retaining user location data for abortion clinics.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7a5000e-792c-480e-bedc-5e07eda2c642/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07d6354d-d571-4e0e-a93c-94b6b8be827f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Peter, In the time since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, dozens of states have banned or severely restricted abortion care despite the fact that 511,000 abortions were estimated to have occurred in the first 6 months of 2023. [1] Accountable Tech’s research shows that Google still retains location search queries for reproductive care facilities – despite promising to do otherwise over a year ago. [2]

This is a HUGE problem: Right-wing state governments are increasingly seeking to prosecute people seeking abortions – and in states like Oklahoma and Texas, even private citizens can sue anyone who aids and abets abortion seekers. [3] [Peter, will you join us in calling on Google to protect users’ privacy and delete users’ location data that state governments and private citizens could use to prosecute or sue those seeking reproductive health care →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b6eebf7-ab84-4b38-8860-3da55ea68693/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T015f2c33-8097-4556-892d-b8f23bb41a82/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thanks to previous pressure that we put on Google this past year the tech giant updated their policy to automatically delete the location data of visits to "particularly personal" locations like counseling centers, domestic violence shelters, abortion clinics, fertility centers, addiction treatment facilities, weight loss clinics, cosmetic surgery clinics, and others. [4]

However, our own research from November 2022 and April 2023 found that this data is STILL being stored despite Google’s promises, and it could be weaponized by anti-abortion prosecutors and state agents. Recent research from the Washington Post also concluded that location history data related to visiting abortion clinics was stored by Google, despite their promises to automatically delete that sensitive data. [5] [This is unacceptable. Join us in calling on Google to uphold its promise and ADD YOUR NAME to demand Google stop collecting and retaining location data from users.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc42721f8-e80e-4266-9344-12f777bd2420/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for taking action with us to hold Google accountable. Nicole Gill
Co-founder and Executive Director
Accountable Tech [1] New York Times: [https://www.nytimes.com/interactive/2023/09/07/us/abortion-data-bans-laws.html](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a62bb1e-b62b-47e0-a8ac-cee842c6d0c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [2] Accountable Tech: [https://accountabletech.org/research/googles-data-collection-and-policies-could-endanger-those-seeking-abortions/](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0db33e6e-701c-40f8-9299-1c97b1845157/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [3] CNN: [https://www.cnn.com/2022/04/28/politics/oklahoma-heartbeat-act/index.html](https://default.salsalabs.org/T18e175d7-82a8-44df-8097-8151e41c87d2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [4] Google: [https://blog.google/technology/safety-security/protecting-peoples-privacy-on-health-topics/](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3a94bbe-d519-4aa7-88b9-59ef6c6c4ce9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [5] Washington Post: [https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2023/05/09/google-privacy-abortion-data/](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb168ffc9-bf1d-4250-a396-61b5b0310c02/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: It all comes down to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I hoped it wouldn't come to this.

| |
---
| | | Friend, **I really hoped it wouldn 't come to this. **

It's Kevin McCarthy, and we're still pacing behind our daily fundraising goal.

But here's the thing, Friend...

**YOU - yes, __YOU!__ - are the LAST person I need to reach my goal.**

| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f6f4b8dc922e425b873b8d95d79e7b7f&_e=s1QlZYZEEFIAP-htUn4bK52ofHfwjBgdlLFRDOB0G2dvWUlFtpvsBKP3rWB80px_GQi_qDnsoSadbxJ9TOjeiEstlmZ5aSOXlI5U2q7_q9dewQk4VLfPa1p0fSOohkRsjlmgI66RK2Rmx7iUYdlDiYMUb2H02fscLEdCnTAXBkDFGXuXnSOpWHmHa_c-kb9i_rmd0DgZLG_T2qgzaxMWfZwN0l8RPR3cXRUp9WAmUG_JSxwELPO7lUmAF-Brk31MSGiKGYX2kr8lUPfb8ylWQ_GEql_9T9TF1haME_JCWQoMWrvphKKm3D38BlA6HT2wY1z4QOuzZdBmbIxnhEHvkSUmyiUj2n33SgztFXpCJHVBTZ-jOTmfziaPG6B3QxKFh8JnRLVU_KDZv-QyB5a8GTAZli09cOYj0hNE0-Kq3zbuuIyzZE222-Qi3udb4LlT0eIsXCWbSp2RQeWULFdkrJmvygb9oghlhpbAtJD8F-Z4KgVNLC1NhWED2_wt4t6eJLTKb4M_y8gy7J3dWkzXqHIVgk3KgGWsYb2re96vwWsxTl8XDQsMF_skrRSOCQlYHxkmSPI8YRZMjmTHJ_xRbNkYYSW5a_MMbeZgAoOmowPs93Isllrm_vk-mDSu7ddR2mcGS2Uil896GL6dV22VXg%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | Hi Friend, Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my SECOND debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will showcase the tremendous momentum we have gained since last quarter! I 'm hoping you'll consider pitching in a generous gift today! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " ** | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | These new planes will:
* Boost our nation’s security.
* Enhance the military’s ability to quickly respond to threats at home and abroad.
* Strengthen our local economy by solidifying the Air Force’s footprint in Minnesota.

While there’s lots of drama in DC, there are serious threats all over the world. As a Congressman, I’m choosing to focus on dealing with those threats, no matter what the professional politicians are doing to get their sound bites on TV.

clean_body: Finstad for Congress If you are unable to see the message below, . | | | | | | Friend - This is what results look like. In response to my letter urging them to choose Minnesota, the United States Air Force just selected Minnesota’s 133rd Airlift Wing as a preferred location to receive eight C-130J Super Hercules transport planes. | | | | | These new planes will: Boost our nation’s security. Enhance the military’s ability to quickly respond to threats at home and abroad. * Strengthen our local economy by solidifying the Air Force’s footprint in Minnesota. While there’s lots of drama in DC, there are serious threats all over the world. As a Congressman, I’m choosing to focus on dealing with those threats, no matter what the professional politicians are doing to get their sound bites on TV. Sincerely, Brad Finstad | | | | | | ---|--- | | PO Box 923New Ulm, MN 56073 | | | | |

body:

Friend,

We're two Navy SEALs who were elected to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives.

While we come from very different places and have different backgrounds, we learned as Navy SEALs to come together under one goal: **protecting our country**. And that's exactly what we're doing in Washington.

However, we can't keep doing this if we fall short of our goals. **We 're all independent, but a good soldier knows when to ask for help.**
**[We're kindly asking you to donate $24 in the next 10 minutes so that we can hit our deadline by midnight and keep fighting for our conservative values in Congress!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b3be9cbac894db2a9539cb9a7936900&_e=oe9Rb94aHGDg2sk5Z0sgJzaybySyIEmBLG1bhJ2hOWCOLuwtk2IDKFwKOY7JWedd50-l-P5ZHxXQoaDiBmwtwkBalMvO6OEQd1Kpwjg_EtUSYEOieVF5kNeaJ4Eip_kzprbqQ7L8vv7DeR96i6kkZ6JUk6ZD50Tv8rTyYCZK3TjmwX1xTmDeAFUS_Z-F9WEbuSJEL9MV_hqI1Y8sFxICYzitv-g4619Xoo3bz-utD4zuv7qAVNCiQAKzgFM8ojXbc-IVZT8G0KI-52FVkfbC1na8dfU0UJoJUy9-0FaqUC0cLBfPdmYxREwbRghlGq5woLkoXjzphLyoylZuh10bF3aBS2yRWFsAWtZF0zXjhEoDJ3PjF2_jPc4P2rb6-zcw5Pyg3pGtDpxm2TxGMIGByvyhwDiVYU2dDp9es6wxuFLOOx1jLsBb1O8BlNP1dM8t9qT1Se8cdb5F4hxC7aa9is4bgvYMXjJ01VZwpNFEZ-E%3D "We’re kindly asking you to donate $24 in the next 10 minutes so that we can hit our midnight deadline and keep fighting for our conservative values in Congress!")**
