The Democrats rely on coastal elites and Ivy Leaguers to keep their campaigns afloat. We rely on real grassroots folks like you who can give a few dollars here and there, Friend.

We're so thankful for anything you give to us today. Hitting these goals can be a slog some months, but having folks like you who we can count on makes it all that much easier.

Thank you,
Ret. Navy SEALs Derrick Van Orden and Ryan Zinke
---

* * *
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b3be9cbac894db2a9539cb9a7936900&_e=oe9Rb94aHGDg2sk5Z0sgJzaybySyIEmBLG1bhJ2hOWCOLuwtk2IDKFwKOY7JWeddLPhZ9mUWUxn1Rs2kj7cehkAJ7Lj1Cor2ed1EbepIXC5eJJVSm-rhIG_cVFOehi-z4xXU-bc_SfZwhNKJ8iPDW1ptK_8aZgV7emN1gqMc6vvdCoxhFqeI_-X9hvZkfufmsqsE4KjCd1zWZCVNRfdL5_V0eDeTx8EL5bMxhp2iMRJMFUwoNsUwvCuwu8y7EExHBBcHSNPnjvTgEkayEo5B0THfX-_mVuw5cP7ZxXUIDGxUEY0FEJ51g1W_KmyZL-hFrD_zD4QJ9gbT8lTJPhFMl3mll6hVhFN3g9GLmVBu3iKtEPfeHNvye27tzJ_64ONqQraFxmlF_hk__pLyvaCQ-jJISVD0LwXIUHpwk_Oc0drZU6LUvf0h_IYBkdtBXR7g2UexBn1gDCQNuC2qJj4oVw%3D%3D)
---

My story is simple. I was raised in rural poverty by a single mother on food stamps. At 18, I joined the Navy. After 26 years of service and 5 combat tours, I retired as a Navy SEAL Senior Chief. Now, I'm serving as a first-term Congressman for Wisconsin's 3rd District.

I'm not a swamp-dwelling politician - I don't have support from mega-donors or Super PACs. I'm just like you - **a concerned American who loves this nation and will always do the right thing.**

**[The Democrats are going at me with everything they've got, and I'll need all the help I can get to protect this seat. clean_body: We're two Navy SEALs who were elected to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives. | | | | | | "Van Orden and Zinke" Friend, We're two Navy SEALs who were elected to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives. While we come from very different places and have different backgrounds, we learned as Navy SEALs to come together under one goal: protecting our country. And that's exactly what we're doing in Washington. However, we can't keep doing this if we fall short of our goals. We 're all independent, but a good soldier knows when to ask for help. "We’re kindly asking you to donate $24 in the next 10 minutes so that we can hit our midnight deadline and keep fighting for our conservative values in Congress!" | | "DONATE $24 NOW >>" We're sure you get a lot of texts and emails in a day, but if you donate to just one today, please make it this one. Our team set up a page where you can send a 2-way donation to all of us in just one transaction to make it as easy as possible for you. | | "SEND IN A 2-WAY DONATION" The Democrats rely on coastal elites and Ivy Leaguers to keep their campaigns afloat. We rely on real grassroots folks like you who can give a few dollars here and there, Friend. We're so thankful for anything you give to us today. Hitting these goals can be a slog some months, but having folks like you who we can count on makes it all that much easier. Thank you, Ret. Navy SEALs Derrick Van Orden and Ryan Zinke | My story is simple. I was raised in rural poverty by a single mother on food stamps. At 18, I joined the Navy. After 26 years of service and 5 combat tours, I retired as a Navy SEAL Senior Chief. Now, I'm serving as a first-term Congressman for Wisconsin's 3rd District. I'm not a swamp-dwelling politician - I don't have support from mega-donors or Super PACs. I'm just like you - a concerned American who loves this nation and will always do the right thing. Hi Friend,

Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddb7adefe6594787b7dfad695b49d621&_e=OiiNbD1IjmTE7LivCeERLlc2vt5MSesY1Q1bGrX9uaf1ptBF6Fwl7Sn0IRMQ_RoIXZGEkBksvOGNDXk979BDui6aazoUb6NaDhsye0CxiWH28aU4LYodX_NwCLNzvVVIJbvJHodxduUu5Q6made4ifYQ6W2VMLR7AFpu2XAepAAADqaXI02k9y_VViGUGvOOhMgjB7LbPnAysz3TG5AGApmFNhIs7WII9AX80QRNjdVzej2qGmXyrFNcpTsDFbYGRAgb2nAZh69lczOPkSVJavEcmlc7OS394Y5KemzPGJS1exIYs7g8ntlQCB1TzIAB3XL1YWSzLBsCAEZdLQmQKf6jtovSGC3bn4utgytZepnlPEcpG4XZPcr-bt8ue8B0hRLRyzm0vZuDZoev62B3J-8ONVfuPC4LNgxjP499oyc0A6YMg6jw5vOUBnHSGpUdsAaQKeabYdFO-5ekxNmwcxjvdg10U5LUXymZA8vvY2iKOwvi2dpDGOwB44tX9KMvCAEbt0NFm8C2hNKXu1OwvpEMgBqqevqUd2qrLmPWPP_HWwEQP1y9ELQopXw252UFIFdSraY_pYWEOHBKpHhRMQH1MuXMzQ4ieNmDt05jtzF5vWngx-F_6cd507JqBi0PvC7TmFS7mwbzbzPztFVmNA%3D%3D "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddb7adefe6594787b7dfad695b49d621&_e=OiiNbD1IjmTE7LivCeERLlc2vt5MSesY1Q1bGrX9uaf1ptBF6Fwl7Sn0IRMQ_RoIXZGEkBksvOGNDXk979BDui6aazoUb6NaDhsye0CxiWH28aU4LYodX_NwCLNzvVVIJbvJHodxduUu5Q6made4ifYQ6W2VMLR7AFpu2XAepAAADqaXI02k9y_VViGUGvOOhMgjB7LbPnAysz3TG5AGApmFNhIs7WII9AX80QRNjdVzej2qGmXyrFNcpTsDFbYGRAgb2nAZh69lczOPkSVJavEcmlc7OS394Y5KemzPGJS1exIYs7g8ntlQCB1TzIAB3XL1YWSzLBsCAEZdLQmQKf6jtovSGC3bn4utgytZepnlPEcpG4XZPcr-bt8ue8B0hRLRyzm0vZuDZoev62B3J-8ONVfuPC4LNgxjP499oyc0A6YMg6jw5vOUBnHSGpUdsAaQKeabYdFO-5ekxNmwcxjvdg10U5LUXymZA8vvY2iKOwvi2dpDGOwB44tX9KMvmI7ULkFhDzJ-Czh-PTYJNx45e7csnQPuDmv2Lrh1av07KINpeYpUzIIi9iCcn_YnXUToWS-r-MBEtafTLi4hwg1Y2crIKRLI4i9iim5C3R69DWqLlLvBi0zPXNkjqL0J0kXGwXGFokc1v8pECkwCJw%3D%3D)

| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddb7adefe6594787b7dfad695b49d621&_e=OiiNbD1IjmTE7LivCeERLlc2vt5MSesY1Q1bGrX9uaf1ptBF6Fwl7Sn0IRMQ_RoIXZGEkBksvOGNDXk979BDui6aazoUb6NaDhsye0CxiWH28aU4LYodX_NwCLNzvVVIJbvJHodxduUu5Q6made4ifYQ6W2VMLR7AFpu2XAepAAADqaXI02k9y_VViGUGvOOhMgjB7LbPnAysz3TG5AGApmFNhIs7WII9AX80QRNjdVzej2qGmXyrFNcpTsDFbYGRAgb2nAZh69lczOPkSVJavEcmlc7OS394Y5KemzPGJS1exIYs7g8ntlQCB1TzIAB3XL1YWSzLBsCAEZdLQmQKf6jtovSGC3bn4utgytZepnlPEcpG4XZPcr-bt8ue8B0hRLRyzm0vZuDZoev62B3J-8ONVfuPC4LNgxjP499oyc0A6YMg6jw5vOUBnHSGpUdsAaQKeabYdFO-5ekxNmwcxjvdg10U5LUXymZA8vvY2iKOwvi2dpDGOwB44tX9KMvRXAyy8H6-LDvucH3QA5HQQn0eAx5D_s6LYDVg3uxqB4Q5H646tIiRGyPLVGcTcytVpcQIHw1_A83ql5zrAa5xnePlKWnIeAs6SMuUiT_3AGXW5BG-gh9K33Bt5YULckoW2Yxm81ceoNWo8CpVJX29w%3D%3D)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---

I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **SECOND** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!>>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddb7adefe6594787b7dfad695b49d621&_e=OiiNbD1IjmTE7LivCeERLlc2vt5MSesY1Q1bGrX9uaf1ptBF6Fwl7Sn0IRMQ_RoIXZGEkBksvOGNDXk979BDui6aazoUb6NaDhsye0CxiWH28aU4LYodX_NwCLNzvVVIJbvJHodxduUu5Q6made4ifYQ6W2VMLR7AFpu2XAepAAADqaXI02k9y_VViGUGvOOhMgjB7LbPnAysz3TG5AGApmFNhIs7WII9AX80QRNjdVzej2qGmXyrFNcpTsDFbYGRAgb2nAZh69lczOPkSVJavEcmlc7OS394Y5KemzPGJS1exIYs7g8ntlQCB1TzIAB3XL1YWSzLBsCAEZdLQmQKf6jtovSGC3bn4utgytZepnlPEcpG4XZPcr-bt8ue8B0hRLRyzm0vZuDZoev62B3J-8ONVfuPC4LNgxjP499oyc0A6YMg6jw5vOUBnHSGpUdsAaQKeabYdFO-5ekxNmwcxjvdg10U5LUXymZA8vvY2iKOwvi2dpDGOwB44tX9KMvTcM0L-ZLS4GCQH4nsSCwL1sBnzymrMNTdH-sWDbPKxwHjrpssjSQLOvc0xiTz6dY4yg1VKQyvUlxk42sNUdwdqkg3lEN668RpgymWQURtUjptzPuI7vxcHkPN6K58dgQbQAKm7qFJxWHa1h_nVgvsg%3D%3D "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> ")**

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | Hi Friend, Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my SECOND debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will showcase the tremendous momentum we have gained since last quarter! I 'm hoping you'll consider pitching in a generous gift today! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " ** | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. Dear Pro-Life Partner,

When I was in Milwaukee at the first Republican presidential debate of 2024 election cycle, it was clear to me which candidates are and are not prepared to be a National Defender of Life. As a supporter of the pro-life movement, I'm sure you noticed this too!

Some were bold in thier statements, sharing the plight of the unborn, and calling for pretections. Others had positions that were simply unacceptable.

Without a doubt, the pro-life issue will make a big impact on who the GOP nominee will be this election as 72% of Americans support abortion limits by no later than 15 weeks of a baby's development when they can feel pain.

**That's 7 in 10 Americans speaking up for the pro-life cause and standing up for protections of the unborn and their mothers. We have the majortiy voice. But there's a problem.

** Several of the Republican candidates keep playing a game of defense rather than offensively attacking the issue with the same vehemence our opponents across the aisle are. Big Abortion and its extremists in American halls of power work hard every day to gain ground in this fight. We must offensively fight harder in the same battle over the next 12 months as we see the very fabric of our country changing before our eyes.

So who in your opinion will be the best National Defender of life? Who would you select to go head to head with the extreme abortion agenda and fight for the unborn in our contry?

**Take our poll at the link below and let us know which pro-life candidate is our next National Defender of Life!

clean_body: Some were bold in thier statements, sharing the plight of the unborn, and calling for pretections Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda! | | | | | | | Dear Pro-Life Partner, When I was in Milwaukee at the first Republican presidential debate of 2024 election cycle, it was clear to me which candidates are and are not prepared to be a National Defender of Life. As a supporter of the pro-life movement, I'm sure you noticed this too! Some were bold in thier statements, sharing the plight of the unborn, and calling for pretections. Others had positions that were simply unacceptable. Without a doubt, the pro-life issue will make a big impact on who the GOP nominee will be this election as 72% of Americans support abortion limits by no later than 15 weeks of a baby's development when they can feel pain. That's 7 in 10 Americans speaking up for the pro-life cause and standing up for protections of the unborn and their mothers. We have the majortiy voice. But there's a problem. Several of the Republican candidates keep playing a game of defense rather than offensively attacking the issue with the same vehemence our opponents across the aisle are. Big Abortion and its extremists in American halls of power work hard every day to gain ground in this fight. We must offensively fight harder in the same battle over the next 12 months as we see the very fabric of our country changing before our eyes. So who in your opinion will be the best National Defender of life? Who would you select to go head to head with the extreme abortion agenda and fight for the unborn in our contry? Take our poll at the link below and let us know which pro-life candidate is our next National Defender of Life! hope you'll take just 1-minute and share your view on this critical topic. Make your voice heard as we head into the 2024 election cycle. | | | | In these unprecedented times of uncertainty and extremism, we must be the voice of reason for the unbourn and their mothers in our country. For LIFE, Marjorie Dannenfelser President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America | | I think the next National defender of Life will be: | Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803 Arlington, VA, 22206 Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b0a2b1aec0b64bc084bfc204c84bbebb&_e=2waKuNYUQgbyqMG-E8rtbiAv47UyOpXfbMCBYbGFJNp0pFUSwv3Jsk_eSO3HJiCPLv5QT7eOS-Z3_9A8ijoP4PqNz9TfkqAiLYOqTUs0B06wcpkfxI7DXr7OBpiUelggh2jHtEGwEtY5vG_VZcbO76xXjsFaXlUNMQ-87gBYaOypAdSHuN5k3moRpgAZn1BCaRghvyKZ002nB2NGqGLH52dOAwRJfon_EYcmU5owSKSA5pwx0N_FLLl5nu-11sKo35W76REDQq3rzilhAnYo2_Si0q4k0QEHeAD4J4XVI-eK_ux11l-FM1LnpPHnIacCxzKH18AKck3Duj6ZNcxYuhHgp8oFkPrv3Ffv9x0uBR23VcLP0xANGhFCXGmVn9qmfy3-Drd1VBUwKU4klyliFKtGm3oKx5hbg_OED8b1JL0%3D)

Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

# **Financial Freedom in America**
# **will soon be gone!**

**The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.** On November 15th, 2022, the Federal Reserve announced they are now testing the **'digital dollar'.** They'll be joined by major banks like Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo. **And you should be scared!** The 'digital dollar' puts all your money in the hands of the government. They'll be able to....
* **Know what's in your accounts and what you buy**
* **Limit what you purchase and the causes you support**
* **Take everything away with the click of a button**

I'm reaching out with an urgent plea from the All On The Line team. The fight for fair maps in Alabama, Georgia, and Louisiana is at a tipping point, and we need your support now more than ever.
[**Envision this: a map, lines drawn, and the stakes soaring.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70851438/430507326/-905915377?refcode=20230930_AOTL_F_BadMaps_RedLite_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjNTlhYTVkLWU0NjEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bOaFX2MV-ng8xZVnraSR9ORhDusKWMKmKn2j98hAjS4=)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70851439/430507328/-905915377?refcode=20230930_AOTL_F_BadMaps_RedLite_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjNTlhYTVkLWU0NjEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bOaFX2MV-ng8xZVnraSR9ORhDusKWMKmKn2j98hAjS4=)
---
Recently, in three Southern states, conservative-led legislatures have tried to argue against federal court rulings on congressional maps that help ensure that every voice is not only heard but also counted. The stakes of redistricting transcend politics; it's a fight for justice, equality, for democracy itself.
* * *
[**But have you caught wind of the latest developments this week?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70851441/430507329/-905915377?refcode=20230930_AOTL_F_BadMaps_RedLite_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjNTlhYTVkLWU0NjEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bOaFX2MV-ng8xZVnraSR9ORhDusKWMKmKn2j98hAjS4=)
**#1** \-- The Supreme Court denied Alabama’s desperate effort to stop the remedial map-drawing process.
**#2** \-- The special master has released Alabama’s remedial maps without delay.
* * *
Our adversaries are using every tactic in the book to delay change, hoping to maintain an unfair status quo. Just like a river that meanders, they seek to bend the course of justice away from the very communities that deserve fair representation.
But we won't back down. We've seen the power of grassroots support, the strength of individuals coming together for a common cause. [**With support from grassroots activists like you, we can amplify the voices of communities of color, ensuring they're not silenced. Rush your end-of-month donation today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70851443/430507331/-905915377?refcode=20230930_AOTL_F_BadMaps_RedLite_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjNTlhYTVkLWU0NjEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bOaFX2MV-ng8xZVnraSR9ORhDusKWMKmKn2j98hAjS4=)

clean_body: | Friend, I'm reaching out with an urgent plea from the All On The Line team. The fight for fair maps in Alabama, Georgia, and Louisiana is at a tipping point, and we need your support now more than ever. = = Recently, in three Southern states, conservative-led legislatures have tried to argue against federal court rulings on congressional maps that help ensure that every voice is not only heard but also counted. The stakes of redistricting transcend politics; it's a fight for justice, equality, for democracy itself. = #1 \-- The Supreme Court denied Alabama’s desperate effort to stop the remedial map-drawing process. #2 \-- The special master has released Alabama’s remedial maps without delay. Our adversaries are using every tactic in the book to delay change, hoping to maintain an unfair status quo. Just like a river that meanders, they seek to bend the course of justice away from the very communities that deserve fair representation. But we won't back down. We've seen the power of grassroots support, the strength of individuals coming together for a common cause. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Your contribution will energize our fight for fair maps, backing our redistricting fight as we respond to court rulings, support mapping efforts, and mobilize in communities, all of which will help shape the future of democracy in these three states and beyond. Just like the Southern sun that rises, so too shall our determination. Let's be the beacon of hope for those who have been marginalized for too long. = \-- Fred Gifford Director, Mapping & Geospatial Analytics All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. | | **YOUR SIGNATURE IS NEEDED: Plastic is overwhelming our planet, destroying our oceans, and putting people at risk — but the U.S. government has NOT taken bold enough action! [ _Add your name to demand federal solutions to the plastic crisis NOW >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2028408?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** **_Wouldn’t it be wonderful to be a sea turtle swimming through the open ocean, Friend?_** Just imagine flapping your flippers while gliding across the gentle current just below the waves... Sea turtles are easily one of the most beloved marine animals, and our oceans just wouldn’t be the same without these treasured reptiles. But sadly, nearly all species of this precious animal are classified as _**vulnerable, endangered, or even critically endangered**_ — meaning sea turtles are at serious risk of ** __EXTINCTION.__ ** **Human impact is one of the single biggest causes of sea turtles deaths** — and that includes __**PLASTIC POLLUTION**__ , which is responsible for killing **OVER A MILLION marine species every year**. _Friend, sea turtles and other vulnerable marine animals need you to speak for them today in defense of our precious oceans:_[_**Will you add your name right now to SAVE sea turtles and PROTECT our oceans from rampant plastic pollution?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2028409?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2028410?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Just one single piece of plastic can KILL a sea turtle.** Plastic poses a threat to sea turtles at _every stage of life_ — from crawling through plastic waste on the beach as hatchlings, to swimming through it, to mistaking it for food. These innocent sea turtles become _**entangled, suffocate, and often choke and die**_ from all the rampant plastic overtaking the ocean.
**_EVERY SINGLE MINUTE_** , an entire garbage truck’s worth of plastic is washed into our oceans, threatening to **WIPE OUT** precious marine life like dolphins, sea turtles, and coral reefs. Friend, if plastic pollution continues at this rate, it could literally _destroy our entire planet_ in what experts are calling the _**PLASTIC APOCALYPSE.**_
Meanwhile, greedy plastic corporations and their friends in the fossil fuel industry continue to rake in profits without any regard for their environmental destruction. Massive plastics factories spew alarming amounts of **toxic pollutants and global-warming emissions into our atmosphere** , disproportionately leaving the nearby communities of color to bear the brunt of the **serious health risks**.
Friend, we can’t let Big Plastic and Big Oil continue putting our planet in danger. But time is running out to __**STOP THE PLASTIC APOCALYPSE**__ — and it’s going to take** _A LOT_** of grassroots willpower to convince the Biden administration to stand up to these powerful industries. That’s why we need **5,103 more activist signatures** on our petition by **11:59 P.M. TONIGHT** if we’re going to have a strong enough impact. [ _**Can we count on you to sign our urgent plastic pollution petition right away?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2028411?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2028410?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for your urgent action,
Friends of the Earth **
|

body:
Support our friends at Yankee Institute and Get Connecticut Working Again | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=9b3ee07f1f)

|
---
|
---
**Let Connecticut****Work Conference**
|
---

**Why Your Attendance Matters** Small and medium-sized businesses are crucial to Connecticut’s health and well-being. They are job creators and taxpayers — without them, our state cannot prosper.
Big businesses can afford new taxes and new regulations; when they can’t, they hire expensive lobbyists to fight their battles. None of this is true for small and medium-sized businesses — the backbone of our communities. Where do they turn? **At Yankee Institute, we have long fought to give a voice to the voiceless in Connecticut. And that means not just individuals but the small and medium-sized businesses that make our economy work.** Yankee Institute’s common sense solutions drive positive legislative results, backed by a principled commitment to free enterprise. But it takes all of us to “Let Connecticut Work!” Come meet other Connecticut businesspeople and policymakers. Be part of a community uniting to make our state a more vibrant place for businesses. This is your chance to be heard!
**Lets Support Yankee Institute and their great work!**
**SEE YOU THURSDAY**
| [Register for the Conference ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=d24e19d558&e=8763c56857)

###
2WINCT is partnered with Freedom Project USA to build a coalition of conservatives across Connecticut. We are committed to Constitutional principles that will reflect in our mission of recruiting and developing strong, conservative candidates; identifying and fighting for key issues that impinge on our freedoms; and to create branding and messaging programs that illustrate our values as citizens of Connecticut.
Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success.

clean_body: Support our friends at Yankee Institute and Get Connecticut Working Again | | | | | | | Let ConnecticutWork Conference | Why Your Attendance Matters Small and medium-sized businesses are crucial to Connecticut’s health and well-being. They are job creators and taxpayers — without them, our state cannot prosper. Big businesses can afford new taxes and new regulations; when they can’t, they hire expensive lobbyists to fight their battles. None of this is true for small and medium-sized businesses — the backbone of our communities. Where do they turn? At Yankee Institute, we have long fought to give a voice to the voiceless in Connecticut. And that means not just individuals but the small and medium-sized businesses that make our economy work. Yankee Institute’s common sense solutions drive positive legislative results, backed by a principled commitment to free enterprise. But it takes all of us to “Let Connecticut Work!” Come meet other Connecticut businesspeople and policymakers. Be part of a community uniting to make our state a more vibrant place for businesses. This is your chance to be heard! Lets Support Yankee Institute and their great work! SEE YOU THURSDAY | | | | | | 2WINCT is partnered with Freedom Project USA to build a coalition of conservatives across Connecticut. We are committed to Constitutional principles that will reflect in our mission of recruiting and developing strong, conservative candidates; identifying and fighting for key issues that impinge on our freedoms; and to create branding and messaging programs that illustrate our values as citizens of Connecticut. Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success. | | | | | ---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2023 Dominic For CT. body:
We're excited to announce our emcee and special guest Yvette Nicole Brown

Honoring and celebrating the legacy of Cleveland’s own Congressman Louis Stokes, Congresswoman Stephanie Tubbs Jones, and Secretary Marcia L. Fudge.
Peter,
**We’re excited to announce our emcee and special guest for this year's event, Yvette Nicole Brown!** Yvette is an Emmy-nominated actress, writer, producer and host best known for her roles on the television shows: "Community", "The Mayor", "Drake and Josh", "The Odd Couple", "Big Shot" and currently Bounce’s "Act Your Age" and films including "Dreamgirls" “Tropic Thunder", "Avengers: Endgame" and Disney's "Disenchanted." She is also a 2020 NAACP Image Award Nominated writer for "Always A Bridesmaid" — the Romantic Comedy she penned and Executive Produced that is streaming on Netflix and BET+. Yvette sits on the National Boards of Donors Choose (where she is Vice Chair), EMILY's List, MPTF Next Gen and SAG-AFTRA and is also a caregiver and advocate.

Join us on **Friday, October 13, from 7-10 pm at the Huntington Convention Center of Cleveland **for an all-black attire reception honoring and celebrating the legacy of Cleveland’s own Congressman Louis Stokes, Congresswoman Stephanie Tubbs Jones, and Secretary Marcia L. Fudge. Happy to slap handcuffs on him. Read more >>>

Friend, On Saturday, Rep. Jamaal Bowman (D-NY 16th District) was **_CAUGHT ON CAMERA pulling the fire alarm_ **in a House Office Building to delay the vote on a funding bill that would keep the government open until November 17th. His actions prevented us from doing the people's work. IF TRUE: he should be charged with obstructing an official proceeding, which is a FELONY. As a former Sheriff, I’d happily slap the cuffs on him...Jamaal, are you ready? The House Ethics Committee should investigate, get to the bottom of this, and hold Rep. Bowman accountable – do you agree?** ****If so, please show your support for an investigation by pitching in $16 or more to help me show New York’s 16th District that no one is above the law!**

name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT
subject: Back the Blue
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDMzMDQifQ/cStty73mENaDn_Cwm5Tl1g)
---
Fellow American, **I am so grateful for our police officers. ** As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. **[Please join me in thanking uniformed men and women by signing our 'Back the Blue Petition' and letting brave officers know that we are grateful for their service and sacrifice.](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDMzMDQifQ/82juJPQnt87uUdPNZEvaCw)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDMzMDQifQ/OUxZ5EMDg6cFiBh8rRAKcg)
---
Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to "_defund the police_." I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT - an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. **Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. ** **[To join these chapters and stand with police officers, please sign the national petition today.](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDMzMDQifQ/DzeKXR0smYEdrmakDD-eJA)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDMzMDQifQ/kSScvrYhlYJ3Nf6FjJa-Sg)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDMzMDQifQ/Fh1JYyprvC06136w1z_VGA)
---
_This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city's police force._
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDMzMDQifQ/V7uc3j0nd7gyPMGUTT3jPw)
---
_The first state chapter - BLEXIT North Carolina - paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT's appreciation._
---
**[If you 'Back the Blue' - and believe that we must support local heroes - please sign the national petition right away.](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDMzMDQifQ/vvuce_O9PLQZewYQMKFePg)** While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them - polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals - those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. **We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. ** If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. **[Join me in letting our police officers know that you support law and order, justice, and their valiant efforts to keep our communities safe.](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDMzMDQifQ/i3U45CbQBpJYjZVhkLboWA)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDMzMDQifQ/7Qe3PN3POPQP6bdxAciwPA)
---
Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjc2LTNlN2MyNTg3ZjJlNDQ0MTg5MzM0MTAwZTMzZDgzNTYzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/JIAIcq6QQZ5En8XZdUwp8Q) to unsubscribe.
---
clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow American, I am so grateful for our police officers. As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to "defund the police." I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT - an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city's police force. The first state chapter - BLEXIT North Carolina - paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT's appreciation. While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them - polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals - those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4fd761bafd9f3abc6143f3a165fea492fba7cd5d1404fc0b44c98017216979b6878546ec64e9ce64610fdb712842b80dd7a569db8730fbfd48cd5e5d197fad19
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4fd761bafd9f3abc1854c8a457ffceb04b7cbd3ab5eafdec1e2ae2b8635cea7c85b5a625e75c85e6824ee62e0054fa423c7f87d1a9208538451855b1ea44a177

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4fd761bafd9f3abc1854c8a457ffceb04b7cbd3ab5eafdec1e2ae2b8635cea7c85b5a625e75c85e6824ee62e0054fa423c7f87d1a9208538451855b1ea44a177

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Survey Alert 📝 We've got two missions: 1) Earning your support to help Ron DeSantis defeat Joe Biden in November 2024. 2) Making sure you understand how much we appreciate the incredible impact you're making. We're seeking your input today to help us achieve mission #2. Will you respond to this survey to let us know which issues you want us to keep you updated on? We're committed to making sure you're getting exactly the kind of content you're interested in. TAKE THE SURVEY 📝 ☐ Revitalizing the economy ☐ Saving our education system ☐ Standing up to the Chinese Communist Party ☐ Fighting against woke ideology ☐ Securing our border ☐ Fighting against mask/vaccine mandates and lockdowns ☐ Restoring our American energy dominance ☐ Standing up for parents’ rights ☐ Making sure our military puts the mission first ☐ Protecting the unborn ☐ Keeping tabs on Joe Biden and his failures ☐ Defending religious freedom in America ☐ Seeing what the media is saying about the campaign ☐ Restoring law and order over riots and disorder *Note: you can select as many as you want! We're excited to keep you in the loop about everything that matters most to you, Peter. We hope you'll let us know what you want to see! RESPOND HERE In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Peter, will you personally endorse Ruben Gallego before Kari Lake gets in?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
This is no ordinary ask
#

Peter -
One week from today, Kari Lake will officially announce she is running for the United States Senate in Arizona.
When she does it, she will likely have the support of President Trump and their legions of MAGA-right followers across the country.
So we need to ask you to do something important today to make sure Democrats hold this seat and keep Kari Lake OUT of the Senate.
[**Can you add your name to say you personally endorse Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate in Arizona? It's a small and simple act, but after our last FEC deadline it will speak volumes about the strength of our campaign.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_oct23/?source=em231003-1-15&refcode2=1306.734936.J6kjSQ&akid=1306%2E734936%2EJ6kjSQ)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_oct23/?source=em231003-1-15&refcode2=1306.734936.J6kjSQ&akid=1306%2E734936%2EJ6kjSQ)
Here's why this is important. Please give it some thought:
Winning this race will require us to unite Democrats behind our effort, and that includes national Democrats whose endorsements matter.
They don't want to be on the opposite side of a campaign that has broad grassroots appeal.
That's where these endorsements come in. When Ruben has these conversations, this is the story he is telling: the polls, the money and the grassroots support.
That starts with people like you. So please:
[**Use this link to add your name as a personal endorser of Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate in Arizona. It's a small act that means a big deal to our chances.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_oct23/?source=em231003-1-15&refcode2=1306.734936.J6kjSQ&akid=1306%2E734936%2EJ6kjSQ)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_oct23/?source=em231003-1-15&refcode2=1306.734936.J6kjSQ&akid=1306%2E734936%2EJ6kjSQ)
Thank you. Together we can win this race and keep Kari Lake out of the Senate.
Ruben Gallego for Arizona
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_oct23/?source=em231003-1-15&refcode2=1306.734936.J6kjSQ&akid=1306%2E734936%2EJ6kjSQ)

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=1306%2E734936%2EJ6kjSQ). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1306_734936_J6kjSQ&akid=1306%2E734936%2EJ6kjSQ)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
I have written a book

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z261p5rvkeci2idg42t73mu86kbetcittfk7givg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cpimcp72cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfc3ahecfc8fj1tbhmgf855qf1rvb8iq7pstb5mg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cpimcp72cjh2bs) But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge** , I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq31eljojcven3a8prc4ah126v03pp5tq556qel8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cpimcp72cjh2bs) Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zunfp93aa1umh40ma62o6ttkfoss1c2v7dtrs4do_rp22sh2s8i66p73cpimcp72cjh2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

American Action News
---

name: Team Cruz
subject: Team Cruz Grassroots Newsletter >> October 3, 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._6VAsHkQ)
---
**IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ...** **[Ted Cruz Blasts Biden’s Border Crisis: Democrats Do Not Give A Damn:](http://trk.tedcruz.) **"Republican Texas Sen. Ted Cruz blasted President Joe Biden’s border crisis on Monday in an episode of his “Verdict with Ted Cruz” podcast. The senator said that “Democrats do not give a damn” about the influx of illegal immigrants that have crossed the border, including got-aways who escaped Border Patrol and vanished into the United States. “So, 50,000 in 2020. One year later, August of 2021, 209,840. So, it’s increased 400%,” Cruz said. “So, it stays up four x where it was under Trump, and how about August of 2023, they just released the numbers: 232,972..." **[NSSF Applauds Sen. Ted Cruz for Addressing Banking Discrimination Of Firearms Industry:](http://trk.tedcruz.) **"The Firearm Industry Trade Association, applauds U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) for directly addressing the ongoing and illegal discrimination of the firearm industry by major banks and payment processors. Fox Business reported on this continued discriminatory practice of major banking institutions and payment processors refusing services because officials in those financial sectors politically disagree with Second Amendment rights. “Discrimination against firearm manufacturers and retailers is not a new phenomenon..." **[Why Are Gun Companies Losing Payroll Services? Cruz Investigation Finds Underlying Culprit:](http://trk.tedcruz._N3Kg) **"JPMorgan Chase admitted to pressuring the financial software company Intuit into preventing gun sellers from using the company’s payment processing services, according to a letter Sen. Ted Cruz sent Monday after looking into the policy. Bank of America, meanwhile, denied pressuring Intuit into banning gun manufacturers from using its famous QuickBooks software.“Woke big banks are increasingly weaponizing their power to cut off law-abiding businesses from accessing banking services,” Cruz, R-Texas, told The Daily..." **[Sen. Cruz Leads Bipartisan Effort to Combat China’s Influence Over Americas:](http://trk.tedcruz.) **"A bipartisan group of senators, led by Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, wants the United States to team up with democratic nations in South America, Central America and the Caribbean to combat the influence of China. The coalition is set to introduce a resolution, the details of which were first shared with The Messenger, calling on the U.S. to develop deeper ties with the Alliance for Development in Democracy (ADD), a joint effort by the Dominican Republic, Panama, Costa Rica and Ecuador to promote democracy and economic growth in the regions..." **[Sen. Ted Cruz Says There Is No Domestic Issue He Cares More About Than School Choice:](http://trk.tedcruz.) **"U.S. Senator Ted Cruz, R-Texas, told a lively crowd at the Paramount Theater on Saturday “there is no domestic issue I care more about than school choice.” Cruz, who is seeking a third term in the U.S. Senate in 2024, answered questions posed by Texas Tribune Political Reporter Patrick Svitek about several hot topics Texans care about during a TribFest appearance. “I look at every vote the state legislature has taken on ‘school choice.’ If you’re a state legislator [who] voted in favor of ‘choice,’ and you are otherwise relatively conservative..."

_**Last Chance: Take Our Team Cruz Hannity Survey**_
---
My team has put together a new Fall 2023 10-Question Team Cruz Issues Survey, and I wanted to get in touch directly to ask you to complete it! These questions are all based on my conversation with Sean Hannity this week on Hannity.
---
**1\. Is the Biden Family Corruption Scandal a big issue for voters in your area? ** **2\. Do you agree that the Democrats have a structural problem?** **3\. More than 2/3 of Americans recognize that ‘Bidenomics’ has made life harder for working men and women. Are you part of that 2/3? ** **4\. Has the cost of skyrocketing inflation impacted you in your daily life? ** **5\. Do you think the Democrats are seeking to replace Joe Biden and Kamala Harris? ** **6\. Every year this chaos becomes a new record, which concerns you the most? ** **7\. Do most people in your area agree that Biden and the Democrats’ have put us on the wrong track? ** **8\. Did you hear about my ‘Secure The Border Act of 2023’? ** **9\. Do you plan to vote in the 2024 Elections? ** **10\. Can I count on you to help me Keep Texas Red in November 2024 and Flip the United States Senate Red? **
---
Take the survey here: **[https://secure.winred.com/ted-cruz/hannity-survey](http://trk.tedcruz._0Kis78UohQw-Uia_MFDkw)**

Senator Vance has been productive making waves in Washington. Read below to see what he's been up to!****[****](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9d04ea9288ba41d991c791b9e81440b0&_e=ErkJAVyFRkg8rJbhoaJ4YzjKUrWQJ5-yAkT7HoZON9tbVNHvbzkbrDgs2e963UrF8wEPjHPZWPyUtbiXlCVRMEIdbaiL_e3MYS6miNmeM79ImaiMZlfV7fpDkctqqKYY2v-OYmgE-B4Zo66lY8L7dC8A1_HNFCAM95LnSvyX09PBR9TC2zVt29EMIU067srk4qwKH-z4ZThemjVze0SUw0qDcgmG5E-Q86xBcMDCYatjE7qZz-ONOwMcLuGfy0dmakJqwMJaeaUoSxtERRXBKozkAIEYxhW7fn9Bf5ecIzNIhSG53jv4Kk3-t4i5jexMFeLu59wCRB_-EsYit-XZ4w%3D%3D)**' DECADES OF FAILED LEADERSHIP IN WASHINGTON AND IN THE BOARDROOM HAVE LAID WASTE TO PROUD MANUFACTURING COMMUNITIES' **([Toledo Blade](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9d04ea9288ba41d991c791b9e81440b0&_e=ErkJAVyFRkg8rJbhoaJ4YzjKUrWQJ5-yAkT7HoZON9tbVNHvbzkbrDgs2e963UrF8wEPjHPZWPyUtbiXlCVRMEIdbaiL_e3MYS6miNmeM79ImaiMZlfV7fpDkctqqKYY2v-OYmgE-B4Zo66lY8L7dC8A1_HNFCAM95LnSvyX09PBR9TC2zVt29EMIU067srkVGNSLijHWZ09SbZTYfbzPLV-FuhEAUZ-MmPyiUP4VPLt7bFuY8-r60OBm5qhi78-UOm2Nx11NBOrcQ9eY3V2JPSC0uD-YT5us91XQfYgYGBYKtmerxk7KQhgWSitMWOjGVKj71W8fHhbkNf4unI6vQ%3D%3D)) - "Ohioans that I speak with justifiably wish to see a course correction. But instead of pumping the brakes, the Biden administration is doubling down on EVs and driving our auto industry straight off a cliff. The editors pointed it out themselves: "In less than 10 years two-thirds of the autos sold need to be electric powered according to current government mandates." "The numbers show that the government-mandated shift to electric vehicles has been a disaster, and the numbers have been significantly propped up by taxpayer subsidies for EVs. But no amount of government underwriting will outweigh such unsustainable losses over the long term. It is time for a reckoning in the auto industry and at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue." Read Senator Vance's entire piece [here](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9d04ea9288ba41d991c791b9e81440b0&_e=ErkJAVyFRkg8rJbhoaJ4YzjKUrWQJ5-yAkT7HoZON9tbVNHvbzkbrDgs2e963UrF8wEPjHPZWPyUtbiXlCVRMEIdbaiL_e3MYS6miNmeM79ImaiMZlfV7fpDkctqqKYY2v-OYmgE-B4Zo66lY8L7dC8A1_HNFCAM95LnSvyX09PBR9TC2zVt29EMIU067srksJ6-B6EL6KITb2_xv8crorH3tBiUPwgAi6juA_2KHB4Y1uhzBZlxn-Qn9G_vraBkEj0zv4-8p2HZzCiB7hXQKNUcme2DqKekcjH5Q9R8l-nNE1zXOlRGoKatUy-1rGJPu-6-l9_8TDewEXp1Itb7kw%3D%3D). ****[****](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9d04ea9288ba41d991c791b9e81440b0&_e=ErkJAVyFRkg8rJbhoaJ4Y-Lr-IEmYGI1aQvRI2GwP7d-usKxcmbz2ZbTptjNs4AGDKegyCwVoOTYY4PFQ9yXGDil-IhPN4wHarShk_qLJKbChEDHuVHDUg5plyDU2w5AljCkR7atZjFO86dvrNSHHwowT9LSpXHTJ-mJnloT4MASQKStQJRiBWUn_gxQQ5-6Iahrz-WUM7Vg-KbkgosNHZrm5TmZMxU1KI4-yM7_CwhIPvAd3WkxrVVSgtaGkXgW) **' IF WE'RE SUBSIDIZING ANYTHING, IT OUGHT TO BE THE WAGES OF OHIO WORKERS' **([Daily Caller](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9d04ea9288ba41d991c791b9e81440b0&_e=ErkJAVyFRkg8rJbhoaJ4Y-Lr-IEmYGI1aQvRI2GwP7d-usKxcmbz2ZbTptjNs4AGDKegyCwVoOTYY4PFQ9yXGDil-IhPN4wHarShk_qLJKYMw9h1uDyDovYnXSTiD91xLL5vPMvuZgIVYpxiUwPYQDX6ROVrTpTlePL1Lzb_dQ_kiuAFMwn2pM0juPuxfpAIXHdSfGGtKRUkPsJ_o3rMLZhtdQAaDgeGcvsMuff67R3AINVaLSfTpw8OyuRvAy9B)) -- Republican Ohio Sen. J.D. Vance will introduce a piece of legislation Thursday that is aimed at eliminating electric vehicle subsidies established under the Biden administration as well as promoting domestic auto manufacturing. President Joe Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) in August 2022, which allocated millions to combating climate change and other energy provisions while additionally establishing a $7,500 tax credit for electric vehicles. The bill, first obtained by the Daily Caller, will repeal a series of EV tax credits created or expanded under the IRA such as the Clean Vehicle credit and a credit for previously owned electric vehicles. "Right now, the official policy of the Biden administration is to spend billions of dollars on subsidies for electric vehicles made overseas," Vance told the Daily Caller. "If we're subsidizing anything, it ought to be the wages of Ohio workers - not the green energy daydreams that are offshoring their jobs to China. We can secure a bright future for the American auto industry by passing this legislation, giving workers a much-needed raise, and reversing the misguided policies of the Biden administration." Read the entire _Daily Caller_ piece [here](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9d04ea9288ba41d991c791b9e81440b0&_e=ErkJAVyFRkg8rJbhoaJ4Y-Lr-IEmYGI1aQvRI2GwP7d-usKxcmbz2ZbTptjNs4AGDKegyCwVoOTYY4PFQ9yXGDil-IhPN4wHarShk_qLJKZiYr943CqnMx2itZAhMe4Ocxjrb7usvbxz0XLWlKjublDU-lNdRtw9t1pFxkWVJoYvE68Zdev6Cuo0dMzevOTN6jy992pvyi_xyyU7970FqikBPR7nwdnPPB5ZmSdcPovS1o8Ho3DPpHr_Pye_QQJ6). ****[****](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9d04ea9288ba41d991c791b9e81440b0&_e=ErkJAVyFRkg8rJbhoaJ4Y_urmlFvKwmxgUC2lm40WF37iMpVNxwb-R-e9Iqzw37lfKw8ODYxIj7uiEhj0v8YWxrhW4oeKNfu6YdDzunH4LD_DPm1k7U8Jdqx8GHNDrLNcm1hMRnvsxf4Tcg2CC24egdsTOcBmlBMUBzmBXAPoYHNrBHOWWMrPtuShZHIOcUcXR5eOHmfy7yEfimeAugCQaroa_Jy9qidSzNY3Dgc_lIzCoukmztO1W9HHxz-fmUyYWQTLU-puR9WmoaZ9F4UHdB_acBvEcwqkRSnWzbGuy2H0y3Y2lQLiRETnc944f0Xhf8mOXrOTsYGU-QfVsctc6K_cCo-l4MNGDmexUCYP6M%3D)**' WE CAN SECURE A BRIGHT FUTURE FOR AMERICAN WORKERS BY PASSING THIS LEGISLATION AND REVERSING THE MISGUIDED POLICIES OF THE BIDEN ADMINISTRATION' **([Breitbart](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9d04ea9288ba41d991c791b9e81440b0&_e=ErkJAVyFRkg8rJbhoaJ4Y_urmlFvKwmxgUC2lm40WF37iMpVNxwb-R-e9Iqzw37lfKw8ODYxIj7uiEhj0v8YWxrhW4oeKNfu6YdDzunH4LD_DPm1k7U8Jdqx8GHNDrLNcm1hMRnvsxf4Tcg2CC24egdsTOcBmlBMUBzmBXAPoYHNrBHOWWMrPtuShZHIOcUcXJEfNk5MvAT6D5mlv71P-3qmBvDPvqK93fdHl-8VFj68Bt9l47Lch5-7I42cBJD5FFvH1GKNA1NVV6-llu-IWAGNuwfGtRWP_HnINSrsYXL6_VyVbpwlhZO3dsyJWEgG6qgZ7VAZZCvCgx5eW3SlMx-22QUFgYCtM6QH9LjrdDE%3D)) -- Sen. J.D. Vance (R-OH) wants to offer much-needed wage hikes to American auto workers by replacing President Joe Biden's Electric Vehicle (EV) mandates with tax credits for gas-powered cars made in the United States at high-wage plants. Vance's "Drive American Act" would eliminate more than $100 billion in EV subsidies from the Biden administration and replace them with the "America First Vehicle Credit." J.D. Vance of Ohio accused Gary Gensler, the nation's foremost financial regulator of using its enforcement powers to harass former President Donald Trump. Vance alleged that Gensler, chair of the Securities and Exchange Commission, had hired partisan Democrats "who seem to have a vendetta against the former president," including enforcement division director Gurbir Grewal, the former Democratic Attorney General of New York, who investigated the former president in that capacity. "It looks more and more like not an impartial regulatory body, protecting investors and consumers, but a regulatory body that's using its power to silence and immiserate political rivals of the current president of the United States," Vance said. Read _Market Watch 's _entire article [here](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9d04ea9288ba41d991c791b9e81440b0&_e=ErkJAVyFRkg8rJbhoaJ4Y2px51Oi4SFooIwBXq-eYbyCTQ6Ckexhd2ZUqSwHgdDewV-GGX-TMgDIQF2O-kmi_VLEPM8U86TFfMbvvijZxTCPOGYePAYsAqi8XJLoToOXwDud5T2Ekz9AJlpfIDhFmHUenxSGH1JNHLQpVfl3Qm8yvi2JdTHYV1mxIrGozAwua4HUrT_4ILQNZc-FdmXhlJ66ydyNB37GII7i3X-Xai-oZjHzQP7xF8l-nFMek1euqvFGzqUzHjIQZI2ZS8pJkiUiJ12UdrGHBbT0L5LrHpaNUNL3wXL4olBgBwrvBuWN-WcQXawC8Y-k8wvylO7D8lGKtwYxQu9Mpftw3SBH7rQ%3D). THE REALIST RIGHT SHOULD TAKE THEIR CUES FROM VANCE.' **([The American Conservative](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9d04ea9288ba41d991c791b9e81440b0&_e=ErkJAVyFRkg8rJbhoaJ4Y6PIr9U1HyDc48p2ZKmCaR2g-3ibMdFe_IGqgJp-RomXV6Co_nkAJ4cYq7gcYtb0WptS5gyT0hsrsKq9au2t8MBU2ErSg7nZ26C7_pTcFEh59fK69fbVaCJdMP5UN8jjyC9bpr1AW6BpszzHFiFTsITO5CdpUhRCcHMSJQCisrLm3hLqnSQ-_QwayT98EITXwg2AJHys8jnMx97ukmDj6DhHHpsO82QWAxuKb34DvJwf)) - Why are realists always on the defensive when it comes to foreign policy? Senator J.D. Vance of Ohio, a Republican, recently gave a masterclass on going on the offense, that should be a template for anyone trying to take control of the narrative. Immigration and foreign affairs are often not seen as connected, but we are entering a total and perfect storm at a time when there are millions of military-aged men on the southern border quite literally planting their own flags on American soil. Republicans expect their elected representatives to go on the offense. The realist right should take their cues from Vance. Read _The American Conservative_ 's article [here](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9d04ea9288ba41d991c791b9e81440b0&_e=ErkJAVyFRkg8rJbhoaJ4Y6PIr9U1HyDc48p2ZKmCaR2g-3ibMdFe_IGqgJp-RomXV6Co_nkAJ4cYq7gcYtb0WptS5gyT0hsrsKq9au2t8MAJfnEz4rIKbQgM95NTN3Wvxe2F5-rAo5t5Q7347ycR9T-9m4yltGW2IsB3lgouec_fVuzJGBoN7H1RQ6F0x8inNYIDe8UNQPv3fhwMYxO6YPuVUbRaIu07mzn8dnOzKbzFbVGuQNn5vWaLYD2JQgP1). ****[****](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9d04ea9288ba41d991c791b9e81440b0&_e=ErkJAVyFRkg8rJbhoaJ4Yyy8rn6yndEQuuxH0bIrl7MgQsP6E2XZUcKaovxjD_wjwOO9VmJtSJWWXNh7OowqtwATxURYen7mVELgP4a_GIzodee3ZybCeA_DzV7o_WplswC27Yf2EhsJYMjJG1DZHGF_iYmtPDvnAEyXSskoa9EF0nvmTAl60IcP8voXj4Ptvgy48a1eMOfbFIYMvWE0HlKLi8QF_VdyLBu25HlC8PIFMldELVm74hZrPsb0mgfhCs7KT_uBZf8cYIkI8tp_BlmMoXnoY_vnjNZIzn-KUQprJAIu-7Wr2EIIxji6nZtH)**' A CHORUS OF GOP LAWMAKERS HAVE CALLED FOR OVERSIGHT ON FUNDS SENT TO [UKRAINE]' **([Fox News](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9d04ea9288ba41d991c791b9e81440b0&_e=ErkJAVyFRkg8rJbhoaJ4Yyy8rn6yndEQuuxH0bIrl7MgQsP6E2XZUcKaovxjD_wjwOO9VmJtSJWWXNh7OowqtwATxURYen7mVELgP4a_GIzodee3ZybCeA_DzV7o_WplswC27Yf2EhsJYMjJG1DZHGF_iYmtPDvnAEyXSskoa9FeZZAiR3xAcZtBLHEUepd1EdHU3C8jfPwzZu-IJ-qWTpdqil0cUqFsUj9YAAUz7Ic77Jc-5BBHJReTj4xM8Ya01wRNgAYjDRkmv0KblFX7bipIkbGjg7GWF_TsZKD_tTi5vZRHSh4JFpxA_JpZrmCt)) - Sen. JD Vance, R-Ohio, along with Reps. Chip Roy, R-Texas, and Matt Gaetz, R-Fla., said the letter - first obtained by Fox News Digital - comes following a White House briefing last week when Sullivan stated that the Biden administration had sent around $79.9 billion in aid to Ukraine since the war started in February 2022. However, a week earlier, the White House Office of Management and Budget gave Vance's office a chart showing at least $101 billion spent, with plans for additional spending. JD Vance announced Tuesday that he'll introduce legislation called the Freedom to Breathe Act that would block the federal government from reimposing mask mandates to prevent the spread of coronavirus. Vance's bill would prohibit any federal official, including the president, from requiring masks on domestic air travel, public transit systems, or primary, secondary, and post-secondary schools, and would prohibit air carriers, transit authorities and educational institutions from refusing to serve people who don't wear masks. "This legislation will ensure that no federal bureaucracy, no commercial airline, and no public school can impose the misguided policies of the past," Vance continued. "Democrats say they're not going to bring back mask mandates - we're going to hold them to their word." J.D. Vance and a group of GOP Senators introduced legislation Wednesday that would aim to curb Communist Chinese Party influence by targeting the millions of foreign dollars that go to American universities. "The institutions tasked with educating America's future leaders have been repeatedly exposed for seeking money from our adversaries, especially the Chinese Communist Party. We cannot allow the CCP, or any hostile nation for that matter, to continue to infiltrate and exploit our higher education system," Vance told the Caller before introducing the bill. "The American people deserve to see every single dollar of foreign donations going to U.S. colleges and universities, and that's exactly what this legislation would do."
