clean_body: | Senator Vance has been productive making waves in Washington. Read below to see what he's been up to!**' DECADES OF FAILED LEADERSHIP IN WASHINGTON AND IN THE BOARDROOM HAVE LAID WASTE TO PROUD MANUFACTURING COMMUNITIES' () - "Ohioans that I speak with justifiably wish to see a course correction. But instead of pumping the brakes, the Biden administration is doubling down on EVs and driving our auto industry straight off a cliff. The editors pointed it out themselves: "In less than 10 years two-thirds of the autos sold need to be electric powered according to current government mandates." "The numbers show that the government-mandated shift to electric vehicles has been a disaster, and the numbers have been significantly propped up by taxpayer subsidies for EVs. But no amount of government underwriting will outweigh such unsustainable losses over the long term. It is time for a reckoning in the auto industry and at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue." Read Senator Vance's entire piece . ' IF WE'RE SUBSIDIZING ANYTHING, IT OUGHT TO BE THE WAGES OF OHIO WORKERS' () -- Republican Ohio Sen. J.D. Vance will introduce a piece of legislation Thursday that is aimed at eliminating electric vehicle subsidies established under the Biden administration as well as promoting domestic auto manufacturing. President Joe Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) in August 2022, which allocated millions to combating climate change and other energy provisions while additionally establishing a $7,500 tax credit for electric vehicles. The bill, first obtained by the Daily Caller, will repeal a series of EV tax credits created or expanded under the IRA such as the Clean Vehicle credit and a credit for previously owned electric vehicles. "Right now, the official policy of the Biden administration is to spend billions of dollars on subsidies for electric vehicles made overseas," Vance told the Daily Caller. "If we're subsidizing anything, it ought to be the wages of Ohio workers - not the green energy daydreams that are offshoring their jobs to China. We can secure a bright future for the American auto industry by passing this legislation, giving workers a much-needed raise, and reversing the misguided policies of the Biden administration." Read the entire Daily Caller piece . ' WE CAN SECURE A BRIGHT FUTURE FOR AMERICAN WORKERS BY PASSING THIS LEGISLATION AND REVERSING THE MISGUIDED POLICIES OF THE BIDEN ADMINISTRATION' () -- Sen. J.D. Vance (R-OH) wants to offer much-needed wage hikes to American auto workers by replacing President Joe Biden's Electric Vehicle (EV) mandates with tax credits for gas-powered cars made in the United States at high-wage plants. Vance's "Drive American Act" would eliminate more than $100 billion in EV subsidies from the Biden administration and replace them with the "America First Vehicle Credit." Read the entire Breitbart article . ' A REGULATORY BODY THAT'S USING ITS POWER TO SILENCE AND IMMISERATE POLITICAL RIVALS OF THE CURRENT PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES' () - Republican Sen. J.D. Vance of Ohio accused Gary Gensler, the nation's foremost financial regulator of using its enforcement powers to harass former President Donald Trump. Vance alleged that Gensler, chair of the Securities and Exchange Commission, had hired partisan Democrats "who seem to have a vendetta against the former president," including enforcement division director Gurbir Grewal, the former Democratic Attorney General of New York, who investigated the former president in that capacity. "It looks more and more like not an impartial regulatory body, protecting investors and consumers, but a regulatory body that's using its power to silence and immiserate political rivals of the current president of the United States," Vance said. Read Market Watch 's entire article . ' REPUBLICANS EXPECT THEIR ELECTED REPRESENTATIVES TO GO ON THE OFFENSE. THE REALIST RIGHT SHOULD TAKE THEIR CUES FROM VANCE.' () - Why are realists always on the defensive when it comes to foreign policy? Senator J.D. Vance of Ohio, a Republican, recently gave a masterclass on going on the offense, that should be a template for anyone trying to take control of the narrative. Immigration and foreign affairs are often not seen as connected, but we are entering a total and perfect storm at a time when there are millions of military-aged men on the southern border quite literally planting their own flags on American soil. Republicans expect their elected representatives to go on the offense. The realist right should take their cues from Vance. Read The American Conservative 's article . ' A CHORUS OF GOP LAWMAKERS HAVE CALLED FOR OVERSIGHT ON FUNDS SENT TO [UKRAINE]' () - Sen. JD Vance, R-Ohio, along with Reps. Chip Roy, R-Texas, and Matt Gaetz, R-Fla., said the letter - first obtained by Fox News Digital - comes following a White House briefing last week when Sullivan stated that the Biden administration had sent around $79.9 billion in aid to Ukraine since the war started in February 2022. However, a week earlier, the White House Office of Management and Budget gave Vance's office a chart showing at least $101 billion spent, with plans for additional spending. Read Fox News ' entire article . **' THIS IS A CLASSIC MILITARY QUAGMIRE' () -- **' THE AMERICAN PEOPLE DESERVE TO KNOW WHAT THEIR MONEY HAS GONE TO' () - Nearly two dozen Republican senators and lawmakers on Thursday came out against more funding for Ukraine, just as the country's president arrived in Washington, DC, to urge Congress to pass an additional $24 billion in aid that would bring total U.S. support to Ukraine to at least $135 billion since its war with Russia began. Vance said in a post that after a Biden administration briefing on Wednesday, it "became clear that America is being asked to fund an indefinite conflict with unlimited resources." "Enough is enough," he posted. "To these and future requests, my colleagues and I say: NO." Read the entire Breitbart article . ' IT IS DIFFICULT TO ENVISION A BENIGN EXPLANATION FOR THIS LACK OF CLARITY' () - Ahead of Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy's visit to Washington, D.C., a group of 29 Republican lawmakers has vowed to oppose further funding for Ukraine. In a scathing letter to the White House, six senators and 23 House members said they reject President Biden's request for $24 billion in additional security, economic and humanitarian aid to Ukraine. The lawmakers railed against the Biden administration for a lack of clarity over how the more than $100 billion in funding Congress has already approved has been spent. And they said Biden's demand for an increase in defense spending on the Ukraine Security Assistance Initiative 15 times greater than what Congress authorized "makes a mockery" of the legislative process. Read the entire Fox News article . ' AMERICANS SHOULD BE FREE TO LIVE THEIR LIVES - TO TRAVEL, TO WORK AND GO TO SCHOOL - WITHOUT SUBJECTION TO NEEDLESS FORCE.' () - "We all know how this goes. It starts with mask mandates, then social distancing, and then forced lockdowns to "slow the spread." None of it works, but it costs us dearly. It robbed us of our basic freedoms and shattered our national unity amid a crisis. We cannot let it happen again. "Americans should be free to live their lives -- to travel, to work and go to school -- without subjection to needless force. Let's pass the Freedom to Breathe Act and ensure that they can. "COVID may have taken American lives, but it can never again take Americans' freedom." Read Senator Vance's entire piece . ' DEMOCRATS SAY THEY'RE NOT GOING TO BRING BACK MASK MANDATES - WE'RE GOING TO HOLD THEM TO THEIR WORD' () - U.S. Sen. JD Vance announced Tuesday that he'll introduce legislation called the Freedom to Breathe Act that would block the federal government from reimposing mask mandates to prevent the spread of coronavirus. Vance's bill would prohibit any federal official, including the president, from requiring masks on domestic air travel, public transit systems, or primary, secondary, and post-secondary schools, and would prohibit air carriers, transit authorities and educational institutions from refusing to serve people who don't wear masks. "This legislation will ensure that no federal bureaucracy, no commercial airline, and no public school can impose the misguided policies of the past," Vance continued. "Democrats say they're not going to bring back mask mandates - we're going to hold them to their word." Read Cleveland.com 's entire article . ' WE CANNOT ALLOW THE CCP, OR ANY HOSTILE NATION FOR THE MATTER, TO CONTINUE TO INFILTRATE AND EXPLOIT OUR HIGHER EDUCATION SYSTEM' () - Republican Ohio Sen. J.D. Vance and a group of GOP Senators introduced legislation Wednesday that would aim to curb Communist Chinese Party influence by targeting the millions of foreign dollars that go to American universities. "The institutions tasked with educating America's future leaders have been repeatedly exposed for seeking money from our adversaries, especially the Chinese Communist Party. We cannot allow the CCP, or any hostile nation for that matter, to continue to infiltrate and exploit our higher education system," Vance told the Caller before introducing the bill. "The American people deserve to see every single dollar of foreign donations going to U.S. colleges and universities, and that's exactly what this legislation would do." Read the entire Daily Caller article . ' A COMPLETE AND TOTAL DISASTER' () - At a time when members of Congress from opposite sides of the political aisle find it hard to agree on much, Ohio's Democrat and Republican U.S. senators are both criticizing Norfolk Southern Railroad's program to reimburse homeowners who experienced reduced property values due to the February 3rd fiery derailment and chemical spill. Democrat Senator Sherrod Brown is calling the program "another empty promise", and Republican J.D. Vance described the plan as "a complete and total disaster." Read the whole WFMJ article . Join us for a discussion on Election Integrity
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TOR82tRTzFUk834HH5JdnyIdoivUkjFbb8c_08J2tgvtlgkVLQCcY_Rcp-3L3YqSJvPICav96L9gVjoDurF8eW5eLhQt6trSV4vcUx961_VTGSwsSbEVLkW8vQVAJeIzh_d2ZwCqpQXypTgAhc2MK1UMa1ukpqlB0-3Mbm0yZL4=&c=0xAM4oBMS2AUszr_VyoVEt-bgfvHpq50SlF-mPL0MxiPJOUX0ns_yw==&ch=l6TjPiXkHRV17S6e4KnX69z_8LA1KvhVGmSTcxCgKETaYNwSmoWn5g==)
---
| Chesterfield VA Tea Party
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

Join us tonight, Tuesday, Oct. 3, at 6:30pm at Great American Ranch in Midlothian, to hear the latest regarding Election Integrity efforts in Virginia from guest speakers Darrel Bow and Roxanna Gray.

Come on out and learn more about how you can help to maintain an accurate registered voter list. Letters can be sent to the AG, Governor and the Commissioner of Elections regarding the inaccuracy of Virginia voters and non-citizens on Virginia's Voter Registration List.

This can be done from your own home. Many active registered voters have moved and need to be cancelled or their addresses updated on the registered voter list.

We need to hold our elected officials accountable and make them take action to secure our elections. Learn more about the specifics tonight.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: Not a desk job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=55509d3e85234359acf9c036a82123bf&_e=8xFXCqPpLF5QRxfUYa33ZRdo_Xn8u5UZ5UsRxOP-dqAe810eE4iTqeBNYDrZ0i-lEahDQx0WCYtGX_pibhKi0BaXNxzOxKmKzDMe6pSD7Jxd1g5ZxvvtVSUe7pjo6YdeC6y30QdGNb7WAcGvpYXAT8dWAwjFsH-B98Yd1z5NxpZrRTk89-AWXP58Q2neFoyy_WPQ-WgvfDgYSyu86ZArfyEgAeOrr1-K0jGOb194ZgCoFYMrumOZTqrFINr72ODmDgVNbRLYsiLMXyCY-6iMLdco1RzBX7-SiUSrFYa3ptwFlQRCfi50mMmsWEW1Gxt8TpWpck4vLfCoXOBFBEouJZZIrnUT6YbGk2m4G8tDpP0%3D)
---
| | Peter,
---
From a young age, I knew that I was a little bit different.

I didn’t speak the same language as the other kids. My parents talked differently. We came from a different place.

My family escaped Communist Vietnam when I was four years old, and even though America was unfamiliar at first, in no time, it became the only true home I’ve ever known.

As I grew up, I learned that we owed our lives to the freedoms in this country. That’s why I decided to dedicate my life to serving it.

**I knew what America had given me and that I couldn’t repay her by taking a simple desk job. I attended the U.S. Naval Academy and went on to serve for 25 years as a Captain in some of the most dangerous corners of the Earth.**

When I was in the Navy, I saw the very best of humanity that America has to offer. _And when I compare it to the “leadership” we see in Washington today, I can’t help but feel we’re missing something._

**It’s no coincidence that are people are losing trust in our elected officials, veteran representation in Congress is at an all-time low.**

_I’m on a mission to change that._

_**My name is Hung Cao, and I’m running for the U.S. Senate because America needs veterans in Washington more than ever.**_

**[If YOU want to take over Congress with conservative veterans who will get the job done, join our team today and become a part of the team that will TAKE BACK our majority!](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=55509d3e85234359acf9c036a82123bf&_e=8xFXCqPpLF5QRxfUYa33ZRdo_Xn8u5UZ5UsRxOP-dqAe810eE4iTqeBNYDrZ0i-lEahDQx0WCYtGX_pibhKi0BaXNxzOxKmKzDMe6pSD7Jxd1g5ZxvvtVSUe7pjo6YdeC6y30QdGNb7WAcGvpYXAT8dWAwjFsH-B98Yd1z5NxpZrRTk89-AWXP58Q2neFoyy_WPQ-WgvfDgYSyu86ZArf2WdnPskWidh_HVDb1M5dE_YiSF3cGqLlJL3kdc417pS07Sblcma6c1aRKteP0qODb1DgFBH5fcbE4L50o_HnzT3Gy3V_AGVdHpXQOggWpWsT2pV8biFytxnkF5An6CVGezwfPF7MnH0UGAJ_oI4p_Q%3D)**

[**ELECT CONSERVATIVE VETERANS**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=55509d3e85234359acf9c036a82123bf&_e=8xFXCqPpLF5QRxfUYa33ZRdo_Xn8u5UZ5UsRxOP-dqAe810eE4iTqeBNYDrZ0i-lEahDQx0WCYtGX_pibhKi0BaXNxzOxKmKzDMe6pSD7Jxd1g5ZxvvtVSUe7pjo6YdeC6y30QdGNb7WAcGvpYXAT8dWAwjFsH-B98Yd1z5NxpZrRTk89-AWXP58Q2neFoyy_WPQ-WgvfDgYSyu86ZArfzIK1WhYadmCDZpSotNn5hogkfPJvFMboS8ClH1usdPLMsEm7-XHAbiDE4jIxRvtkaIyKQgkcPCym3PoFo2pF3454Vz5zSNjLUQT-lPuUYIp_KGrszXemtjR7vgTDLkduSj2GCSFB1RTiJtBZqtLAZE%3D)

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, From a young age, I knew that I was a little bit different. I didn’t speak the same language as the other kids. My parents talked differently. We came from a different place. My family escaped Communist Vietnam when I was four years old, and even though America was unfamiliar at first, in no time, it became the only true home I’ve ever known. As I grew up, I learned that we owed our lives to the freedoms in this country. That’s why I decided to dedicate my life to serving it. I knew what America had given me and that I couldn’t repay her by taking a simple desk job. I attended the U.S. Naval Academy and went on to serve for 25 years as a Captain in some of the most dangerous corners of the Earth. When I was in the Navy, I saw the very best of humanity that America has to offer. And when I compare it to the “leadership” we see in Washington today, I can’t help but feel we’re missing something. It’s no coincidence that are people are losing trust in our elected officials, veteran representation in Congress is at an all-time low. I’m on a mission to change that. My name is Hung Cao, and I’m running for the U.S. Senate because America needs veterans in Washington more than ever. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao Please mail checks made out to "Hung Cao for Virginia" to this address: PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Eric=20Underwood?=
subject: ☕Coffee w/ the Chairman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Coalition Spotlight Feature: Nebraskans for Founders Values | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12654430?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8056713c4f&e=25844e23a8)
---
| |
#### Good Morning Republicans,

We reached a tipping point in the Republican Party of Nebraska and it led to July 9th, 2022.

In last week's email I asked a lot of **"Why"** questions that I hope made some Republicans take a step back and think from a "10,000 mile view", as I like to say. _I hope Republicans are watching at the Federal level with the Presidential Debates or the continuing conversations in DC and bringing back a focus to Nebraska with a curiosity about our representative republic._ As I indicated last week, a national campaign consultant company **OPERATED** the State Party and your donations helped pay for it. **For years. **One political consultant, their company, it's third party vendors including company's and LLC's of state party officers or staff...ran the NEGOP from payroll, NADC & FEC compliance, candidate selection (not election), creative campaign materials, and party communications of emails, mailings, and text messages. The word "operated" is key to understanding the last eight years of the NEGOP. Operations of a State Party run by the people include a huge network of relationships and connecting people at the local level through the county party's governance. This network creates engagement opportunities for local candidates, voter registration drives, brand development and values messaging, community outreach and different demographic events. Operations of a State party run by a consultant company revolve around power, money, and control of elected officials and political seats. This control removes the choice from voters at some of the highest political seats and NEVER creates an apparatus resource for the local races of school boards, NRD's, city councils, power boards, etc. __**What is even the goal or objective of the state party**__? To paraphrase, the _NEGOP's constitutional objective_ is... _"the maintenance of the government of, by, and for the people...and the furtherance of our principles (within the community)"_. The functional objective of the past leadership was NOT based on ideology or values, but more so on the business (i.e. money and power) of politics and the furtherance of motives and agendas. In my view, the priority was _to retain the business_ , **to control outcomes to further business opportunities for the next 2-year cycle and the next** , and this has nothing to do with maintenance of the government or furtherance of our principles. It has nothing to do with conservative values or constitutional adherence. In politics, as with any relationship, you can create major influence on people and policy through either FEAR or earned RESPECT. The past administration used FEAR in every metric. Fear messaging to voters. Fear treatment to candidates or elected officials. Fear retaliation towards anyone who voiced their opinions or stepped out of line.

Worse...in my opinion the objective of running for political office by _some, not all,_ had nothing to do with representing the interests of Nebraskans at large. Somewhere in the realm of herd mentality, echo chambers, or group think tanks comes the notion to present oneself (the candidate or incumbent) as "qualified" just to WIN an election. Once you've won said election, you've somehow become exponentially more informed, intelligent, and know what's BEST beyond the scope of what the general voter can fathom.

There are over 900 elected Democrats in Nebraska and in 2017 there were only 504 elected Democrats _(See image from NDP Facebook page)_.
**900 elected Democrats did not happen by accident, but by neglect and complacency.**
Neglect of our Constitution.
Complacency of our Platform Values.
**AND WORST OF ALL..Neglect of the voices of the PEOPLE within our party. You, the Republican voter, donor, volunteer and many, many local candidates who were never given the support, acknowledgement, or appreciation.**
July 9th, 2022 was a makeover of the NEGOP. From the ashes of the Bonfire Brigade's attempted sabotage of the new leaderships transition has come a clear picture of the financial structure of the NEGOP. Previously, the NEGOP was funded primarily by ONE major donor source and the subsequent financial leverage from other donors associated.

Under the current administration, the NEGOP is funded primarily by the people, period! We are appreciative of the many, many donors (almost 300) to our **[booster club NEGOP+](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=2bdc63c975&e=25844e23a8)** , to our event sponsors and elected officials, and the upcoming partnerships with national coalitions (more on that soon). The **value** of the party to the Republican voters & volunteers is in creating a framework and organization with which to formally govern at the local level. The voters & volunteers have a voice en masse when the party is represented by the people. The **value** of the party to Republican Candidates is to create engagement opportunities and provide data resources so candidates can **LISTEN** to constituents, **EARN** the votes, **SPEAK** the truth of our values, **WIN** elections and ultimately **FURTHER** our principles within the community. However, you need to know that there is an effort by people of influence, **from WITHIN our party** , to dry up funds so we can't operate. There are those who do not believe in the people of the party. There are those who assume that the people of the party will NEVER be enough by VOLUME and VOICE to outweigh the MONEY of a few major donors. The ironic thing is...these same people fighting change knew who was operating the party, but out of fear, stayed silent, stayed complacent.

_Is that true, Nebraska Republicans?_
_Are they correct, that it's just a waiting game? Are you staying silent and complacent?_
**Did you know that in 2019-2020 we "raised" over[$5 million](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=377ad600fd&e=25844e23a8) to our Federal account and much of that money went to OTHER state parties? Imagine the local races that could have been won OR the county parties developed in 2020.**

_**Quick Fundraising 101**_ \- The Federal account of a state party is where most of the basic business costs MUST be paid from such as payroll, programming costs, resources, etc. Compliance guidelines in Nebraska limit the Federal account donation to individual personal donors or corporations and at a cap of $10,000. A donor may donate more to the State Party but it must go into our State account.

_Will you be the first**[$10,000 donor](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=afb81c9f73&e=25844e23a8)** for Q4? _

**We need your help. 2024 will not be successful without your direct involvement and that's the truth. I need to hire more staff to focus on election accountability and voter verification in an effort to bring back local control to our elections at the county level. We can assist all the best candidates for every elected seat available but it will be for nothing if our elections are not secured BY THE PEOPLE.**

We have passed a 2-year budget which has **NO** line item for _DIRECT FINANCIAL CANDIDATE SUPPORT_. Meaning, when you **[DONATE](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=da37084281&e=25844e23a8)** to the NEGOP it goes to OPERATE the party, PAY salaries & utilities, SUPPORT county party development, AND provide the __**RESOURCES**__ to the candidates. It is not the OBJECTIVE or the job of the State party to pick and choose the winners of elections...that is the VOTERS job to pick their representatives. __**Nearly ALL other state parties operate in a similar financial fashion where they DO NOT write direct financial checks to candidates.**__

WHEN YOU DONATE TO THE PARTY, _100%_ OF YOUR DONATION GOES TO **BUILD THE PARTY**! It does NOT go to Federal or State or Legislative candidates. There will be over 100,000 eventual readers of this email, that's a 1/6 of the Republican voters, and if all 100,000 readers became NEGOP+ Booster Members or even donated $150 just ONE time, or came to our next [Roundtable - Truth in Taxation](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d52a0e6def&e=25844e23a8), I can guarantee a result that will amplify your voice! I will focus my next newsletter on the elected officials that do support the people of the party as well as the successes of the last year developing county parties.

The truth shall set us free.

With much blessings,
---
|
---
| –Chairman Underwood
---
|
---
|
## Coalition Spotlight: Nebraskans for Founders Values
---
| NFFV - Nebraskans for Founders Values NFFV is an all-volunteer 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. NFFV’s vision is as follows:
“NFFV will be the primary resource for Nebraska legislators and citizens for enacting legislation based in our Founders’ values of God fearing, life’s intrinsic value, and individual freedoms by educating voters in the legislative process, awakening citizens who have been lulled into lethargy, and mobilizing the silent majority to recapture the public square.”

Our vision is supported by our two part mission:
* Education – educate voters in the legislative process & inspire civic engagement.
* Legislation – monitor proposed legislation and put resources into action to support conservative Senators.

NFFV engages citizens across Nebraska in person and in news publications in three ways. **Our Minuteman Alerts** \- email and text communication that is research-backed information bulletins alerting the public to activities happening in their government that need to be addressed by the citizens in a timely fashion, as in the historical times of “minutemen”. NFFV 101 Workshops- teaching the legislative process of the Nebraska legislature and ways citizens can enact legislation that is based on the beliefs of our Founding Fathers. Our Legislative Captain Program- enrolls citizens in our communication apparatus to disseminate time-sensitive information in a robust way to mobilize citizens to action.

NFFV’s legislative goals for 2024 include “fixes” from last session and enacting legislation to protect children. NFFV’s priorities include removing pornography from schools by closing the loophole in our current law, protecting women’s sports, amending the vote ID bill to match the ballot initiative voted on by “We the People”, enacting the Heartbeat Bill in its original form, and reducing the overreach of government in its excessive taxation that is crippling the people of Nebraska.

Join NFFV today at www.nffv.org. _{"Coalition Spotlight" is an informational component of this newsletter ONLY in an effort to expand Republican relationships to our membership. "CS" is not a paid advertisement. "CS" is not an indication of financial support to any officers, governing bodies, or entities of the NEGOP. "CS" is not affiliated or authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Any coalition's endorsement of candidates at any time are NOT subsequent endorsements by the governing bodies of the NEGOP.}_

Did you know that in 2019-2020 we "raised" over to our Federal account and much of that money went to OTHER state parties? Imagine the local races that could have been won OR the county parties developed in 2020. Quick Fundraising 101 \- The Federal account of a state party is where most of the basic business costs MUST be paid from such as payroll, programming costs, resources, etc. Compliance guidelines in Nebraska limit the Federal account donation to individual personal donors or corporations and at a cap of $10,000. A donor may donate more to the State Party but it must go into our State account. Will you be the first for Q4? We need your help. 2024 will not be successful without your direct involvement and that's the truth. I need to hire more staff to focus on election accountability and voter verification in an effort to bring back local control to our elections at the county level. We can assist all the best candidates for every elected seat available but it will be for nothing if our elections are not secured BY THE PEOPLE. We have passed a 2-year budget which has NO line item for DIRECT FINANCIAL CANDIDATE SUPPORT. Meaning, when you to the NEGOP it goes to OPERATE the party, PAY salaries & utilities, SUPPORT county party development, AND provide the RESOURCES to the candidates. It is not the OBJECTIVE or the job of the State party to pick and choose the winners of elections...that is the VOTERS job to pick their representatives. Nearly ALL other state parties operate in a similar financial fashion where they DO NOT write direct financial checks to candidates. WHEN YOU DONATE TO THE PARTY, 100% OF YOUR DONATION GOES TO BUILD THE PARTY! It does NOT go to Federal or State or Legislative candidates. There will be over 100,000 eventual readers of this email, that's a 1/6 of the Republican voters, and if all 100,000 readers became NEGOP+ Booster Members or even donated $150 just ONE time, or came to our next , I can guarantee a result that will amplify your voice! I will focus my next newsletter on the elected officials that do support the people of the party as well as the successes of the last year developing county parties. The truth shall set us free. With much blessings, | | –Chairman Underwood | | Coalition Spotlight: Nebraskans for Founders Values | NFFV - Nebraskans for Founders Values NFFV is an all-volunteer 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. NFFV’s vision is as follows: “NFFV will be the primary resource for Nebraska legislators and citizens for enacting legislation based in our Founders’ values of God fearing, life’s intrinsic value, and individual freedoms by educating voters in the legislative process, awakening citizens who have been lulled into lethargy, and mobilizing the silent majority to recapture the public square.” Our vision is supported by our two part mission: Education – educate voters in the legislative process & inspire civic engagement. Legislation – monitor proposed legislation and put resources into action to support conservative Senators. NFFV engages citizens across Nebraska in person and in news publications in three ways. Our Minuteman Alerts \- email and text communication that is research-backed information bulletins alerting the public to activities happening in their government that need to be addressed by the citizens in a timely fashion, as in the historical times of “minutemen”. NFFV 101 Workshops- teaching the legislative process of the Nebraska legislature and ways citizens can enact legislation that is based on the beliefs of our Founding Fathers. Our Legislative Captain Program- enrolls citizens in our communication apparatus to disseminate time-sensitive information in a robust way to mobilize citizens to action. NFFV’s legislative goals for 2024 include “fixes” from last session and enacting legislation to protect children. NFFV’s priorities include removing pornography from schools by closing the loophole in our current law, protecting women’s sports, amending the vote ID bill to match the ballot initiative voted on by “We the People”, enacting the Heartbeat Bill in its original form, and reducing the overreach of government in its excessive taxation that is crippling the people of Nebraska. Join NFFV today at www.nffv.org. {"Coalition Spotlight" is an informational component of this newsletter ONLY in an effort to expand Republican relationships to our membership. "CS" is not a paid advertisement. "CS" is not an indication of financial support to any officers, governing bodies, or entities of the NEGOP. "CS" is not affiliated or authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Any coalition's endorsement of candidates at any time are NOT subsequent endorsements by the governing bodies of the NEGOP.} | "Donate" | | | Weather Update - Lincoln | | Weather Update - Grand Island | | Weather Update - Scottsbluff | | | "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY" | | Copyright © 2023 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved.

subject: Let’s support a Senator that really lives in PA

body:
#
Peter, can I take a moment to share with you a cause that’s close to my heart and crucial for our Senate majority?
Bob Casey, one of my close colleagues, is running for re-election in Pennsylvania—where Mitch McConnell’s handpicked opponent just launched his campaign against Bob.
Not only does GOP candidate David McCormick have a personal fortune from selling out Pennsylvanian and American workers to China and managing money for authoritarian regimes, but **he actually lives in Connecticut.**
Throughout our partnership, Bob has consistently demonstrated his commitment to protecting and preserving the rights of every Pennsylvanian. With a platform that prioritizes our climate and environment, education, gun violence prevention, and economy, Bob knows how to make a real difference in the lives of countless Pennsylvanians.
But Bob can’t run a successful campaign without your grassroots support. **************[Will you split a donation between my campaign and Bob’s right now to re-elect Senator Casey and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70864002/430551667/2111853845?refcode=dd_em_231003_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTUxMGZjMi1mOTYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Ug3m5rGBS8fVAxg5Jz3JEggzBblhrZQAGvM7UBvGko=)**************
This election has the potential to make or break our Senate majority. Pennsylvania is known for being one of the most competitive Senate battlegrounds, so much so that CNN listed the state as being one of the Top 10 Most Likely to Flip Senate Seats in 2024.
Just like you, Bob wants a brighter, safer, more equal future for Pennsylvania, **but he needs your support to make it happen. **********[Will you split a contribution today to help me keep a valuable member of the Democratic Senate majority in office? Every donation makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70864003/430551668/2111853845?refcode=dd_em_231003_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTUxMGZjMi1mOTYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Ug3m5rGBS8fVAxg5Jz3JEggzBblhrZQAGvM7UBvGko=)********
I know that Bob Casey won’t let us down. Let’s work together to keep him in the Senate.
My best,
Dick Durbin

name: Major General Paul Eaton, US Army (Ret)
subject: "Suckers" and "losers"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Words escape me.
#
Derek,
Like many of you, I was disgusted to hear Donald Trump's former Chief of Staff confirm, on the record, some of the unthinkable things Trump said about our service members, Veterans, and fallen troops.
“Losers.”
“Suckers.”
That he was repulsed by the sight of our wounded heroes.
Words escape me.
Donald Trump has no idea of honor. He has no idea of patriotism.
My father was killed in Vietnam. He was shot down over a Ho Chi Minh trail section just outside of Vietnam in Laos. He delivered close air support to special forces on the ground, and his airplane blew up.
His dog tag was recovered at the crash site. This dog tag:
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231003-1-30&t=1&akid=17393%2E3013755%2EHA1qTK)
My father was a patriot. Well-educated. He was not a sucker. He was not a loser.
The best men and women of the United States are found in our military. Brave men and women, They are not just brave, they are smart. They are wise.
And I will tell you this. My anger, two years after reading about Trump's words — words confirmed yesterday by his former Chief of Staff — has not subsided.
And I am committed, once again, to do everything I can to ensure he never steps foot inside the White House again. So please:
**[Can you use this link to contribute $5 to VoteVets today? We will use every dollar raised to defeat Trump and make sure he never serves as President of the United States ever again.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231003-1-30&t=2&akid=17393%2E3013755%2EHA1qTK)**

body:
Will you be the winner to meet Jill and Joe in Washington, D.C.? | | |
---

clean_body: Roughly 1 YEAR OUT from the most important election in the history of our country. | | Friend – don’t miss out on your chance to meet President Trump! To commemorate being nearly 1 YEAR OUT from the most important election in the history of our country, your favorite president is hosting a special reception at the end of the month... and he wants to see YOU there! That’s right, President Trump wants YOU to join him at Mar-a-Lago for a special MAGA reception on October 26! He’ll fly you and a guest of your choice out to the event for FREE. He’ll cover your hotel, you’ll get to enjoy drinks and hors d'oeuvres, you’ll get a hat signed by President Trump, and to top it all off, you’ll even get to take a special photo with your favorite president so that you can remember this night forever! All that’s left to do is enter to WIN! | | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Wed, September 27, 2023 Subject: Meet me at Mar-a-Lago! To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | Friend, I’m hosting a very special reception at Mar-a-Lago at the end of October to commemorate being nearly 1 YEAR OUT from the most important election in the history of our country. I will deliver remarks and a pep talk to our team for our final 1-year push to save America. ...And as a critical part of Team Trump, I’d love to have YOU there. One lucky winner (and a guest of your choice) will be flown to Mar-a-Lago to attend this fall reception – and to really make it special, we’ll take a picture together and you’ll get a hat signed by me. Now doesn’t that sound fun? Your flight, your hotel, and your tickets to the reception will all be on me... ...All I ask is that you make a contribution of any amount before the upcoming FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline to be automatically entered to win. | | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Save America JFC by clicking . Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking or by texting “MARALAGO” to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between September 27, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on October 11, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) “Prize Winner” will receive a trip for two to an October 26, 2023 reception at the Mar-A-Lago Club consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner’s residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the event featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; (v) two (2) limited edition Trump 2024 hats signed by President Donald J. Trump; approximate retail value (“ARV”) of the Prize: $8,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Protecting our Children and Families |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=84fb006b21&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Somebody told me that last Thursday was National Sons Day. I didn’t know that was a thing, but I’ll take the opportunity to celebrate my three sons. Love you Will, Jake and Eli!

Politicians like to say they are running for office to provide better lives for their children. Of course, they are. So am I. The question is how to accomplish it.

Most people I speak with think America is losing its identity, that the values we’ve long shared are under attack. It’s easy to reach that conclusion. Yesterday, I learned that [protesters in Nazareth](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=2e49e88d6f&e=1090c5c412) are targeting a lady who dresses up as Martha Washington to teach kids about the Constitution. How did we get to this point? I think it’s because we’ve stopped telling our kids the truth.

My son Eli wrestled during the pandemic. He had to wear a mask, which was constantly ripped off and always out of place. Then, after manhandling each other for six minutes, the two wrestlers were forbidden from shaking hands after the bout, apparently because they might get Covid-19.

Every kid on that team knew that was ridiculous. But they all complied because they wanted to wrestle. They learned to accept lies from authorities to get along. It’s no wonder why so many children don’t respect adults or trust institutions.

We can’t change the culture with an Act of Congress. That requires love and attention over time. And prayer. But we can take specific measures to protect our kids right now.

Let’s enact a national age verification system to safeguard children from Internet pornography. We must secure our borders and prevent Mexican drug cartels from flooding our streets with fentanyl. And let’s make sure parents have full rights and authority to raise their children instead of government agencies.

My wife Susan and I are blessed to have three wonderful sons. My hope is that those three young men, and all American children, have abundant opportunities in a virtuous nation for years to come.

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a husband and father who has lived in the Lehigh Valley for 40 years. He's the founder of a successful technology company and a 28-year veteran of the U.S. Armed Forces. Kevin's not running for Congress because he needs a job. He's running because he's got the experience, vision, and courage to defend our American way of life. _
---
|
---

I attended a reception for the local chapter of the Critical Incident Stress Management (CISM) for law enforcement, which provides peer support for first responders. Then I attended cigar night at the Steel Club in Bethlehem before getting organized for our big volunteer meeting on Monday. We had more than 50 volunteers participate!

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Montana U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy.

I’m a former Navy SEAL and small business owner, not a politician, and _**I’m learning that in politics, things tend to happen all at once or not at all**_.

Coming off a busy summer, things have quieted down a bit for us here in Montana. I wanted to take a minute to reintroduce myself to you. **[I’m linking a 65-second video to the image below that I’m hoping you’ll watch today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=423c1e9477c54b17a0f6803f8a428bec&_e=HyRDOvDehKCRHCCTWFrUvwBJVoCUK3WIFlWkFZlFx9YHn_HADN-a1ZRo4f3j729vACFYxxvIxuKpBwZ29NPYAF1_vaqv-Yz2hhFE6enu88pQqp2VQBBJsDtjWu-LqilC-cUIUILarGHwhBMAKpv7UmoSnx5_OQUETAjmEUJW9s1ehGpQMQtOlnW5X4G8v5gmrqZeM1-_hREfEmavSVRnAYJspYaFIlwAp1a8Vle5PzpW3A3m5OjbnJJNZbExvA0Y0hi6w3_Atsk4zPJwiTu0a99heLSGAC5e9bRz29gbnJWS8xZ2hUAbf5z-zWO3GxOIvrluXnp1vg5abFeS0xeDigAjT3XCxMDLc_3WW0r9tIaQd4v6YnaBNqJPGgeVj-hDYi-LJjaSXzu3JMP3qw58Fi7oNukR1tNnaSZ_32eNMsU%3D)**

If you are wondering who I am, why I’m running for the U.S. Senate, or if investing in me is worth your time, this short bio video should not only provide answers to some lingering questions you may have about me, **but you’ll get to hear straight from the source why I think I’m the best candidate to flip this Democrat-held Senate seat, Republican**.

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. subject: Tell It Like It Is Releases New Ad Taking Trump, Biden To Task On Spending
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Tell It Like It Is PAC
body:
Tell It Like It Is Releases New Ad Taking Trump, Biden To Task On Spending | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/57fe7eeb1da4/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13560124-bio63ogl56-13560224?e=d0a9afa930)
---
|
---
|
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
October 3, 2023
Contact: [press@tellitlikeitispac.com](mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com?subject=null&body=null)
**Tell It Like It Is PAC Releases New Ad Taking Trump, Biden To Task On Spending
** _Calls Out Trump For Hiding From Debates_
**ARLINGTON, VA —** As Governor Chris Christie [blasts](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=cef47975a4&e=d0a9afa930) former President Donald Trump’s ongoing refusal to debate, Tell It Like It Is PAC today released its latest television ad of the 2024 cycle. Entitled “Seven Trillion,” the :30 second spot is a six-figure buy that will air statewide on broadcast and cable in New Hampshire and across digital platforms.
The ad includes footage of Governor Christie from the second GOP presidential debate from the Ronald Reagan Presidential Library taking both Trump and President Joe Biden to task for their free-spending ways. Governor Christie blamed both men for “kicking the can down the road” and avoiding making hard decisions.
Christie went on to say that, “Biden hides in his basement and Trump refuses to debate, he hides behind the walls of his golf clubs in Bedminster and Mar-a-Lago.”
Since announcing his 2024 candidacy, Governor Christie has made growing the economy and getting spending under control a[ central pillar of his campaign](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=6c93b49f51&e=d0a9afa930). As Governor of New Jersey, Christie inherited an[ $11 billion](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=11995ed18d&e=d0a9afa930) budget deficit that he balanced without raising taxes.
Over the weekend, Governor Christie [accused Trump](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=c0abf839d1&e=d0a9afa930) of seeking to, “to end these things {debates} for purely selfish reasons because he doesn’t want to give exposure to the candidates who are challenging him out there.”
**“Seven Trillion”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=e01af60bed&e=d0a9afa930)
**TRANSCRIPT FOR “Seven Trillion” (TV:30)**
**Chris Christie:** _During the Trump administration, they added $7 trillion. Seven trillion dollars in national debt.
__And now the Biden administration has put another $5 trillion on and counting._
_None of them are willing to take on the difficult issues, they just want to keep kicking the can down the road.__
And yet, we don’t get any answers because Joe Biden hides in his basement.__
And Donald Trump, he hides behind the walls of his golf clubs and won’t show up here to answer questions like all the rest of us are up here to answer._**
VO:** _Tell It Like It Is PAC is responsible for the content of this advertising._
_-###-_

Friends, In 35 days the voters of Kentucky will have their chance to decide what the future of Kentucky will look like. So much is on the line for our children, for our communities, for our law enforcement, and for our economy. This critical decision will change everything for our beloved Commonwealth. Kentucky can't afford 4 more years of Andy Beshear and his LIBERAL policies. Over the next 35 days we must get our message out all across Kentucky. That's where you come in. Today we kick off our massive _**[October Money Bomb Week](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/f17650cddd8b44053947229f28c3afba/64ae00914172cfb1c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_ and we are working hard to get as many $5 or more contributions as possible. Our goal is BIG, but we know we can count on you. **[Pitch in $5, $15, $25, $50, or more to join our October Money Bomb Week!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/f17650cddd8b44053947229f28c3afba/fc3d1d0067f33694c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**

| | On Saturday, Congress passed legislation to keep the government funded after Kevin McCarthy's last-minute turnaround after weeks of dragging his feet to cater to Donald Trump and the extreme MAGA wing of his party. Republicans threatened to hold our government, and our economy, hostage to score political points ahead of the 2024 election, and it endangered the health, safety, and livelihoods of countless people. **_This doesn't happen when Democrats are in charge._** No one wins when the government shuts down due to political grandstanding. It's different when Democrats are in charge; we work together toward bipartisan solutions to keep the government funded. **Put bluntly: House Republicans are failing Americans.** These latest antics from the MAGA wing of the Republican party were dangerous, and reckless, and will have lasting impacts on everyday people. Congress needs common sense, not shenanigans, and Democrats are ready to deliver real solutions after the 2024 elections when we win back the House and hold the Senate. _Jeff_ **** | **Express Donate:** **If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**

clean_body: Democrats are working hard to get things done. | | | | On Saturday, Congress passed legislation to keep the government funded after Kevin McCarthy's last-minute turnaround after weeks of dragging his feet to cater to Donald Trump and the extreme MAGA wing of his party. Republicans threatened to hold our government, and our economy, hostage to score political points ahead of the 2024 election, and it endangered the health, safety, and livelihoods of countless people. This doesn't happen when Democrats are in charge. No one wins when the government shuts down due to political grandstanding. It's different when Democrats are in charge; we work together toward bipartisan solutions to keep the government funded. Put bluntly: House Republicans are failing Americans. These latest antics from the MAGA wing of the Republican party were dangerous, and reckless, and will have lasting impacts on everyday people. Congress needs common sense, not shenanigans, and Democrats are ready to deliver real solutions after the 2024 elections when we win back the House and hold the Senate. name: Mark Robinson
subject: God wanted me to send this to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
If it is His will for me to be, it will be!

| |
---
| | | | | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdnhgdsds45n5q6e3pvpq082univutn3na51bqn8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cphm8ob2cth2bs) |
Friend,

My father was an abusive alcoholic that beat my mother, but he was still my father & he provided for us.

When he died, my mother took a job taking care of other peoples' kids to provide for her own and to make sure that my siblings and I had a childhood.

Woke liberals will tell you that such an upbringing makes me a Democrat.

**But no matter what the woke media and liberal talking heads tell you, it is my faith in God that has made me the man I am today.

It is my faith in God that guided me to free myself from the left's welfare plantation & achieve the American Dream. **

My story is a success story & according to Joe Biden & Kamala Harris- black people can't succeed in America without their help.

Who I am & what I represent destroys the foundation of the Democratic party that race, gender, and economic status determine who we are as Americans.

Trust me- nothing gets the blood of a Democrat boiling more than beating them at their own game.

You should have seen how much they spent, and what they did to me when I humiliated them the first time back in 2020 by becoming the first black Lt. Governor of North Carolina.

And now that I'm running for Governor- there is no way they're going to let me, a REPUBLICAN, become the first black man to hold that office either.

Joe Biden & Kamala Harris are already campaigning against me. They're spending millions to make an example out of me- to punish me.

_**That 's why I'm humbly asking YOU for help today & I hope you won't get mad at me for it.

Will you chip in a few bucks to ensure we have what it takes to hold the line against the Democrats and stop their millionaire donors from buying this race?**_
| [**CLICK HERE TO CONTRIBUTE**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4c7evud66sg042hbnfni7plp4fv3ngv8617c3ng_rp22sh2s8i66p73cphm8ob2cth2bs)
---

Folks like you who step up to meet our challenges head on are & always will be the backbone of American greatness. You are what makes America Great & this campaign will be no different.

Thank YOU!

-Mark Robinson

|

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper.)| |
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country.[](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
__But, in order to keep this curriculum**free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](http://trk.secureandprosper.). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---

| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Bill Spadea
subject: Join our Fall Luncheon
body:
Peter, We are excited to announce the third Women for Common Sense NJ event: our Fall Luncheon happening in Bergen County on
|
---
| Peter, We are excited to announce the third Women for Common Sense NJ event:**our Fall Luncheon happening in Bergen County on October 24th from 12-3PM at Ianchetti's Kitchen**(918 Prospect Street, Glen Rock, NJ 07452). Our first two events sold out quickly, so [**click here to save your spot now.**](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/4a428bca5a8bc8db1648f76ca900725f/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnMVvI71FhIjWIeocpkMt6rquY2Xhf2-t8FTQdeZ5n-GdBxDylFOUQwA3utu2AxpIzJhgyGlZc0qz19b2XMuxNCgZL0JZdwKCx9fwBIxjy3PnGlAvUCG77WIZR5vwkESbWJEilerGfx7bdyfPar2IEhiGn2KsGK0uyt1CQLLDsVHOVCvay1LxZyLRBoZx7Hq9JckE6lldGfl25mDjNddTwU3zapq-cqVCIM8_j4ixfxuHJ0K9ZY4=) This will be a wonderful gathering celebrating powerful women (and men who support us) who are truly changing New Jersey for the better. We will be joined by Founder of Common Sense Club and NJ’s Top Media Personality, **Bill Spadea** , as well as a few special guests, including Senator Holly Schepisi and MC Elizabeth Nader.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO LEARN MORE AND SAVE YOUR SPOT](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/6a8dac895622a3d83b3284b07f346b08/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnMVvBb1JSIjlQeoc5g61VOu2jpmJ_73tg04FXWee9xneGYFQVIIyBjFc6ea6HhigsOaSo6BZI6iqn1s38B3PMeDIxWGumk5CPH4Nf4DH2An80AAaJGpkVSazPCvmm0VW5JqUldI3_vO4kf_xpMskW8A0_RTjiVN60e4WYlIdPhoxrlvRWh01vyeSbWxZ224wW1Jcolk3J4uVoYfn4NzvDsK2e9uOtKuSEgV7PyLH4WWc7kERZYw=)
---
|
---
The women of New Jersey are women of common sense! The power of these women has proven to be a driving force in the efforts to save New Jersey from its liberal descent. They have stepped up as leaders and advocates for change, prioritizing the rights of parents and the freedoms of citizens, while intuitively leveraging grassroots movements, community engagement, and effective political activism. This is your chance to connect with New Jersey's best!
Seating for our Fall Luncheon is limited and this is an event you won't want to miss. Make sure you **[click here to RSVP now.](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/720e2669efe8ed892c8f308960124852/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnEXXryBvIhKidYg6h-lQi7mu61hZ-N_bPvBU0HXmeZ_hnTsQilxQUkIAV7o5jgsGKCy45CgoagTlxWvr-J7t2gacuKgWquklBPev4Ql4jm3fZwbQIFEjm3UYpclqscuSVapJmSt94z-PM_cmT7wMkwzG8acYa07xWbs7CEj1-GxUct2Ktuqk-SOR7ALL2veD2ZHiEs2iqa1yPXOx9dvLoRKMXRiba1cuJYry84gUh7dxfAA85GWH)**
---
| You can also call Linda Barba at (201) 359-4747 for more information.
We look forward to an afternoon of shared experiences, important connections and meaningful conversations.
See you soon, Common Sense Action Team
---
|
---
| The Gloucester County GOP has just announced that Riley Gaines will be the keynote speaker at the 6th Annual Chairwoman’s Reception! This special event will be happening on Tuesday, September 19th at 6PM at Adelphia Restaurant in Deptford, New Jersey. Learn more and save your spot here. Riley Gaines is a former University of Kentucky swimmer who stepped into the spotlight last year when she first spoke out against men competing in women’s sports. Gaines became a 12-time NCAA All-American swimmer and a five-time SEC champion. But last year, the integrity of her sport — and female sports as a whole — was called into question when University of Pennsylvania swimmer Lia Thomas, who had competed on the school’s men’s team his freshman, sophomore and junior years, began shattering records in the women’s category. Riley can recall wondering why no one was standing up for her or for any women in the room when a man was awarded the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championships. This moment became her call to action: she felt compelled to defend and protect America’s daughters against the woke left and their gender-denying ideology. Riley has actively pursued her mission by speaking at events and making media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women’s sports and uphold vital truths. I spoke to Riley in our Common Ground podcast. Listen to her story HERE. Everything that Riley Gaines stands for is common sense. Click here to learn more about the 6th Annual Chairwoman's Reception that Riley will be headlining as the keynote speaker. Let's come together on September 19th to make a statement, to inspire change, and to take the reins of America's future. We look forward to standing with you. Until next time, Bill & The Common Sense Action Team
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/13763942/0b522324c24a130a) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

body:
This will just take 30 seconds....

Sorry to bug you, but we urgently need your opinion on this.

Washington is in the middle of a MAJOR spending fight.

Max Ukropina believes that Republicans need to fight for big spending cuts now. No more kicking the can down the road.

BUT, as one of Orange County's top conservatives, Max wants to know what YOU think Republicans should do:

Fight for significant spending cuts to reduce our deficit NOW! (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/urgent-debt-survey?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=ShutdownSurvey_10323&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=590c33ecb3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_77339c80b8-590c33ecb3-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Max Ukropina believes that Republicans need to fight for big spending cuts now. No more kicking the can down the road. BUT, as one of Orange County's top conservatives, Max wants to know what YOU think Republicans should do: Fight for significant spending cuts to reduce our deficit NOW! () OR Give up on the spending fight and focus on something else. () SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE () Your opinion matters to Max. He wants to know what his supporters think. # **
Beware the Digital Dollar:
Unveiling Its Terrifying Realities!**
The purchasing power of the US dollar is rapidly dwindling. You have been deceived, as the government's promises of financial stability crumble before your own eyes.

Now, more than ever, it is crucial for you to move out of the high-risk zone and[ **take immediate action to protect your wealth**.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj0FvozAUhH-NuYHMszFw4JAsYg8rrapeqpyqh22IKzt2bNMo_74ijXrqdd43M2_QBWuW-0DaIwE4G5UIAGEHAnA93VzcPty_v-Xx9FJexX_X7Ef4QwDyPegf8hlSaYfG7mo7Fmpgi6K80EMtesF4R6kozkPXYl8r6BTr5qURfdfOtF2U5FwuvF9UYQagwGpKWd1wwaFScyfo3PaNpjPjghNOHz0VOh2NxDrlG8bovaukd4UdzjmH9HhsIjDZUKG1ejV4kXr1Vu0UgUmZ1WS0pfLWYixT1mhTGaL5RHnfrWzasntPfotSEzYevtsmE1N-w_jq9xSxI04rsznCxlFm9dQkuoBmvfxurGnJijiocDPWmiRawun62CS9-woAAP__eKeAVg) The solution lies in the timeless power of an asset that the government, banks, and Wall Street don't want you to have.

For years, the government has insisted that the dollar remains a reliable store of value, but the truth is far from what they would have us believe.
The silent erosion of the dollar's purchasing power has left hardworking Americans like you vulnerable, as your savings and investments are silently devaluing.

It's time to expose the deception and **[take decisive steps toward securing your financial future.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj0FvozAUhH-NuYHMszFw4JAsYg8rrapeqpyqh22IKzt2bNMo_74ijXrqdd43M2_QBWuW-0DaIwE4G5UIAGEHAnA93VzcPty_v-Xx9FJexX_X7Ef4QwDyPegf8hlSaYfG7mo7Fmpgi6K80EMtesF4R6kozkPXYl8r6BTr5qURfdfOtF2U5FwuvF9UYQagwGpKWd1wwaFScyfo3PaNpjPjghNOHz0VOh2NxDrlG8bovaukd4UdzjmH9HhsIjDZUKG1ejV4kXr1Vu0UgUmZ1WS0pfLWYixT1mhTGaL5RHnfrWzasntPfotSEzYevtsmE1N-w_jq9xSxI04rsznCxlFm9dQkuoBmvfxurGnJijiocDPWmiRawun62CS9-woAAP__eKeAVg)**

**The signs of the dollar's decline are impossible to ignore**. Inflation is soaring and the cost of everyday goods and services are spiraling out of control.

The government's assurances that this is merely a temporary phenomenon is an utter lie as the hardworking middle class struggles to make ends meet. The erosion of your purchasing power is no accident; it is a consequence of policies that prioritize short-term gains over your long-term financial security. **It doesn 't stop there.** Amidst all the lies and chaos, President Biden snuck in Executive Order 14067. The Digital Dollar, poised to roll out soon, is the Fed's sinister attempt to **[end privacy as you know it by tracking and controlling your every financial move](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj0FvozAUhH-NuYHMszFw4JAsYg8rrapeqpyqh22IKzt2bNMo_74ijXrqdd43M2_QBWuW-0DaIwE4G5UIAGEHAnA93VzcPty_v-Xx9FJexX_X7Ef4QwDyPegf8hlSaYfG7mo7Fmpgi6K80EMtesF4R6kozkPXYl8r6BTr5qURfdfOtF2U5FwuvF9UYQagwGpKWd1wwaFScyfo3PaNpjPjghNOHz0VOh2NxDrlG8bovaukd4UdzjmH9HhsIjDZUKG1ejV4kXr1Vu0UgUmZ1WS0pfLWYixT1mhTGaL5RHnfrWzasntPfotSEzYevtsmE1N-w_jq9xSxI04rsznCxlFm9dQkuoBmvfxurGnJijiocDPWmiRawun62CS9-woAAP__eKeAVg)**[.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj0FvozAUhH-NuYHMszFw4JAsYg8rrapeqpyqh22IKzt2bNMo_74ijXrqdd43M2_QBWuW-0DaIwE4G5UIAGEHAnA93VzcPty_v-Xx9FJexX_X7Ef4QwDyPegf8hlSaYfG7mo7Fmpgi6K80EMtesF4R6kozkPXYl8r6BTr5qURfdfOtF2U5FwuvF9UYQagwGpKWd1wwaFScyfo3PaNpjPjghNOHz0VOh2NxDrlG8bovaukd4UdzjmH9HhsIjDZUKG1ejV4kXr1Vu0UgUmZ1WS0pfLWYixT1mhTGaL5RHnfrWzasntPfotSEzYevtsmE1N-w_jq9xSxI04rsznCxlFm9dQkuoBmvfxurGnJijiocDPWmiRawun62CS9-woAAP__eKeAVg)

**Imagine a world** where every aspect of your financial transactions is meticulously recorded, scrutinized, and controlled by the government. The Digital Dollar, **[as outlined in the Executive Order](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj0FvozAUhH-NuYHMszFw4JAsYg8rrapeqpyqh22IKzt2bNMo_74ijXrqdd43M2_QBWuW-0DaIwE4G5UIAGEHAnA93VzcPty_v-Xx9FJexX_X7Ef4QwDyPegf8hlSaYfG7mo7Fmpgi6K80EMtesF4R6kozkPXYl8r6BTr5qURfdfOtF2U5FwuvF9UYQagwGpKWd1wwaFScyfo3PaNpjPjghNOHz0VOh2NxDrlG8bovaukd4UdzjmH9HhsIjDZUKG1ejV4kXr1Vu0UgUmZ1WS0pfLWYixT1mhTGaL5RHnfrWzasntPfotSEzYevtsmE1N-w_jq9xSxI04rsznCxlFm9dQkuoBmvfxurGnJijiocDPWmiRawun62CS9-woAAP__eKeAVg),** is portrayed under a sinister guise of convenience with instantaneous access to funds via our phones that are ironically under constant full surveillance.

This shift grants unprecedented powers to the central authorities, jeopardizing the very essence of your privacy. **It is a grave threat that you cannot afford to ignore.
**
**Your personal choices will no longer be yours to make.** The consequences are profound. The government can dictate how you spend your money, monitor your purchases, and potentially freeze your assets at will. name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: We're not out of the woods
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Dear Friend,
First, I want to thank the MANY supporters who made a contribution to help us reach our goal before the Sept 30th fundraising deadline. This campaign is fueled by donors like you, and my team and I can't thank you enough!
If you missed the deadline, don't worry. The new fundraising quarter is in full swing. Click here to make a contribution and help us start the quarter with a bang! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Today, I'm writing about the other Sept 30th deadline. On Saturday, Democrats bailed out Speaker McCarthy and House Republicans by helping to pass a temporary spending plan to prevent a government shutdown. The key word is temporary. The resolution funds the Federal government for 45 days to give lawmakers time to work out a longer term solution.
That's good news, but the Freedom Caucus, led by my opponent, Scott Perry is already back at it creating chaos in the House, and virtually ensuring another showdown in the next 45 days.
We can't run our government this way. The Freedom Caucus is really the Chaos Caucus, and they must be stopped! Donate now to help us defeat "Chaos Caucus" Chair Scott Perry in 2024. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
At the heart of the budget debate are the Chaos Caucus' demands for spending cuts that would harm our country in countless ways, and they will do almost anything to pass their radical agenda.
In fact Chaos Caucus member Matt Gaetz is already trying to vacate Kevin McCarthy's position as Speaker. Why? Because radical House Republicans are furious that McCarthy worked with Democrats to do the right thing and avoid a shutdown that would have hurt American families.
Congress should be working to come up with a real spending plan that they can pass before the November deadline. Instead, Scott Perry's Chaos Caucus is busy trying to make Congress even more dysfunctional.
If you want less dysfunction in Congress, then I am asking you to make a contribution to help us build the strongest campaign possible to defeat Scott Perry in 2024. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
PA-10 is a top targeted district for 2024. Last year, we came close to defeating Chaos Caucus Chair Scott Perry - a lot closer than anyone expected - and we did it without the support of national Dems. Because of our performance in 2022, next year, things will be different. This district is a top target because Perry is vulnerable. We can win, but we can't do it without you.
If you're ready to see the Chaos Caucus members replaced with responsible leaders who will work to serve the American people, then let's start with replacing their leader, Scott Perry.
Thank you for your ongoing support,
Shamaine
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]
Daniels For Congress
P.O. Box 60654
Harrisburg, PA 17106

body:
Help us help you.
| Team, This year, corrupt Republican politicians have thrown the voices of Ohioans out the window and made helping their special interest buddies their number one priority. Hence their non-stop efforts to attack voting rights and restrict reproductive healthcare in the state. Meanwhile, Ohio Democrats have been fighting back to protect our democracy, safeguard the right to vote, and make sure that reproductive healthcare decisions are taken out of the hands of politicians. ** ** However, to keep up our work to fight for you, not the GOP’s greedy special interests, we need to know _your_ top priorities. **[Please take just two minutes to fill out our short priorities survey to share with us what issues matter to you most right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70870724/430574914/746146842?refcode=odp_em_231003_1&ms=odp_em_231003_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTg3MDk1Yy0wNTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TMRY-lLtQRhZ3LPAJ4BnVWfPGLv-qTm6S9fr19lfJu8=&emci=bcaa339d-6d61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9a87095c-0562-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25291327)** In order for us to better represent you and your interests, it’s important that we hear directly from Ohioans to learn about what matters most to folks across the state. Whether your priority is lowering prescription drug costs, creating good paying jobs, or protecting the full range of reproductive healthcare access, we want to know! We use your responses to plan for the future of the party and ensure our officials and candidates are well-informed about the concerns of their constituents. **[Help us help you and take our short survey now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70870725/430574915/746146842?refcode=odp_em_231003_1&ms=odp_em_231003_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTg3MDk1Yy0wNTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TMRY-lLtQRhZ3LPAJ4BnVWfPGLv-qTm6S9fr19lfJu8=&emci=bcaa339d-6d61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9a87095c-0562-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25291327)** Thank you, Liz Walters | **A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. name: Cori Bush
subject: RE: New bill to end solitary confinement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
I introduced the End Solitary Confinement Act with colleagues, advocates, and survivors of solitary confinement. | |
---
Peter, Solitary confinement is a form of torture that causes devastating harm. And on any given day, more than 122,000 people in the U.S. are subjected to this inhumane cruelty. President Biden pledged to end solitary confinement in federal detention facilities, but it has increased during his presidency. By passing legislation I recently introduced -- **_the End Solitary Confinement Act_** \-- we can put an end to solitary confinement once and for all. [**Sign on to save lives by becoming a grassroots co-sponsor of the _End Solitary Confinement Act_ today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mnGhTdRYWPaRZJRJCgnUXGYNgapqacPbwF-8lGd5JxoCbtjCwx8RwxXyUBJ6yaqbx0dbvq3gsdc3mU2BRJivliuWpJHQJpK59d-wSYmga58gJMxVqGiFmCr6em3iUSeWU96IUwoXuZV0a_swTIhUNn57vyxF_Ny6y32dlNcj3xaD9uNCo7X9JWeq18KmcqO_r5qvNTZbCOeKYYz2BMj360zhnO1Nh90DWbAJ0Qp17Y4gSeeV6vZP0GBzB673ue9phnAmUiRXpOfcqNNYWnK90Hy0uHLcmDlWzH-Aqkeel_3mJ0nNu-F8WICqBava5-pDNc6qC_1bHlP1ZZ4kyha9bfpeqaJaXG-dG6o5iJEmQJBq5MIC1lDmvmIKvmp5RUIlWKexBayti2IJYu_PZsBD7cJU0iHSFdGf4x25o-eDvPh199B0DDoNse71ViC3STCnIKO1r10Lng7vr_TzcCITT9mKvz4lHxIIN_ihx7gan8yIBZnpTvrQI2foA8sQHmHz5/404/JcIlc5pURNKxh83P_Gp_XA/h0/kt3N-erCq4GM-PlmqXNiH_6t_s3rbnGfT9PeGoSx-LU) **[SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mnGhTdRYWPaRZJRJCgnUXGYNgapqacPbwF-8lGd5JxoCbtjCwx8RwxXyUBJ6yaqbx0dbvq3gsdc3mU2BRJivliuWpJHQJpK59d-wSYmga58gJMxVqGiFmCr6em3iUSeWU96IUwoXuZV0a_swTIhUNn57vyxF_Ny6y32dlNcj3xaD9uNCo7X9JWeq18KmcqO_r5qvNTZbCOeKYYz2BMj360zhnO1Nh90DWbAJ0Qp17Y4gSeeV6vZP0GBzB673ue9phnAmUiRXpOfcqNNYWnK90HzdBX4UFqxSQhsc6ED7Cou-2E5zn49G6_vBJNBKxsAJSR3d25rDCRAb0jyF0GH4aTQhBegp0M4iBZa-rTs7zWrCxujzzvBkMvZs7cX95IU1tZqhpRJWcRs_dKKl-H9LzfJnAias7YhUWQBeXwlfSF0rmbao0sp6r-XDey3BbQHkMJMTp268ryxsNkmnsxL6MlanPXiCCEI3Yog7TgyakE2orxARt-m1cQY10BwEPWep_/404/JcIlc5pURNKxh83P_Gp_XA/h1/jZTywezdZzhDQNz2mTE4bHHJfpK7Pmd5KrsgN1hhYKc) ** Please check out yesterday’s email or the petition page for more information about the legislation, which would expand incarcerated people’s due process rights. Together, we are building a more just and equitable world. With love, Cori
* * *
\---Original Message---
Peter, Over 122,000 people are locked in solitary confinement for 22 hours or more each day across federal, state, and local prisons and jails. Even more people are in solitary inside immigration detention facilities, and many are stuck in torturous isolation for months or years. UN experts have condemned solitary as psychological torture -- and that’s exactly what it is. It’s traumatic and it rips away people’s humanity. It’s also disproportionately inflicted on Black and brown folks, young people, LGBTQ+ people, and other marginalized communities. So I introduced the **_End Solitary Confinement Act_** with colleagues, advocates, and survivors of solitary confinement to end this heinous and immoral practice. [**Please sign on today to support the End Solitary Confinement Act. Together we can save lives and stop torture.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mnGhTdRYWPaRZJRJCgnUXGYNgapqacPbwF-8lGd5JxoCbtjCwx8RwxXyUBJ6yaqbx0dbvq3gsdc3mU2BRJivliuWpJHQJpK59d-wSYmga58gJMxVqGiFmCr6em3iUSeWU96IUwoXuZV0a_swTIhUNn57vyxF_Ny6y32dlNcj3xaD9uNCo7X9JWeq18KmcqO_r5qvNTZbCOeKYYz2BMj360zhnO1Nh90DWbAJ0Qp17Y4gSeeV6vZP0GBzB673ue9phnAmUiRXpOfcqNNYWnK90H1Ez894iPKw9-Supd53t9FGRBC23eCEVHcyG62B_qrcaZDFvZJ7enIg55L-Dd46jCtYZ97pGLTjGKBDQYeARyswT7kd0M46VUnevGy3YcR-IyeIRbp_4Hqh3uMBTH0q3X-CVawMjGYM54iF1QbDGKeJmvkrXmF-uEgioLuOZeC_BWbXD7PQgjCowtVjcvJcPfb7UviROUBUJ72zbHNgi0Ig4TgpJILauIBg8HA11lkUT/404/JcIlc5pURNKxh83P_Gp_XA/h2/H3lrgN9gMJw37YgDecgZJnWNKXmTLV_bwc5wowEoCw8) **[SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mnGhTdRYWPaRZJRJCgnUXGYNgapqacPbwF-8lGd5JxoCbtjCwx8RwxXyUBJ6yaqbx0dbvq3gsdc3mU2BRJivliuWpJHQJpK59d-wSYmga58gJMxVqGiFmCr6em3iUSeWU96IUwoXuZV0a_swTIhUNn57vyxF_Ny6y32dlNcj3xaD9uNCo7X9JWeq18KmcqO_r5qvNTZbCOeKYYz2BMj360zhnO1Nh90DWbAJ0Qp17Y4gSeeV6vZP0GBzB673ue9phnAmUiRXpOfcqNNYWnK90Hww5SK1Xzj-gUBmnD-3Ph2gf_nJos6JmeSwD9asmwJFv6hDtdAVMBj-mYqgxhHe3UUnhvaigYsa6LzR6jO-8eP-KGgoPnoTK0g6HLhOtZefbHD87sPusc9wCqNH4XSrtChvyhFwQOJk96qxWfwN_3ZbjIyIMPi2aUgi9Wvqcj3Y0bq7rsipfU_4ABM4g1nbP3HIjgEG7tvmCkzrHsRYnkgNzA7DRhwKk-4MxB94v4Iaq/404/JcIlc5pURNKxh83P_Gp_XA/h3/tHdlhjY42OcFQzbFThUYmxKaBuNt9XTdGBd-GxZK-v8) ** We need justice for people like Kalief Browder, who was 16 years old when he was arrested for a crime he didn’t commit. He was held in solitary confinement for 700 days, and when he got out, he died by suicide. An inhumane, cruel, torturous system of criminalization and isolation killed Kalief, as it has killed so many others. To save lives, we urgently need to pass the _End Solitary Confinement Act_. If passed, the bill would:
* End solitary confinement in federal prisons, jails, and other detention settings -- with an exception for a maximum of 4 hours for emergency de-escalation (not punishment).

* Ensure all people incarcerated in federal facilities have meaningful access (at least 14 hours) to out-of-cell time, group programming, and basic needs and services each day.

* Expand due process protections for incarcerated people, including ensuring access to representation and neutral decision-makers.

* Create oversight and enforcement mechanisms, including a community monitoring body that could investigate complaints, and mandating regular reporting on the use of solitary and incidents of self-harm.

* Provide additional protections against placing vulnerable populations in solitary.

* Incentivize states and local governments to end solitary confinement in state and local facilities.
