clean_body: I introduced the End Solitary Confinement Act with colleagues, advocates, and survivors of solitary confinement. | | Peter, Solitary confinement is a form of torture that causes devastating harm. And on any given day, more than 122,000 people in the U.S. are subjected to this inhumane cruelty. President Biden pledged to end solitary confinement in federal detention facilities, but it has increased during his presidency. By passing legislation I recently introduced -- the End Solitary Confinement Act \-- we can put an end to solitary confinement once and for all. Please check out yesterday’s email or the petition page for more information about the legislation, which would expand incarcerated people’s due process rights. Together, we are building a more just and equitable world. With love, Cori \---Original Message--- Peter, Over 122,000 people are locked in solitary confinement for 22 hours or more each day across federal, state, and local prisons and jails. Even more people are in solitary inside immigration detention facilities, and many are stuck in torturous isolation for months or years. UN experts have condemned solitary as psychological torture -- and that’s exactly what it is. It’s traumatic and it rips away people’s humanity. It’s also disproportionately inflicted on Black and brown folks, young people, LGBTQ+ people, and other marginalized communities. So I introduced the End Solitary Confinement Act with colleagues, advocates, and survivors of solitary confinement to end this heinous and immoral practice. We need justice for people like Kalief Browder, who was 16 years old when he was arrested for a crime he didn’t commit. He was held in solitary confinement for 700 days, and when he got out, he died by suicide. An inhumane, cruel, torturous system of criminalization and isolation killed Kalief, as it has killed so many others. To save lives, we urgently need to pass the End Solitary Confinement Act. If passed, the bill would: End solitary confinement in federal prisons, jails, and other detention settings -- with an exception for a maximum of 4 hours for emergency de-escalation (not punishment). Ensure all people incarcerated in federal facilities have meaningful access (at least 14 hours) to out-of-cell time, group programming, and basic needs and services each day. Expand due process protections for incarcerated people, including ensuring access to representation and neutral decision-makers. Create oversight and enforcement mechanisms, including a community monitoring body that could investigate complaints, and mandating regular reporting on the use of solitary and incidents of self-harm. Provide additional protections against placing vulnerable populations in solitary. Incentivize states and local governments to end solitary confinement in state and local facilities. Genuine community safety will never be achieved so long as we rely on mass incarceration and torture. I’m pushing to end our country’s instinct to criminalize, incarcerate, and punish -- and instead build systems of care that see the humanity in every person. With love, Cori ** Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Cori Bush for Congress, please .

subject: We're Hiring
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bartonfordesoto/thank-you-12650567?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| We're hiring!
We are looking for talented and highly driven individuals to join our team, from interns, to administrative assistants, to investigators, to attorneys.
If you are interested in serving the people of DeSoto County, and would like to apply, please send us your resume by clicking below.
---
| [APPLY NOW](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=230fb44b89&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=8b7df63108&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=3b98d65916&e=3c5d31b5ad)_
---
| |
---

**Meet Matthew Barton**
---

Matthew Barton grew up in Petal, Mississippi in a blue-collar family. His mother was a director at Tupperware and his father owned the small, family business – Barton Fence Company – where Matthew worked growing up.
After attending public school, Matthew attended Pearl River Community College and Warner University, where he studied Business Administration. He holds a law degree from Ole Miss Law, where he graduated Cum Laude and received the interviewing and counseling award.
In 2011, Matthew married his high school sweetheart, Megan. After graduating from Ole Miss Law in 2015, they moved to DeSoto County where Matthew started a law firm and Megan continued working at the Desoto County Schools as a Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant.
During law school, Matthew served as an intern in the DeSoto County District Attorney’s Office where he presented cases to grand jury, tried cases to verdict, and performed all functions of a practicing attorney. He has served as a prosecutor for the City of Southaven and the City of Horn Lake and now serves as a special prosecutor for Southaven, Horn Lake, and DeSoto County Justice Courts – where he’s established a strict, tough on crime reputation.
As an attorney, Mathew has dealt with every type of criminal matter ranging from DUI to capital murder, in more than 37 courts across Mississippi.
Matthew is a member of the Federalist Society, a conservative legal association, an enhanced conceal carry permit holder, Krewe of Hernando member, NRA member, and donates his time serving as a pro bono attorney to Veterans every year.
Today, Matthew, his wife Megan, and their daughter Eleanor live in Hernando where Matthew owns his private law firm. Eleanor attends Pre-K at Hernando United Methodist Church and Megan is a stay at home mom after seven years with DeSoto County schools.
| | | | | | | [](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=43559f008c&e=3c5d31b5ad)

Peter,

It’s Montana U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy.

I’m a former Navy SEAL and small business owner, not a politician, and _**I’m learning that in politics, things tend to happen all at once or not at all**_.

Coming off a busy summer, things have quieted down a bit for us here in Montana. I wanted to take a minute to reintroduce myself to you. **[I’m linking a 65-second video to the image below that I’m hoping you’ll watch today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a51bebd5e8bf4bcd99b388b45dd585b6&_e=LxB-i11V7wQZ1GvMhDF89wXyjVgVD8crosB5U0D07DThwdb9CK1oeFS2nrpz8e1V-qXq9lOShFNF0vTtQLOQ7RNOzfG7LC93W5kflFKr3aAqlENHAJ0oRDJ5ZK85_kjoan66ciWCoZTEH4FzKWUuL_qiUMRx1P2hg3Y2d0o7s3ikQECbbbrG9dNJJAQJd3FaSdLZrbpA6c-ysHe3qvaGtyc2VLaWc8CzZw34dms2hOQsR0i5hOMKN8I00OmND9lMh8r0fApWSJdvG4IDm-h67hT-bxgsV5yzjNWTAlGHZE91jbqZRSVIjzvehvk0DoQJF10JgrQX_SfmOuQDFpfSNjpXAvkpQ2b-tQVDt3nPaWCN5cWfwI97c_zFJ8VnsqTu6bC0XrUwVweovlyOXjwu7hMaEtkGzLB4zwdiwDHmkS0%3D)**

If you are wondering who I am, why I’m running for the U.S. Senate, or if investing in me is worth your time, this short bio video should not only provide answers to some lingering questions you may have about me, **but you’ll get to hear straight from the source why I think I’m the best candidate to flip this Democrat-held Senate seat, Republican**.

"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. clean_body: I’ve been emailing you for two months now, but I realized, you may not really know who I am. So, take a minute, literally, to get to know me a bit better. | | Peter, It’s Montana U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. I’m a former Navy SEAL and small business owner, not a politician, and I’m learning that in politics, things tend to happen all at once or not at all. Coming off a busy summer, things have quieted down a bit for us here in Montana. I wanted to take a minute to reintroduce myself to you. If you are wondering who I am, why I’m running for the U.S. Senate, or if investing in me is worth your time, this short bio video should not only provide answers to some lingering questions you may have about me, but you’ll get to hear straight from the source why I think I’m the best candidate to flip this Democrat-held Senate seat, Republican. God Bless, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. In his first ad he cites opposition to things like gas stoves – a bipartisan bill that I actually voted to support! I am not at all surprised that he announced his candidacy one day after we witnessed the chaos and confusion of extreme House Republicans, who could not even pass their own bill to avoid a government shutdown and on the same day that Trump once again appears in court. We in the fifth district have not forgotten that this guy brought Kevin McCarthy and Elise Stefanik to CT to campaign for him. Let me be absolutely clear: George Logan will only bring their dysfunction to Connecticut. He is an anti-choice Trump extremist, and the wrong choice for our district. I will do everything in my power to beat him yet again, so that Trump and dysfunctional House Republicans do not have an ally in the district that I call home. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = In the last nine months it has been clear that this House Republican majority is unable to govern. name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: [RESPONSE REQUESTED] Will you take our Gun Safety Priorities Survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
We know it’s hard to believe, but we are now in the last few months of 2023.
We have made many strides this year towards a future free from gun violence—including a federal office of gun violence prevention, tightening background check loopholes, and landmark progress in states nationwide.
But make no mistake: we’re still in the midst of a gun violence crisis. The United States has more guns, weaker gun laws, and higher rates of gun violence than any other developed country in the world. Gun violence is the **_number one_** cause of death for our nation’s children.
As we head into the last few months of this year, we’re working to understand the gun safety priorities of supporters like you. Our work to end gun violence is far from over, and we need to finish out the year strong by passing lifesaving gun safety legislation at every level of our government.
[**We depend on concerned folks like you sharing their gun safety priorities to help us shape our work. Will you please share your top gun safety priorities with us by taking our October Gun Safety Priorities Survey?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/oct23-priorities-sv-em/?source=em231003-1-30&refcode2=6676.3935704.Qjgaj1&akid=6676%2E3935704%2EQjgaj1)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/oct23-priorities-sv-em/?source=em231003-1-30&refcode2=6676.3935704.Qjgaj1&akid=6676%2E3935704%2EQjgaj1)**
Our work is only possible through supporters like you who care about commonsense gun legislation. That’s why your opinions matter so much to us.
So please, use this link to take our October Gun Safety Priorities Survey today:
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/Oct-2023-Priorities**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/oct23-priorities-sv-em/?source=em231003-1-30&refcode2=6676.3935704.Qjgaj1&akid=6676%2E3935704%2EQjgaj1)
Thank you so much for taking the time to complete our survey. We really value your input.
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=6676%2E3935704%2EQjgaj1) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Read/Act News
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.-2DKTU5OQPIcNiRQ)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ -Hillsdale College's digest of liberty-author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'-a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for-and opposition to-socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://trk.readactnews.-fdQ)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"-including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory-which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race-are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://trk.readactnews.-siAKK3RTGR0bKKlX_qhQ)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember-**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyNzYtYjc5ZDczMmE2YzA2NDMzYmIwNDdlMmU2N2RlZjliZWYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/EfwPi38eWjQz-GV9pJ4Z7g) to unsubscribe.

body:
It’s important.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70872107/430579695/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4480-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmE0NDU5YS0wNjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ovc1D59i4Bdm3SkdygC62PPAhYg2JpFgd5ie4fBaE9Q=)
Hi, there, it's Debbie. I just had a meeting with my campaign team, and I wanted to get a note out to you about where things stand right now. It’s important.
Just a few days ago, our campaign had its first public FEC reporting deadline. Everybody from Rick Scott to Mitch McConnell to political pundits will be looking to see what we’ve raised. **They’ll use it to judge the strength of our campaign.**
Unfortunately, we're already pacing $2,112 behind our daily $75,000 fundraising goal. **[I simply cannot fall short after the first big test of our campaign, so will you split $5 between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's to help get us back on track so we can defeat Rick Scott?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70872108/430579696/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk4480-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmE0NDU5YS0wNjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ovc1D59i4Bdm3SkdygC62PPAhYg2JpFgd5ie4fBaE9Q=)**
We cannot afford to fall behind so early on in the election cycle. My opponent Rick Scott is one of the richest senators in the country, so he's more than capable of self-funding his campaign. In fact, he’s already poured millions into his campaign, and last time around, he spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this seat.
Look, team, I’ve already fought opponents like Rick Scott and beat them. I’m not afraid to face him or anybody who doesn’t put Florida first — especially as he continues to get rich while taking away our rights, abusing our government, and raising costs for families._No más._ We’re going to do something about it. We’re going to win.
But winning will take staying ahead of our grassroots goals, especially when Rick Scott can cut himself a massive check at any moment. **[That’s why I’m asking, friends: Please, help me make up this gap by splitting $5 or whatever you can between Kirsten Gillibrand and me to fight back against Rick Scott, win in Florida, and expand our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70872109/430579697/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4480-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmE0NDU5YS0wNjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ovc1D59i4Bdm3SkdygC62PPAhYg2JpFgd5ie4fBaE9Q=)**

clean_body: It’s important. | | | = Hi, there, it's Debbie. I just had a meeting with my campaign team, and I wanted to get a note out to you about where things stand right now. It’s important. Just a few days ago, our campaign had its first public FEC reporting deadline. Everybody from Rick Scott to Mitch McConnell to political pundits will be looking to see what we’ve raised. They’ll use it to judge the strength of our campaign. Unfortunately, we're already pacing $2,112 behind our daily $75,000 fundraising goal. = We cannot afford to fall behind so early on in the election cycle. My opponent Rick Scott is one of the richest senators in the country, so he's more than capable of self-funding his campaign. In fact, he’s already poured millions into his campaign, and last time around, he spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this seat. Look, team, I’ve already fought opponents like Rick Scott and beat them. I’m not afraid to face him or anybody who doesn’t put Florida first — especially as he continues to get rich while taking away our rights, abusing our government, and raising costs for families.No más. We’re going to do something about it. We’re going to win. But winning will take staying ahead of our grassroots goals, especially when Rick Scott can cut himself a massive check at any moment. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Thank you so much for your support, Debbie | *

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Can I share something personal?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is a little embarrassing...

| |
---
| | | Friend, can I show you a photo?

---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkiogv7gtr9s6nic6ou18rcrl2ghnfk76c03m72g_rp22sh2s8i66p73cphmcpb2cth2bs "Kevin working at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt")
---

_That 's me in the middle! (And yes, my hair used to be brown if you can believe it)_
Believe it or not, this is a photo of me when I was a teenager working at McCarthy's Yogurt. It was here where I began my first business, Kevin O's Deli, selling sandwiches out of the back of my uncle's yogurt shop.

There are a couple of reasons I'm sharing this photo with you, Friend.
1\. Kevin O's Deli taught me about personal responsibility and hard work. It also demonstrated how overregulation by the government can harm small businesses like my own.

2\. Unfortunately, small businesses like the one I was able to create are not possible in today's economy. The folks running mom and pop shops across America are being crushed by woke corporations run by wealthy elites.
I ultimately discovered public service was the most positive way for me to channel my frustration as a former small business owner, while also helping others in similar situations.
**As your Speaker of the House, I carry this fighting spirit to defend the rights and liberties of hard-working Americans across the country. **
**[If you support my efforts to restore America and make opportunities like Kevin O's Deli possible to thrive again, I would be so grateful for whatever you can chip in.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z15p8l2mdpujhlhb4d0vorisc2cpg6rrnj4a7a28_rp22sh2s8i66p73cphmcpb2cth2bs "If you support my efforts to restore America and make opportunities like Kevin O’s Deli possible to thrive again, I would be so grateful for whatever you can chip in.")**
---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znr7ma1sqb6ue8okrvonq048gr8n8f516iup2bao_rp22sh2s8i66p73cphmcpb2cth2bs "DONATE NOW")
---
Thank you for letting me share this with you,

Kevin
---
| |

* * *
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2m70cf64q4r5o5ck9tn3evhd6chi6eiakt5gk78_rp22sh2s8i66p73cphmcpb2cth2bs "The plan to end Biden's Border Crisis is 1 click away!")
---

1 click. The plan to END Biden's Border Crisis is 1 click away... All I ask for is your written endorsement. **[Will you make just 1 click?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zepv7ttlp4j58in6sstbb83iu8ank41jh9qkp050_rp22sh2s8i66p73cphmcpb2cth2bs "Will you make just 1 click?")**
| [ENDORSE THE GOP BORDER PACKAGE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4hap59c4jp5p9aah23976rruis134o4qfuh9jvo_rp22sh2s8i66p73cphmcpb2cth2bs "ENDORSE THE GOP BORDER PACKAGE")
---

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6unj610m16k1nl3qfjeplqbmp60ctinbghmvqr0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cphmcpb2cth2bs "TV Going Dark")
---

This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. Unfortunately, I come bearing some bad news:

**We 're going to have to cancel our advertising buys unless we see a massive surge of grassroots support.**

_According to my team, if we can manage a $30,000 surge by midnight tonight - we can manage to keep our candidates on air through the end of the month._

**[I'm humbly asking you to help ENSURE our candidates' ads can remain up on the airwaves:](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsc120e14bn4q3kl76nfekn0sbehica1ljp1n098_rp22sh2s8i66p73cphmcpb2cth2bs "I’m humbly asking you to help ENSURE our candidates’ ads can remain up on the airwaves:")**
| [PROTECT GOP CANDIDATES](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlc5m4v202hivj3pacj8okgo8k3hbvualmjheuv8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cphmcpb2cth2bs "PROTECT GOP CANDIDATES")
---

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs042jmtni16a23nt8qc2rctsr99abe01koijaa8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cphmcpb2cth2bs "Lead House Republicans to victory! Donate now!")
---

Kevin McCarthy here. I'll keep this huddle brief.

Voters across the nation called on us to put a stop to Biden's ridiculous anti-America agenda - **but if we miss our critical fundraising goal, we are going to FAIL.**

**I'm only sending this to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down.**

**[This is your last chance to help House Republicans make it to the end zone._It's game over without you._](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl4com7nnkbaopd9rabrf23gmel3esvlci91i58o_rp22sh2s8i66p73cphmcpb2cth2bs "This is your last chance to help House Republicans make it to the end zone. name: =?utf-8?Q?Karen=20Greenhalgh?=
subject: I have the backing of law enforcement
body:
Will you stand with us? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bd465f6480b4/my-work-is-far-from-finished-6069160?e=48b883ea87)
---
| |
---
| | Hi friend- Did you hear the great news? I am honored to have [received the endorsement](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=cd415af11d&e=48b883ea87) of Virginia Beach Fraternal Order of Police Lodge #8 in my race to win reelection as your delegate. Virginia Beach FOP Lodge #8 is the voice of the law enforcement officers who dedicate their lives to protecting and serving our community, and I am truly humbled by their recognition of my dedication to public safety in the House of Delegates.

Virginia Beach police and first responders need full support from elected leaders in Richmond. I have been committed to this idea as Delegate by:
* **Voting to give raises to law enforcement across our Commonwealth**
* **Working to repeal weak-on-crime legislation, which made our communities a more dangerous place to live.**

But I’m nowhere near finished. I believe we must always support the heroes who work every day to keep us safe and hold violent criminals accountable - rather than calling to ‘defund’ them. **More can be done to tackle violent crime, boost our law enforcement and first responders, and get rid of bad policies that favor criminals over law-abiding citizens. ** In a second term as your delegate, I will continue to be committed to these principles. [Join Virginia Beach Fraternal Order of Police Lodge #8 and support my campaign today! ](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=2a9bc4402a&e=48b883ea87)
---
| [Support My Campaign Today! ](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=ea064bba23&e=48b883ea87 "Support My Campaign Today! ")
---
| Thank you for your consideration.
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=7a9e993db5&e=48b883ea87)

body:
| | | Fellow American, we’re FIRED UP after last week’s GOP debate. name: Weston D. Imer
subject: Youth Advisory Council Meeting/Washington, DC Trip Recap.
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Weston D
body:
I got back a couple weeks ago from Washington, DC from the Youth Advisory Council Meeting and here's the update...
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YqzKCTKSpAcuktGDDBov4IaRwen_Q0XCSpM5INHplLDb6pLMok0q7_mfXKO-_5VNFij8h3gyPmdUKVBVuQ8o1J_ZNkInR3ApnTSqyahUpiMFweA5_83hESQgWYDuV5iCPANKpoCS5aQ=&c=Y8ik3LbQdJxWHyzGUcb_VpW4P_WtyryX4yjGCOmS1C6phyFFX5oT3Q==&ch=sN5PhIkYGN2BUEwenvgewP3YAk7oFlptbimGc1jyPuIdIE9oC4C5fg==)
---
---
| Hello Everyone!
Sorry for the delay in this message, been dealing with email account issues.
Thanks to the generous support of many of you, I was able to not only attend the RNC's Youth Advisory Council Meeting, but I was able to attend it in person in Washington, DC at RNC Head Quarters on Capitol Hill.
While attending the meeting I was asked to meet with the RNC's National Field Director to advise the national field program on important strategies for voter outreach and contact and how to get the youth engaged in voter contact operations across the country.
I have been asked to play an integral part in the voter outreach process from the Youth Advisory Council and I just submitted my proposal which you can view by clicking the button below.
---
| | [View my Voter Outreach Plan, submitted to the RNC Here!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YqzKCTKSpAcuktGDDBov4IaRwen_Q0XCSpM5INHplLDb6pLMok0q7zTU3sAFEFtZ7fkjf-5VtS0hoXmLaOn0h09K-Jt2gGaP5rtEo_Gc1MRZHQIhVfbYncWIXIMIUjqqbIpbg_IXyLbkAF08XYtFhu6Gts0-9M8Xg2Upz28Q5vjA4iL1RAVvnUhaUW-HXJUC93l66HuCvan1cszrMInP-2sDgDnL2q3zpXNR1lkP-rU=&c=Y8ik3LbQdJxWHyzGUcb_VpW4P_WtyryX4yjGCOmS1C6phyFFX5oT3Q==&ch=sN5PhIkYGN2BUEwenvgewP3YAk7oFlptbimGc1jyPuIdIE9oC4C5fg==)
---
| After my meeting with the National Field Program, I sat down with my fellow members, Chairwoman McDaniel, and The RNC Political and Comms teams for the Youth Advisory Council meeting.
Our meeting was very productive and the key takeaway was that we must use 5-6 top issues important to Gen Z in our messaging and targeted communications to them to get them on board with the Republican Platform and Plan for America.
We are also going to be rolling out some very exciting things at college campuses across the country both during and after the college football season. More to come on that soon but I wanted to mention that thanks to the amazing coaching of Coach Deion "Prime Time" Sanders, CU Boulder will be included in these outreach efforts!
Bank Your Vote is rolling out to resounding success across the country in more and more states every week. We are laser-focused on continuing to promote voting early instead of on election day.
If you have not already signed the pledge to Vote Early on [BankYourVote.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YqzKCTKSpAcuktGDDBov4IaRwen_Q0XCSpM5INHplLDb6pLMok0q7zTU3sAFEFtZPsJNdhJ_fsbpBWUx45PeWQQDy_gp7XPsxjadD4kpwOJ7fT1bi2_HUkiCewB2bQGjAuod1kfBwFZczk48rF1L6A==&c=Y8ik3LbQdJxWHyzGUcb_VpW4P_WtyryX4yjGCOmS1C6phyFFX5oT3Q==&ch=sN5PhIkYGN2BUEwenvgewP3YAk7oFlptbimGc1jyPuIdIE9oC4C5fg==) I encourage you to go do that now by clicking the link. It is crucial that we win the pre-election day vote in 2024 and the subsequent elections after.
I am proud to report that Gen Z watched post-presidential Debate content at an astounding rate. TikTok alone accounted for 430K combined views of Post Debate Content, whether that was a candidate video or debate footage posted by RNC-affiliated influencers.
Our Influencer program, headed up by YAC Co-Chair CJ Pearson is seeing tremendous growth and success in its endeavors to reach Gen Z with conservative branded content.
I am looking forward to showing you our outreach plans in action very soon and once again I would like to thank you for your support of me in this endeavor to win the Gen Z vote.
If you have any questions on this email or related to the Council Meeting do not hesitate to reach out!
Until next time,
---

clean_body: I got back a couple weeks ago from Washington, DC from the Youth Advisory Council Meeting and here's the update... | | | | == | Hello Everyone! Sorry for the delay in this message, been dealing with email account issues. Thanks to the generous support of many of you, I was able to not only attend the RNC's Youth Advisory Council Meeting, but I was able to attend it in person in Washington, DC at RNC Head Quarters on Capitol Hill. name: Roland Gutierrez
subject: Read this letter I got on the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
Hello there, this is Roland Gutierrez, the TX State Senator running to defeat Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate.
I wanted to share with you a note from someone I met on the campaign trail recently:
Dear Senator Gutierrez,
I’m so moved and inspired by your passion and authenticity as you reflect on the ways our communities go unheard and unserved and how brazen the current political leadership is.
In the six short years that I’ve called Texas home, I have come to love this state but also to see clearly that only bold vision will rebalance the power and resources that we all live with. I revel in hearing your rejection of incrementalism.
Here’s the deal, folks: Bipartisanship, yeah, that’s a nice word. But the fact is, we haven’t had real bipartisanship in Austin or in Washington in many many years.
The far right-wing extremism that is led by people like Ted Cruz, we need to change that. Ted Cruz’s policies are killing our kids, they’re choking our middle class. It’s high time we change it.
I know Cruz is beatable. But I need your help to send him packing. So please, pitch in a few bucks to help my campaign ensure it has the resources it needs to DEFEAT Ted Cruz once and for all. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Thanks for your support,
Roland Gutierrez

body:
| | | Peter,

**Florida is the #1 trophy state that Democrats are eyeing for 2024, Peter.**

They think if they take back the Sunshine State, they’ll be able to win _everywhere._

**_And unfortunately, I’m afraid they’re right._**

If the Left wins Florida, I’m TERRIFIED for what that means for the rest of the country.

If they can flip this Senate seat, we have no chance of retaking our majority.

Election Day may seem far away, but the truth is, we have to lay the groundwork now if we’re going to win. My opponents will be announcing their fundraising numbers soon, and we don’t want to be behind.

**[Will you pitch in now to help us DEFEND Florida from the radical Left?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=5dcb1a69d8024119a7f4fc7c5bbe319e&_e=HeHNXcHBw5yqDQXLgbrWzhXiJAjsVO3wAn4geoalAeKk4g-KHIyOjuqH7tDMS9D1YFio9Lwo4UPOp02JKwW9k3yA2FbpI76j2T65sqRnitMD5h11TzqxaWOPEMp1L--cxPZS3G4NQXq0k8j-TrlriVE05i-y_Bu4N3yuZ7fIRfe7iZaGsTW8WKCTLwf912cjbvQSJhXl2Ld4QR5bG36SUVuLbc7tWf5b_ySMOFD6tuSN-ciqpPFNwbrBlrA1DXSpsmr9RyU994qAl0-M2tZspruKfEfN2GzxRHAXwXsVEHOmiXoH1J6mpyyJoPq_bZcJ2t5A6CzDDq-ZqJCHF70kjmVBskNQ_suABML8Mhr7y2Z6vwXezqDwzRdFI5gCc5Tm)**

Hi Team,

It’s Josh Hawley.

You may know me as the Senator from Missouri, but that’s not my most important job.

_Before I’m a Senator, I’m a husband and a father._

Everything I do in Washington and at home I do for my family - and I do it for yours too.

You see, my kids are still young. I see how innocent they are, and I cherish their childhood.

_But I also know it’s the same childhood innocence the Left is determined to take away._

Be it critical race theory or radical transgender ideology, the Democrat party wants to replace childhood learning with socialist indoctrination.

**I love my children too much to let the Left pollute their minds, and I know you do too.**

**[Join me today to DEFEND childhood from the Democrats!](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=85c207edf9bb425083d443f21e3427e1&_e=u9yXXICMKShcErvmhcDvTtQCbTXIV9AwBC7xFctQcQqsDg9z6eHZNspE4sd3b_YxdsXVWRyBHNLCHEqtdshHE1VdC1bslhusexT4CawR8rI91j31NmkMjFF3P1UpEekO4s7KnUclyihrb3OnaZGAYQSKQVexYUzHx4BYHdBxWMn0_GKnhFvSRuthvMTVantQ7VYyNpRQHShr3SSLtHV_13_8ea6lQoI5JmOkCcmMLolwPxvhMw3oKEo_soPMA-1oci8TDmcztPQsdjgzT0mjynHHnttJ5o34U8TCk2lBkqmtKVCjacqvbAclQiuf9uF6a8uZSqerUPbquMB8OGAuYi6KA4mgQAhYwr6_4Gj2McQ%3D)**

When I was growing up, school was about learning the skills we needed to succeed in the world.

It wasn’t partisan or divisive. We learned values to unify us and make us strong, contributing citizens.

_The same can’t be said for today._

The Leftist education system wants to confuse our children about who they are and divide them because of the color of their skin.

**Here’s the truth that they won’t admit: our children are perfect just the way they are. They don’t have be indoctrinated or changed to fit the radical Left’s agenda.**

**I’m determined to protect the childhood innocence the Left wants to poison, but I need your help.**

**[Stand with me today to STOP the socialist indoctrination of our children!](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=85c207edf9bb425083d443f21e3427e1&_e=u9yXXICMKShcErvmhcDvTtQCbTXIV9AwBC7xFctQcQqsDg9z6eHZNspE4sd3b_YxdsXVWRyBHNLCHEqtdshHE1VdC1bslhusexT4CawR8rI91j31NmkMjFF3P1UpEekO4s7KnUclyihrb3OnaZGAYQSKQVexYUzHx4BYHdBxWMn0_GKnhFvSRuthvMTVantQ7VYyNpRQHShr3SSLtHV_1xrbkOb0F7ZOzTPIby33aiUyYPAapQV44Xnn3eG3zBVUrhpWYxdTVYZHATmk6RfBaiJ78T9IIFDO34tCC-7S0_rqjk7lKNBMdxAbNq5YkbysLHcFnvx-sKUDMR639yXYWWBa90YmIXpYIxhG41UhNkU%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Hi Team, It’s Josh Hawley. You may know me as the Senator from Missouri, but that’s not my most important job. Before I’m a Senator, I’m a husband and a father. Everything I do in Washington and at home I do for my family - and I do it for yours too. You see, my kids are still young. I see how innocent they are, and I cherish their childhood. But I also know it’s the same childhood innocence the Left is determined to take away. Be it critical race theory or radical transgender ideology, the Democrat party wants to replace childhood learning with socialist indoctrination. I love my children too much to let the Left pollute their minds, and I know you do too. When I was growing up, school was about learning the skills we needed to succeed in the world. It wasn’t partisan or divisive. We learned values to unify us and make us strong, contributing citizens. The same can’t be said for today. The Leftist education system wants to confuse our children about who they are and divide them because of the color of their skin. Here’s the truth that they won’t admit: our children are perfect just the way they are. They don’t have be indoctrinated or changed to fit the radical Left’s agenda. I’m determined to protect the childhood innocence the Left wants to poison, but I need your help. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | |

subject: IR on Newsmax: Time for GOP to Call Out Injustice, Unite Around 45th President
body:
Publisher Scott Kaspar and Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas each release op-eds on Newsmax calling for party to unite around Trump and call out injustice.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/78ae5041facb/ir-on-newsmax-time-for-gop-to-call-out-injustice-unite-around-45th-president?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
IR on Newsmax

Kaspar: Trump Faces Legal Challenges - GOP Silence Deafening (https://www.newsmax.com/politics/engoron-giuliani-rnc/2023/10/03/id/1136775/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.newsmax.com/politics/engoron-giuliani-rnc/2023/10/03/id/1136775/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Former President Donald Trump makes a statement at the end the first day of his civil trial at New York State Supreme Court on Oct. 2, 2023 in New York City. New York Atty. Gen. Letitia James is seeking $250 million in damages. (Source: Michael M. Santiago/Getty Images)

While Donald Trump Challenges Bogus $18M Valuation of Mar-a-Lago in New York State Court, Establishment Republicans Remain Silent
By Scott Kaspar

Last Tuesday, New York judge Arthur Engoron found 45th president and presidential candidate Donald Trump, his sons Eric and Don Jr., and their business, the Trump Organization, liable for fraud (https://www.newsmax.com/newsfront/judge-trump-fraud/2023/09/26/id/1135989/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

The crime?

Inflating the value of their assets to secure bank loans — loans that they repaid, on time and with interest.

And while none of the Trump Organization’s banks have been anything but pleased, Judge Engoron revoked the Trump Organization’s business certificates and has ordered the dissolution of its New York businesses, including the iconic Trump Tower on New York's 5th Avenue in Manhattan.

As President Trump stated on Truth Social (https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/posts/111126612285463542?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , the alleged fraud stems from financial statements submitted to banks with loan applications that provided valuations of Trump Organization assets.

Among the valuations that Judge Engoron has scoffed is that of President Trump’s Palm Beach, Florida estate, Mar-a-Lago.

Relying on property tax assessments, the judge found that Mar-a-Lago is worth only $18 million (https://www.courthousenews.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/trump-james-summary-judgment-new-york-supreme.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) — far less than the valuations ranging from $427 million to $612 million included in President Trump’s financial statements.

Judge Engoron’s $18 million valuation of Mar-a-Lago demonstrates the intellectual dishonesty of his ruling.

Mar-a-Lago is a massive 20-acre estate and the only one on Ocean Boulevard that extends from the Atlantic Ocean to the intercostal.

Hence the name, which translates to: "Sea to Lake."

We need only look at the recent land acquisition by Citadel founder and billionaire Ken Griffin to recognize that President Trump’s proposed valuation of Mar-a-Lago is spot on.

In an attempt to create his own version of Mar-a-Lago, Griffin has spent the past several years acquiring 8 adjoining lots (https://www.palmbeachpost.com/story/news/2022/07/26/see-citadels-ken-griffins-450-m-estate-palm-beach-near-trump/10099311002/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on Palm Beach Island totaling about 25 acres at a cost of $450 million — and that’s just for the land.

It's Griffin’s intention to build a
sprawling mansion (https://www.palmbeachdailynews.com/picture-gallery/business/real-estate/2023/07/28/see-palm-beach-mansion-billionaire-ken-griffin-building-mom/12297580002/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) for himself and a separate home for his mother on the property.

Moreover, recent sales of lots located nearby Mar-a-Lago far exceeded $18 million for what amounts to less than two-and-one-half percent of the acreage.

And while President Trump and his supporters are outraged by the activist judge’s ruling, Establishment Republicans and their preferred presidential candidate, Gov. Ron DeSantis, R-Fla., remain silent.

On the same night that Judge Engoron’s ruling came down, the RNC held its second Republican presidential debate.

Was there any outrage expressed by any of the candidates or any of the RNC officers?

No. Not one word was even mentioned.

Sadly, this comes as no surprise, because the first RNC presidential debate took place the evening of the same day when President Trump’s lawyer Rudy Giuiliani had been booked in Atlanta, Georgia for the crime of representing his client.

Not one word of outrage (https://www.newsmax.com/politics/giuliani-rudy/2023/08/30/id/1132649/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) was expressed by any of the presidential candidates.

In fact, Mayor Giuliani’s name never came up.

Judge Engoron’s ruling should be setting off alarms, and Gov. DeSantis and the other presidential candidates should stand in unity with President Trump, calling out this injustice.

After all, Gov. DeSantis said he will start slitting throats (https://www.foxnews.com/politics/ron-desantis-says-he-will-start-slitting-throats-day-one-executive-branch?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) of permanent Washington should he win the presidency.

The weaponization of our justice system is the single greatest existential threat to the fate of the American experiment.

We cannot be a system of law and order only when it’s in the political best interests of the party in power. Those are the tactics of communist China and Russia that DeSantis and the other Republican presidential candidates claim to oppose.

This must be our line in the sand.

It should not be partisan.

Democrats also should stand against the weaponization of the American system of justice, because if the injustice of Judge Engoron’s ruling against President Trump is tolerated now, those tactics can be equally applied against Democrats when the Republican Party next retakes the White House, if not in 2024.

The rules of the game will have forever changed.

That game must be won by those of us outside of the D.C. beltway. Fast.

Scott Kaspar is a lawyer licensed in Illinois, Iowa, Colorado, and California, and before the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office. He regularly appears on television and radio, providing legal analysis. He also is the Publisher of Illinois Review, the largest conservative news source in Illinois.

© 2023 Newsmax. All rights reserved.

Vargas: Uniting Around 45th President Means Nation Survives (https://www.newsmax.com/markvargas/christie-pence/2023/10/02/id/1136672/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.newsmax.com/markvargas/christie-pence/2023/10/02/id/1136672/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
On Feb. 1, 2018, President Donald Trump spoke at the Republican National Committee (RNC) winter meeting at the Trump International Hotel, in Washington, D.C. (Source: Olivier Douliery-Pool/Getty Images)
By Mark Vargas

In many states, various athletic programs — including baseball, softball and football, have implemented a “mercy rule” that says a game must be called if one team is beating the other by a margin of 40 or more points.

In fact, from 1992-2003, Iowa high school football rules (https://thefootballusa.com/iowa-football-mercy-rule?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) stated that if a team was winning by a margin of 50 points or more — the game would end.

In 2003, the rules were changed. If a team held a 35-point lead or more, the clock would run continuously.

Either way — the point was to end the other team’s suffering as soon as possible.

The Republican National Committee should apply the same rule.

The frontrunner — by a long shot — President Donald Trump is leading his nearest opponent 63-12, according to the latest poll (https://pro.morningconsult.com/analysis/second-gop-primary-debate-poll?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

Trump leads second place Ron DeSantis by 51 points.

Trump leads third place Vivek Ramaswamy by 56 points.

In fourth place, both Nikki Haley and Mike Pence are tied – and they trail Trump by 58 points.

In fifth place, former New Jersey Gov. Chris Christie trails the frontrunner by 60 points.

The GOP debates, which Trump is rightfully choosing to skip are falling flat as well --- and not just in ratings.

A recent post debate
poll (https://thehill.com/homenews/4231790-second-gop-debate-fails-to-move-needle-away-from-trump/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) showed that an overwhelming majority of Republican voters support President Trump over any other Republican candidate – proving the debates to be a total waste of time and money.

Not to mention an embarrassment as Democratic voters watch the debates in amusement as candidates who trail the frontrunner by over 50 points, talk about “when I’m elected President.”

The “D” in “debate” now means “delusional.”

And a recent article in Forbes (https://www.forbes.com/sites/saradorn/2023/09/06/desantis-wealthy-donors-flee-these-previous-billionaire-backers-arent-giving-to-his-presidential-campaign/?sh=70906b16f196&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) highlighted that many of DeSantis’ major donors are abandoning ship.

In fact, out of 50 wealthy donors who previously supported DeSantis, 24 have chosen not to donate a single penny to his failing presidential campaign.

Why?

Because there is no path to victory.

Keeping the Republican candidates in the race only strengthens President Biden’s re-election campaign — and that can’t happen. Our country can’t sustain another four years of the Biden administration.

Think about it:

Team Biden has brought us socialism and tyranny, which has weaved itself into the fabric of our society.

Under the Biden regime, conservative voices are canceled and silenced.

Our southern border is out of control and illegal immigration is at all-time highs, thanks to the Biden administration.

Our nation’s 46th president has managed to embolden our enemies, and endanger our citizens’ lives at home and abroad.

Joe Biden has single-handedly brought us the most weaponized Department of Justice, deployed to weaponize political enemies.

Our major cities are no longer safe.

The lawful right to bear arms is under assault.

And under the Biden regime, every day, hard working Americans continue to struggle to pay their bills.

It’s time for the Republican Party to implement the “mercy rule” and bring an end to this charade and unite around the 45th president of the United States.

Our survival as a country depends on it, now more than ever.

>From 2007-2010, Mark Vargas served as a civilian in the Office of the U.S. Secretary of Defense, traveling to Baghdad, Iraq 14 times. Follow Mark on X: @markavargas. Read Mark Vargas' Reports — Click Here Now (https://www.newsmax.com/insiders/markvargas/id-664/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df38319622-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_03_03_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-df38319622-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

I’m not asking for money, I just need your support and your signature.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=576d77121e8a4b3599d56d48e89cd359&_e=-DGQ5vyYHaRrPJBpCYDhMeje_1GZfF5D30K7V6BkMzjT04n1pD7TKDoNoQeRQEfIbi8eP46FC6UIU8MFwkYSwUPPMuUCgzVcLyCrqTC74MTemNjZ4eM8LxSFwDwqg2i51nZ2eXdevUTeFA9Nd3Ox8eYS7MR_DER0aJG3J_8QpOctPZDr5hYqif2yybF5cZeym7wBb3vM6Bzmc48DAxg2ZIApH-iGoL0YErm13fdjUXjaiDza4oSKKmGUAbGgweKI9x623Dk0pYxZeKGz8LA9cYsgXpAyr-NRkn671zq1FTIFJuVhAMr730aevoBWwN4VDxxhaGePeUzqawM7FJQXpCeAwgzJ76BW9ytWuB1-jHau_coSSb1YaahM6e07FgDc7dJCz--jMKF5ljQxTu1phfFs1GMAVNAq8XQFf1KE20GXyquG6YvYDAdPbkH5Nw3_c9b_ZkqH9_gYwbmFO8VpUwugz2nOoImr-SxWKwPCbMR_Z7mdu13CM5UA4W_Hi4S8ZLr7STdqhcRJxDO_0inZ2v8YVc8rNbJZVv3xPS8xFCRWAq4jEl-Ahaqw6jPFjF7ngkx2rMGY5F3xp4hL7vxxIMuYiHC9-ot-ArL_6oMyNvW8GrUMPhIS2jbElymZ-2Oae7ULf_o8TBIGcrfbiwLNvA%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: I've got 2 important things to share with you | | | | | | Friend, it's Nikki. Moment to talk? | | | My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin."

In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

# [McCarthy removed as speaker. Tell him "Goodbye and good riddance"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta08c2fc1-2fb3-48a1-91bd-dd58726fa65b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc03edce-c9be-465a-b743-d3d958a33367/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **BREAKING: Kevin McCarthy has just been[ removed as speaker](https://default.salsalabs.org/T728fa815-af2a-4199-bf3c-5e0252389aa7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). ** And we say, "good riddance." He has been a terrible speaker, he has kowtowed to the nuttiest of his nut-filled caucus, he has lied over and over again, and it's time for him to go. The situation is still in flux, and there could always be someone worse as his successor, but given how bad McCarthy has been, we'll take that chance. [**Add your name, and join us in telling Kevin McCarthy "Goodbye and good riddance."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc37cfedd-caed-4525-a465-91071047ddfb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Rep. Maxwell Frost
subject: HUGE NEWS:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70876101/430594081/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231003_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTFiZTg1NjMtMGY2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0j6l9_L6Dex700uAjDU4laUO_LGVUFS0oDOILkoODas=)
---
| | **“Biden to Create New Office of Gun Violence Prevention”**
_— The Washington Post_
---
Peter, this is a massive win for our youth-led movement to end gun violence across the country.
Alongside young activists, organizers, and organizations like HER Time, I’m proud to have fought for the creation of a federal office of gun violence prevention.
**Ending gun violence has been at the forefront of my campaign. It’s what called me to action – both as the National Organizing Director for March for our Lives and as the first of my generation to be elected to Congress. **
My generation has been demanding action. And today, we have real, tangible progress in this fight. Not incremental progress, but a massive push forward.
**This is just the beginning. But I know the NRA and gun lobby are plotting revenge against our movement. Peter, in a major win for the American people, the government shutdown was avoided — for now. Congress passed a stopgap bill funding the government until November 17th. But here’s what I can’t stop thinking about: more House Democrats voted in favor of the bill than Republicans, despite Republicans having the majority in the House. **[Democrats dragged Republicans kicking and screaming into keeping the government open. It’s clear that we need more Democrats in the House to hold Republican extremists accountable. clean_body: Crisis averted — for now | | | Peter, in a major win for the American people, the government shutdown was avoided — for now. Congress passed a stopgap bill funding the government until November 17th. But here’s what I can’t stop thinking about: more House Democrats voted in favor of the bill than Republicans, despite Republicans having the majority in the House. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: | 90 Republicans voted against keeping the government open. That means 90 Republicans would rather let millions of people go without paychecks and without much needed benefits for their own political gain. It’s disgraceful and Texans deserve better. In solidarity, Michelle Vallejo | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

name: Your America
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24548%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TAxa37hzrLJDN3t%2fIguFJg&sysid=1)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24549%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m%2bT9qy%2bUygLS%2f90g5gX6sw&sysid=1)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24540%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RdsHdhWU1bq8kiGwxqkryw&sysid=1)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24540%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RdsHdhWU1bq8kiGwxqkryw&sysid=1)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305
---

Your America News
---

name: Rick Larsen (personal)
subject: They have a strong brand — just not a good one.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Right now, the GOP’s whole brand is shutting down the government.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70876810/430596575/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzllY2FjYS0xMDYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=irSpTeuKko_YnFYicmRx_XnacNOMyQOy5byXu8WkFR4=&emci=b0a153fc-7561-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=a39ecaca-1062-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)
---

| | It has been a busy few days, friends. I voted to prevent a government shutdown, got to spend some time with constituents and local leaders in Washington — and thanks to your help — we exceeded our goal of 500 grassroots supporters ahead of the FEC's end-of-quarter deadline! **Right now, the GOP's whole brand is shutting down the government.** I cannot fathom how that would be helpful to their constituents. Their actions would have furloughed 63,000 government employees and would have required 79,000 military personnel to work without pay — and that is just in Washington state _alone_. Their brand would cost communities essential services ranging from transportation safety inspections to Meals on Wheels services for our seniors. The GOP just does not get it. But you know who _did_ get it? The folks I met with in Bellingham and Burlington this week. I**joined constituents and local leaders alike to discuss how averting the government shutdown helped keep our communities thriving and secured $16 billion in disaster relief for Hawaii, Florida — and Whatcom County!** I received important feedback and suggestions on next steps for legislation in Congress, and then headed back to Washington, D.C.: to ensure we do not end up back in that same shutdown discourse when the current 45-day continuing resolution expires. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

name: Katie Porter
subject: Oversight is a powerful tool
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
So powerful, I stuck it on my license plate
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=30842%2E3422442%2EWQi_dT)
When I first ran for Congress in 2018, some political consultants asked me “what I was running on.” They listed a standard set of issues in which I was supposed to choose from—healthcare, LGBTQ+ issues, abortion rights—you get the idea.
**_I’m going to run on good oversight and consumer protection,_ I told them.**
Oversight is often about the gap between what politicians say at a press conference and what actually happens. That means **overseeing the Pentagon** and holding the defense industry accountable when it wastes taxpayer dollars. It means **overseeing my colleagues** when they trade stocks based on what we learn in private briefings. It means **overseeing Big Pharma companies** when they price gouge and mislead patients.
I didn’t think ‘running on oversight’ was a crazy idea. Oversight is a powerful tool, and even before I got to Congress I had seen that firsthand. In 2012, I was appointed by then-Attorney General of California Kamala Harris to be California’s Independent Monitor over the Big Banks. She had secured an $18 billion settlement from the banks whose predatory lending practices had caused the 2008 mortgage crisis. **It was my job to oversee and hold the banks’ feet to the fire to make sure California families actually got the money they were owed.**
I’m proud to have made effective oversight one of my priorities in Congress. I even stuck it on my minivan license plate!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231003-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAM03_1_OVR_20231003_V1_F&refcode2=30842_3422442_WQi_dT&akid=30842%2E3422442%2EWQi_dT)
**Now, I’m taking our fight to the U.S. Senate so I can hold powerful corporations and leaders of both parties to account. But I can’t do this alone.**[**Can you chip in $5 today to help power our campaign?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231003-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAM03_1_OVR_20231003_V1_F&refcode2=30842_3422442_WQi_dT&akid=30842%2E3422442%2EWQi_dT)
[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231003-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAM03_1_OVR_20231003_V1_F&refcode2=30842_3422442_WQi_dT&akid=30842%2E3422442%2EWQi_dT)
Thanks a ton!
KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM03_1_OVR_20231003_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=30842_3422442_WQi_dT&akid=30842%2E3422442%2EWQi_dT)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=30842%2E3422442%2EWQi_dT)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=30842%2E3422442%2EWQi_dT)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

Peter, I wanted to take a moment to say _thank you_. I know that I've asked for a lot from you all over the past few weeks. **Together, we closed the books on an _incredibly_ successful fundraising period.** So, no fundraising ask for your today – just an opportunity for me to express sincere gratitude for your generosity, your energy, your kind words, and your support. **Together, we can (and we will) accomplish great things, starting with securing better representation for Michigan's First District.** Thanks for all that you've done for this campaign, and I can't wait to share the results with you soon. name: Roy Cooper
subject: I have a couple quick questions, but first, let me say thanks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Do you have 60 seconds to fill out my Fall Priorities Survey?
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70877105/430597864/823540626?refcode=ea.5219e751-1262-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.5219e751-1262-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjE5ZTc1MS0xMjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IwDFpXFlGgdKCRN1gtm0HWxbsDvy0h-Mat5Z_9nh8zA=&emci=d0ff8005-f461-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=5219e751-1262-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Hi Peter, Thank you so much for your generous support at our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. I knew I could count on folks like you to understand the urgency of this moment. Together, we’re fighting far-right extremism here in North Carolina and across the country. I’m glad to have you with me — and it’s important to me to know where you stand on the issues that matter. It’s been a while since I checked in with you on your priorities, Peter. **[That’s why I’m sending around this Fall Priorities Survey, where I hope you’ll take about a minute to share your thoughts on some of the most pressing issues facing our communities today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70877106/430597866/1971919524?refcode=ea.5219e751-1262-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.5219e751-1262-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjE5ZTc1MS0xMjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IwDFpXFlGgdKCRN1gtm0HWxbsDvy0h-Mat5Z_9nh8zA=&emci=d0ff8005-f461-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=5219e751-1262-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70877107/430597868/1971919524?refcode=ea.5219e751-1262-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.5219e751-1262-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjE5ZTc1MS0xMjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IwDFpXFlGgdKCRN1gtm0HWxbsDvy0h-Mat5Z_9nh8zA=&emci=d0ff8005-f461-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=5219e751-1262-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
---
I believe that one of my most important tasks as a leader is to listen to the people. Hearing from folks like you informs my work as governor and the decisions we make for our state.
Thank you very much for sharing your thoughts with me,
Roy Cooper

clean_body: Do you have 60 seconds to fill out my Fall Priorities Survey? | Hi Peter, Thank you so much for your generous support at our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. I knew I could count on folks like you to understand the urgency of this moment. Together, we’re fighting far-right extremism here in North Carolina and across the country. I’m glad to have you with me — and it’s important to me to know where you stand on the issues that matter. It’s been a while since I checked in with you on your priorities, Peter. | I believe that one of my most important tasks as a leader is to listen to the people. Hearing from folks like you informs my work as governor and the decisions we make for our state. name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Thank you so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Wow. Peter, I’m speechless.
The end of September was an incredibly important fundraising deadline for our campaign. It’s the second time our fundraising numbers will be available to the public, and we have to show that we have the grassroots support to go the distance.
I’m so proud to say that we exceeded our goal. It was down to the wire, but when we called on our supporters, everyone stepped up to the plate. I can’t say it enough: thank you, thank you, thank you.
We don’t know yet how much my opponent raised. We can expect that he got huge checks from Kevin McCarthy, fossil fuel corporations, and gun lobbyists — all things he prioritizes over his actual constituents in AZ-06.
But thanks to you, we’ll have the resources to take him on.
This is still going to be an incredibly tough race, but I know that with the incredible grassroots network we have built, we can win and flip this seat blue.
Thank you again, Peter.
Onwards,
Kirsten

**1️⃣** We're so proud to share that California Gov. Gavin Newsom will appoint **President Laphonza Butler to fill the seat of the late Sen. Dianne Feinstein.** She will be the only Black woman serving in the U.S. Senate and the first openly LGBTQ+ person to represent California in the chamber. **And as a champion for reproductive freedom and labor rights, we know that Laphonza will serve the people of California honorably.**

2️⃣ We just endorsed state Rep. **Lori Stone** for mayor of Warren, Michigan, and we have a number of exciting **state and local endorsements coming down the pike this month** , so be sure to stay tuned for those!

3️⃣ We're gearing up for **major elections in Virginia next month** , and these final days of outreach are make-or-break for our endorsed candidates. **Virginia is the last state in the South without an abortion ban** — which means that if we don't regain our majority in the state House, the reproductive rights of millions are at stake.
****We have a busy month ahead of us, Peter. If you want to help win elections, endorse fantastic candidates, and power our pro-choice movement, donate to EMILYs List today:****

Support Kim Rose
Friend,
Join Kim Rose today and support her re-election campaign for Northampton Township Supervisor. Kim is the only Democratic woman ever elected to Northampton Supervisor in 300 years, and she is the only Democrat to be re-elected in 300 years. It is crucial that we hold this seat.
Head to Ann's Choice in Warminster today from 6pm - 7pm to support and join Supervisor Rose and Kennedy Democrats! We can't wait to see you there.

body:
