clean_body: And the Democrats CRUSHED their Q3 goal...| | | Peter, We were SO CLOSE to hitting our quarterly goal after a late push during the last week of September. But sadly, we still came up short. And after learning that Senate Republicans missed our critical Q3 goal, Chuck Schumer and the Democrats spent the first day of October Even though Republicans are looking forward to a favorable Senate map in 2024, it’s apparent the liberals are feeling smug after disappointing elections for the GOP in both 2020 and 2022. Leaning on the bottomless pockets of leftist billionaires like George Soros, the socialists think they can take advantage of disinterested or apathetic conservatives to deliver upset election results – regardless of the political climate they find themselves in each cycle. Now that we’re playing from behind against the left’s fundraising machine – America’s patriots need to unite and go back on the offensive so we can SAVE our country in 2024. | | | | | Thank you for your support, NRSC Campaign Finance Team Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Josh
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]I wanted to take a moment and sincerely thank you for the incredible support you showed this campaign ahead of our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Thanks to you, we showed our strength — and let the NRCC know that we’re not backing down.

It’s your strong grassroots support that allows me to continue fighting for Jersey Values and bipartisan solutions. Let’s keep this momentum going so I can hold my seat in 2024!

Thank you for your dedication to our mission. Supporters like you are truly the most important members of our team.

We showed our strength at the end of last quarter — but if we get complacent, the NRCC will go on the offensive. Will you chip in $ or more today to get this quarter started off strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2310?amount=]

Grateful to have you by my side,

Josh

He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. # **
Beware the Digital Dollar:
Unveiling Its Terrifying Realities!**
The purchasing power of the US dollar is rapidly dwindling. You have been deceived, as the government's promises of financial stability crumble before your own eyes.

Now, more than ever, it is crucial for you to move out of the high-risk zone and[ **take immediate action to protect your wealth**.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj7Fu4zAQRL-G6iSQS4mWCxW-E3TFASncBKmCNZeSGZAmTVIx_PeBHCNV2tk3Mzvoo7PzfWC7PwzgbCkzACYPDOD6dvNp_fD__9VOHOurevHddoS_DKDco_khnyGN8Wjdpu7GigY5E28rMwi1V7JToPrqPPCul0LvO9PKTndCzUK0RGR6yTWnmVd2AA5ScC5FzyUXDSrs6GTUaQZQmlrW8kdPg94kq1HkcsOUQvCNDr5yw7mUmB-PTQwmFxt0ziwWL9oswdFGMZjILragqyk4h6nOxaDLdUz2E_V9s8ppLf49hzVpw-R4-G6bbMrlFdMxbClqQ7whu3omx1EXemoafUS7XH43Cl7LKg0Ub9Y5m9WOtXx5bNLBfwUAAP__kl-AiQ) The solution lies in the timeless power of an asset that the government, banks, and Wall Street don't want you to have.

For years, the government has insisted that the dollar remains a reliable store of value, but the truth is far from what they would have us believe.
The silent erosion of the dollar's purchasing power has left hardworking Americans like you vulnerable, as your savings and investments are silently devaluing.

It's time to expose the deception and **[take decisive steps toward securing your financial future.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj7Fu4zAQRL-G6iSQS4mWCxW-E3TFASncBKmCNZeSGZAmTVIx_PeBHCNV2tk3Mzvoo7PzfWC7PwzgbCkzACYPDOD6dvNp_fD__9VOHOurevHddoS_DKDco_khnyGN8Wjdpu7GigY5E28rMwi1V7JToPrqPPCul0LvO9PKTndCzUK0RGR6yTWnmVd2AA5ScC5FzyUXDSrs6GTUaQZQmlrW8kdPg94kq1HkcsOUQvCNDr5yw7mUmB-PTQwmFxt0ziwWL9oswdFGMZjILragqyk4h6nOxaDLdUz2E_V9s8ppLf49hzVpw-R4-G6bbMrlFdMxbClqQ7whu3omx1EXemoafUS7XH43Cl7LKg0Ub9Y5m9WOtXx5bNLBfwUAAP__kl-AiQ)**

**The signs of the dollar's decline are impossible to ignore**. Inflation is soaring and the cost of everyday goods and services are spiraling out of control.

The government's assurances that this is merely a temporary phenomenon is an utter lie as the hardworking middle class struggles to make ends meet. The erosion of your purchasing power is no accident; it is a consequence of policies that prioritize short-term gains over your long-term financial security. **It doesn 't stop there.** Amidst all the lies and chaos, President Biden snuck in Executive Order 14067. The Digital Dollar, poised to roll out soon, is the Fed's sinister attempt to **[end privacy as you know it by tracking and controlling your every financial move](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj7Fu4zAQRL-G6iSQS4mWCxW-E3TFASncBKmCNZeSGZAmTVIx_PeBHCNV2tk3Mzvoo7PzfWC7PwzgbCkzACYPDOD6dvNp_fD__9VOHOurevHddoS_DKDco_khnyGN8Wjdpu7GigY5E28rMwi1V7JToPrqPPCul0LvO9PKTndCzUK0RGR6yTWnmVd2AA5ScC5FzyUXDSrs6GTUaQZQmlrW8kdPg94kq1HkcsOUQvCNDr5yw7mUmB-PTQwmFxt0ziwWL9oswdFGMZjILragqyk4h6nOxaDLdUz2E_V9s8ppLf49hzVpw-R4-G6bbMrlFdMxbClqQ7whu3omx1EXemoafUS7XH43Cl7LKg0Ub9Y5m9WOtXx5bNLBfwUAAP__kl-AiQ)**[.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj7Fu4zAQRL-G6iSQS4mWCxW-E3TFASncBKmCNZeSGZAmTVIx_PeBHCNV2tk3Mzvoo7PzfWC7PwzgbCkzACYPDOD6dvNp_fD__9VOHOurevHddoS_DKDco_khnyGN8Wjdpu7GigY5E28rMwi1V7JToPrqPPCul0LvO9PKTndCzUK0RGR6yTWnmVd2AA5ScC5FzyUXDSrs6GTUaQZQmlrW8kdPg94kq1HkcsOUQvCNDr5yw7mUmB-PTQwmFxt0ziwWL9oswdFGMZjILragqyk4h6nOxaDLdUz2E_V9s8ppLf49hzVpw-R4-G6bbMrlFdMxbClqQ7whu3omx1EXemoafUS7XH43Cl7LKg0Ub9Y5m9WOtXx5bNLBfwUAAP__kl-AiQ)

**Imagine a world** where every aspect of your financial transactions is meticulously recorded, scrutinized, and controlled by the government. The Digital Dollar, **[as outlined in the Executive Order](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj7Fu4zAQRL-G6iSQS4mWCxW-E3TFASncBKmCNZeSGZAmTVIx_PeBHCNV2tk3Mzvoo7PzfWC7PwzgbCkzACYPDOD6dvNp_fD__9VOHOurevHddoS_DKDco_khnyGN8Wjdpu7GigY5E28rMwi1V7JToPrqPPCul0LvO9PKTndCzUK0RGR6yTWnmVd2AA5ScC5FzyUXDSrs6GTUaQZQmlrW8kdPg94kq1HkcsOUQvCNDr5yw7mUmB-PTQwmFxt0ziwWL9oswdFGMZjILragqyk4h6nOxaDLdUz2E_V9s8ppLf49hzVpw-R4-G6bbMrlFdMxbClqQ7whu3omx1EXemoafUS7XH43Cl7LKg0Ub9Y5m9WOtXx5bNLBfwUAAP__kl-AiQ),** is portrayed under a sinister guise of convenience with instantaneous access to funds via our phones that are ironically under constant full surveillance.

This shift grants unprecedented powers to the central authorities, jeopardizing the very essence of your privacy. **It is a grave threat that you cannot afford to ignore.
**
**Your personal choices will no longer be yours to make.** The consequences are profound. The government can dictate how you spend your money, monitor your purchases, and potentially freeze your assets at will. The very essence of **[your personal freedom is at stake.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj7Fu4zAQRL-G6iSQS4mWCxW-E3TFASncBKmCNZeSGZAmTVIx_PeBHCNV2tk3Mzvoo7PzfWC7PwzgbCkzACYPDOD6dvNp_fD__9VOHOurevHddoS_DKDco_khnyGN8Wjdpu7GigY5E28rMwi1V7JToPrqPPCul0LvO9PKTndCzUK0RGR6yTWnmVd2AA5ScC5FzyUXDSrs6GTUaQZQmlrW8kdPg94kq1HkcsOUQvCNDr5yw7mUmB-PTQwmFxt0ziwWL9oswdFGMZjILragqyk4h6nOxaDLdUz2E_V9s8ppLf49hzVpw-R4-G6bbMrlFdMxbClqQ7whu3omx1EXemoafUS7XH43Cl7LKg0Ub9Y5m9WOtXx5bNLBfwUAAP__kl-AiQ)** **[Act now with urgency](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj7Fu4zAQRL-G6iSQS4mWCxW-E3TFASncBKmCNZeSGZAmTVIx_PeBHCNV2tk3Mzvoo7PzfWC7PwzgbCkzACYPDOD6dvNp_fD__9VOHOurevHddoS_DKDco_khnyGN8Wjdpu7GigY5E28rMwi1V7JToPrqPPCul0LvO9PKTndCzUK0RGR6yTWnmVd2AA5ScC5FzyUXDSrs6GTUaQZQmlrW8kdPg94kq1HkcsOUQvCNDr5yw7mUmB-PTQwmFxt0ziwWL9oswdFGMZjILragqyk4h6nOxaDLdUz2E_V9s8ppLf49hzVpw-R4-G6bbMrlFdMxbClqQ7whu3omx1EXemoafUS7XH43Cl7LKg0Ub9Y5m9WOtXx5bNLBfwUAAP__kl-AiQ)** to embark on a journey toward financial liberation where you not only Preserve, Protect, and maintain your Privacy but reclaim the peace of mind that has been mercilessly stolen from you.

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Let’s talk about freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek, I want to take a moment to talk about freedom. [_**I hope you’ll take a moment to read this, then chip in to help me continue fighting for real freedom across Pennsylvania.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70879495/430605813/1284884800?refcode=email_100323_Freedom&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjA0YzU0NC0xNzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FXzadLAPNuBm76Qc9aIzCx_5f0zKjK_PAhLCNmdmf8s=) **The other side loves to talk a big game about freedom, but what they’re selling isn’t freedom at all.** It’s not freedom to tell women what they are allowed to do with their bodies. It’s not freedom to tell other people’s children what books they’re allowed to read. It’s not freedom for them to tell us who you are allowed to marry. And it sure isn't freedom to say you can go vote, but they get to pick the winner. **That's not freedom. But here in Pennsylvania, we’re fighting for real freedom.** Real freedom comes when you see the potential in a young child and invest in her public school. Real freedom comes when we invest in that child's neighborhood to make sure it’s safe and healthy so she gets to live to her 18th birthday. Real freedom comes when we put vocational and technical training in her school and open up her eyes to the possibility of being a welder, send her to a union apprenticeship program, and believe in her so she can start a small business of her own. Real freedom comes when she and her employees can marry the people they love, worship where they want, and live in a place that respects them for who they are. [_**That is real freedom. That is our work, that is our challenge, and that is our calling. This is a critical moment, and I hope you’ll join me in the fights ahead. Chip in $5 or whatever you can to continue fighting for real freedom and real opportunity for every Pennsylvanian.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70879496/430605814/1284884800?refcode=email_100323_Freedom&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjA0YzU0NC0xNzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FXzadLAPNuBm76Qc9aIzCx_5f0zKjK_PAhLCNmdmf8s=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70879497/430605815/1284884800?refcode=email_100323_Freedom&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjA0YzU0NC0xNzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FXzadLAPNuBm76Qc9aIzCx_5f0zKjK_PAhLCNmdmf8s=)

body:
a new report from the Virginia Public Access Project...

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70879548/430606097/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDkxMDg3Zi0xNzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9xn-B6d33akZFNJ_YpiXFFHyM39QAo57gmB6e3T9C8c=&emci=acb23402-0962-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=b091087f-1762-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

I was sent to Congress to do the people’s work. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv6tH8jgbhiguZaDNRcwtfawSOQrWwfGDyAPxHEFd1zlOJBIrb3X4Ey5BH4NgE5_bnNTqtz0wFn7oGw4-gaxeiFkaK8uZIPTirOvTXvaXpk92-jxFNWHzxZQERRj_PuwHjqmVP8G8jvEmsWhfRaerNs6oLM656HnziPANixx3AfSbpCSyShfxzu3eSlfohHL6qZSG-GfXHPYsafajCogjQmmzroEl399r18QIvNrjAVwEmKUv4Wu2tJwWVn5jf-bl92NJ_CelDP9yid1ex1QZ-oiKj0ZykvAOFsefZwB-vZDM/404/RmXpsyLtTqKmXIdZ0fHRig/h0/MOEeylT0Zj7psoQIi0VDG7ZIvHevSBwwqDZ7SfA9UXw)

Friend, Far-right extremists in Congress tried to hold our country hostage last weekend. They have been deliberately trying to force a government shutdown, so they can push through outrageous demands that wouldn’t make it through Congress otherwise. **With just hours to go, we held the line against Republicans’ cruel cuts to essential programs. Congress voted to keep the government open and protect food assistance for mothers and babies in our communities.** We won a 45-day extension, continuing current funding levels for the government until November 17. But Republicans aren’t stopping. This week, they’re starting votes again to try to cut critical services and inflict real harm on our neighbors. If the government shuts down in 45 days, millions of children and parents will lose access to WIC nutrition assistance, millions of federal workers will be furloughed or forced to work without pay, and federal agencies operating key programs will be closed or operating at reduced capacity. We can’t let this happen. **We cannot continue to capitulate to a far-right Republican Party and their extreme demands while they inflict policy violence on working-class people. We must stand firm in the fight for everyday people.** [**Please sign if you agree: Extremist MAGA Republicans need to stop holding people’s lives, livelihoods, and our economy hostage. Congress must expand—not cut—essential government programs that everyday people rely on.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkLl9_kJRLE3_iT0PbsKWy_jNOo1zMx0oWGhNp6dfsHPYyBy0gwKc4D423k1LpzqeP-GXixtADLN4k-rqfM1ZKjWj7eLuDh3XzOF_XDRtGKQluQg-0MJtRCeP9m1Y7_IEiC41wx8YumevKVzJHRpyj8kdy5Tj0nGQd8mba_mH3zX5Ikd0Sou6ZNSbgmqFJf0HBuHB-klWdOtYU5yN4LsHjrusMOJ-K7ulaF7oaqZpYl78Uxz1Ujq59lPGmYDERpAE8TeadYF_tEnecpJdFRsD7rOWQVMd0nYTIS9FBqO9ahFAorMhVvT5eeICK9xu-ANqtxsUPJzpCTcH6H858haB0bghqvr64bRRCR-gH-AqhYwsoU2BKTqlo7nK29LT5f5r7IaWhmAGbqg6OQxZyQSX6RQ0JAr9SZV66IuG8PpyZxSKmjltn8uycDG17kjL1UgjQBVwOhvzWWVtO8zKkbVRe_Tnbe0itNmhRi66Fe2SZqXw/404/RmXpsyLtTqKmXIdZ0fHRig/h1/LTC_a232Gn7ps1VQfbF-S9NlDGL8bmvazcqvghr09t0) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkLl9_kJRLE3_iT0PbsKWy_jNOo1zMx0oWGhNp6dfsHPYyBy0gwKc4D423k1LpzqeP-GXixtADLN4k-rqfM1ZKjWj7eLuDh3XzOF_XDRtGKQuDTGqYluJ-rrBwxCw1BOgrifDAe-zgWxNeQ6yxNBbA7wvyQUT9o93G6sRT9PzYliTSsszdGhgS9JJTPtF5sTipjbl9C-ubrv4l7IpypOrABRlrYTrCaA6iAw4TyuWx9gJy2ACVZ_ZQ5kgcRgQ8HwgleAN0G1ROvGcjD3PuDpH9UuNPJ6zBMkqP7GdCBT0jfnNno2K0doL7zU67sj2xZE04kWhlqqu5T6w3BqBAyZ-I8D8NPfXuTfOry3_7MPaO5ajDM1uXPXdIiYIxvdQ4F16iMwZEt7-Zkpl4ByGDXOItcJVdEDEXe1tTdvaHw2U7fJIJO7hD1WnUG3SrluRv81PJ40xouMsfchd7h4Oc-Zq9NnjCiXEwhjkz85vB9DFnTSg/404/RmXpsyLtTqKmXIdZ0fHRig/h2/mcBRoV35tdn3fimZeuhr2L2xeYWL1xLbN3RHuAlxUug)

This spring, Republicans in Congress used the debt ceiling to try to negotiate an extreme pro-starvation agenda, cutting funding for food assistance programs.
In 2019, they forced another government shutdown, which lasted for 35 days.
Many of my colleagues in Congress are millionaires, and back in 2019 they were wondering why federal workers who had been furloughed were on food bank lines. They’re out of touch with the reality that most Americans live paycheck to paycheck.
Our constituents cannot risk another government shutdown. And any cuts to essential programs would devastate our communities.
[**Add your name if you agree: Congress must stand firm against MAGA extremists, and expand—not cut—essential government programs.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkLl9_kJRLE3_iT0PbsKWy_jNOo1zMx0oWGhNp6dfsHPYyBy0gwKc4D423k1LpzqeP-GXixtADLN4k-rqfM1ZKjWj7eLuDh3XzOF_XDRtGKQji07EUwS9D9y2DwinU3d6Ug71IybE87DPEEXLgrKM1C0vwAQKMa6_7QcmT9feJn_wjPzgFcqoXJHBtgblpGxDkMffmLpGT0M5AMmXo_kfO7jr6YulfhI-COfrJgTAC8CpB93B8f-VriVHTm0pDfnLX4fuOBkKU3LqbWUMV5-s4EnQQqpr9cnzt2PVxsXbturV-aprSMOiQ9fa_lHSZcvoNB45ddiQZ6h7jB5wZBMslkOyxQAqexBsU4vHRg8UT5Ighs299zfhdqyqCTbyt-4imc9yKQPjygkKf7s8h-Vvq7g1H_xBmaED-VenXpGMBm7FKBLLEvMTvhNt6HB_l-4zTI0hP1Clj0v2nymni1Ip77Ka2DCd3sL_fqrXVTDNnB8Q/404/RmXpsyLtTqKmXIdZ0fHRig/h3/J-huEnPu5JXX31Raso9AZGRKd1xdxn4fOIRaTDvDLTQ)
I was sent to Congress to do the people’s work. I promise to continue fighting for you, your family, and all of our communities across the country.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: I was sent to Congress to do the people’s work. | | | Friend, Far-right extremists in Congress tried to hold our country hostage last weekend. They have been deliberately trying to force a government shutdown, so they can push through outrageous demands that wouldn’t make it through Congress otherwise. With just hours to go, we held the line against Republicans’ cruel cuts to essential programs. Congress voted to keep the government open and protect food assistance for mothers and babies in our communities. We won a 45-day extension, continuing current funding levels for the government until November 17. But Republicans aren’t stopping. This week, they’re starting votes again to try to cut critical services and inflict real harm on our neighbors. If the government shuts down in 45 days, millions of children and parents will lose access to WIC nutrition assistance, millions of federal workers will be furloughed or forced to work without pay, and federal agencies operating key programs will be closed or operating at reduced capacity. We can’t let this happen. We cannot continue to capitulate to a far-right Republican Party and their extreme demands while they inflict policy violence on working-class people. We must stand firm in the fight for everyday people. | This spring, Republicans in Congress used the debt ceiling to try to negotiate an extreme pro-starvation agenda, cutting funding for food assistance programs. In 2019, they forced another government shutdown, which lasted for 35 days. Many of my colleagues in Congress are millionaires, and back in 2019 they were wondering why federal workers who had been furloughed were on food bank lines. They’re out of touch with the reality that most Americans live paycheck to paycheck. Our constituents cannot risk another government shutdown. And any cuts to essential programs would devastate our communities. I was sent to Congress to do the people’s work. I promise to continue fighting for you, your family, and all of our communities across the country. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

body:
We can’t afford to give up now.

https://secure.winred.com/elder-for-president-24/q3-3?mc_cid=45c563fd7a&mc_eid=UNIQID

** Will you stand with America First?
------------------------------------------------------------

Fellow Patriots,

Despite the RNC blocking me from participating in last night’s debate, we aren’t giving up yet. This election is wide open. Remember: in 2015, Donald Trump was an outsider candidate who no one thought would win the GOP nomination for president, much less make it to the White House!

Our America First campaign has received tremendous support from thousands of Americans all over the country who are looking for bold leaders to stand up to Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the Radical Leftists who are running our federal government.

That’s why I believe that we can win. But to keep the momentum going, I need your help. We are roughly $43,000 short of our end of quarter fundraising goal.

That’s why I’m asking you to give whatever you can – $10, $20, or even $50 dollars – to help us keep pushing through the obstacles the corrupt establishment keeps trying to put in our way: https://secure.winred.com/elder-for-president-24/q3-3?mc_cid=45c563fd7a&mc_eid=UNIQID

I’m the only candidate with the courage and independence necessary to solve the complex problems facing our country. If we don’t act soon, America will only continue further down a path of economic ruin and lawlessness, just like we’re seeing in my home state of California. I’ve seen firsthand how skilled Democrats are at ruining great places, and we should refuse to let them do the same to our beloved country!

As a self-made person, I hate asking for money. But campaigns, especially those running against special interest-backed career politicians and self-funding billionaires, need resources to share their messages far and wide.

So, I must ask you: what can you give TODAY to propel our campaign forward? https://secure.winred.com/elder-for-president-24/q3-3?mc_cid=45c563fd7a&mc_eid=UNIQID

With the prayers, support, and generosity of patriotic Americans like you, we can win this thing. As always, thank you.

Standing with you,
Larry Elder
GOP Candidate for President

https://secure.winred.com/elder-for-president-24/q3-3?mc_cid=45c563fd7a&mc_eid=UNIQID

I open up the application and... surprise! **A junk fee of $150 JUST to apply:**

[](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/WBY6dgsO9jaVcXaa_jk16A~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm_t4IP0TLaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTAwM19lbV9mcl9iMV9yZW50X2ZlZXNfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MldHR2ZlZWpsdEVobFFaYVpKNW53MEZVOU0wJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJXR0dmZWVqbHRFaGxRWmFaSjVudzBGVTlNMCZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yV0dHZmVlamx0RWhsUVphWko1bncwRlU5TTBXA3NwY0IKZRQIWRxlPpxQDFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) Rent prices are already at an all time high, and the cost of moving (first and last month’s rent, PLUS a security deposit) is even higher. Renters shouldn’t have to be hit with more hidden fees.

**This is exactly why I introduced my End Junk Fees for Renters Act.** Our housing system is broken, and getting worse. So I’m taking action, but I need you to join me.

**Peter, I’m going to keep fighting for better and fairer housing policies in Congress, but I need your help to hold this seat against the special interests who want me gone.[_Can you make a contribution to my campaign today to help me stay on track for my End of Week fundraising goal? I’m still $2,150 short of what we need to raise today, and every dollar has the power to keep me fighting for us in Washington. >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/WBY6dgsO9jaVcXaa_jk16A~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm_t4IP0TLaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTAwM19lbV9mcl9iMV9yZW50X2ZlZXNfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MldHR2ZlZWpsdEVobFFaYVpKNW53MEZVOU0wJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJXR0dmZWVqbHRFaGxRWmFaSjVudzBGVTlNMCZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yV0dHZmVlamx0RWhsUVphWko1bncwRlU5TTBXA3NwY0IKZRQIWRxlPpxQDFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) Peter, our housing system is _designed_ to work against the working class.

How do I know? Even as I was being sworn into Congress, I was stuck couch surfing – getting denied from expensive apartments and losing hundreds of dollars in bogus application fees.

It’s become crystal clear that we can’t rely on the same old institutions to fix the same old problems. _But we don’t have to accept broken systems._

**That’s why we NEED and DESERVE young, working, everyday people in Congress who know firsthand the struggles of the working class, including the increasingly dire housing crisis.**

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: My 2024 Legislative Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Here's what I'm fighting for in 2024
| | Derek - I wanted to share some of my plans for the upcoming legislative session with you. My primary goal is to address significant issues in our state, starting with lowering taxes to provide consumer tax relief. By implementing tax cuts, we can stimulate economic growth and provide much needed relief for struggling individuals and families. Letting people keep more of their hard-earned money will contribute to a brighter future for New Hampshire. Another crucial initiative I'm focusing on is providing more autonomy to students and families from different backgrounds when it comes to choosing their education. Empowering them with greater educational freedom will ultimately strengthen our entire educational system. Furthermore, I have included a Childcare Tax Credit in my plan to ease financial burdens for families and empower employers to have the tools needed to recruit & retain a more vibrant workforce. Supporting families is of utmost importance, and this tax credit is just one way to help them thrive. I will have more to say on my 2024 legislative agenda in the weeks ahead but wanted to give you this sneak-preview now. Sincerely, Rep. Joe Sweeney Founder, Granite Solutions [Support the Fight for a Stronger New Hampshire's at Granite Solutions](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)

Peter: **I filed a Motion to Vacate our Democrat-Owned Speaker Of The House - Kevin McCarthy.** Now, the RINOs are teaming up with Democrats to EXPEL me from Congress. But I'm not backing down.
| [ **VACATE KEVIN MCCARTHY** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=422c7ea3daf9430992a8228cf51e8c18&_e=CH-pZrkURSq9-2ra-Hb77DyjfYV_h-19bPJeYu7NwjX6cx-WlfGh7QyMqYnFQ38sEe9PQmCBldpYPcSmg1oCaqsee4uN4fdrtX56ItsMbSRe4AFSo9e5ZTNWIbNImx50w5j9oxxEukRNmL_bcAOrqm0yv5bUkM7aTzSeq238jDSPTFY54SFqh94KqNhZRPPULfmSKxDH23Zo7P3WRuoSSnC6gGRAsleJTGaOI2ahhc2U6RAOHyA3ybcsbJ8inS8DySv7RWnh65IT-QqpvatPIzi_1Yr4EvsvjGzQf3zgxaRbS8c7WPEwQ8pBEsSKCibM3p3AgEJ1eWxUm-LONuxGBFtLjbfGRq8JZ7BJLOji0NijOCcUIfY1YG8zcT36IRfe)

**Our Speaker tells us he is being "the adult in the room" by lying to House conservatives and cutting a deal with the Democrats.** He wants you to believe the "adult" thing to do is to perpetuate the same system that has put us $33T into debt. Well then, my message is simple, Peter: _If he is still our Speaker by this time next week... It will be because his new Democrat bosses have bailed him out._ He can be THEIR Speaker. Not MINE. _**Are you with me?**_ **[Join me and demand NEW LEADERSHIP.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=422c7ea3daf9430992a8228cf51e8c18&_e=CH-pZrkURSq9-2ra-Hb77DyjfYV_h-19bPJeYu7NwjX6cx-WlfGh7QyMqYnFQ38sEe9PQmCBldpYPcSmg1oCaqsee4uN4fdrtX56ItsMbSRe4AFSo9e5ZTNWIbNImx50w5j9oxxEukRNmL_bcAOrqm0yv5bUkM7aTzSeq238jDSPTFY54SFqh94KqNhZRPPULfmSKxDH23Zo7P3WRuoSStt13CueyqBwnXaU6Xajz5i51nlgMZapYGUKin-auM9bM11raIDuqRQZswb_qppaOIT3xI3IDvJuh43dilXjNVI-Nmzk7OQykqf-h1W7vaE5YEqmp7sR6-488OFyGfjAGZjIov_QWa1NHHmVsmn3cDxKu7KhtPB4XYZOM14nKfIP)**

subject: 2 megamillionaires
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Tammy’s most competitive and expensive election yet.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1271%2E35263%2ETufnjb)
Peter — **2.** This is an important number in our race. Only 2 seats separate control of the Senate majority. That means Republicans only need to flip 2 seats this election to retake the majority and put the gavel back in Mitch McConnell’s hands. With Tammy at the top of the GOP’s list of senators to defeat, she’s gearing up for her most competitive election yet — _and her most expensive..._ That’s because 2 right-wing megamillionaires are making preparations to enter the race to defeat Tammy. Republicans are trying to recruit wealthy candidates who can self fund their own campaigns because they know they can’t match our campaign’s grassroots strength. **We’ll be honest, protecting this seat against an opponent with a virtually unlimited warchest won’t be easy.** But supporter after supporter, we’re building up the resources to defend Tammy against whatever her potential wealthy opponents and their Republican backers have in store. **[So today, we’re asking for $2. name: Tom Malinowski
subject: just wanted to thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | I just wanted to reach out and express my gratitude for your support this end-of-quarter deadline.

As we approach November’s school board elections, it’s never been more important for us to stand together. And thanks to your grassroots support, we can stand up for the ideals we’ve taught our kids to cherish – the freedom to speak, to ask hard questions, and to learn.

In the months ahead, we will hold elected officials and school board members accountable, and support candidates committed to democratic values and to keeping partisan culture wars out of our kids’ lives. I’m beyond grateful for your commitment to supporting us.

[MAGA extremists are going to fight to come out on top this November, but if we keep up this momentum we can stop them. Will you chip in $10 or more today to help us start our new quarter strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70880508/430609165/1647275175?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20231002_FR_Thankyou_0_Tom_NA_NA_NA&refcode2=8dfdf56b-1a62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGZkZjU2Yi0xYTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yL-nyq-oAkbcaGm4ylM3yO0mwX8QpAuHSoO3chRxGdQ=)

Talk soon,

Tom Malinowski
---
* * *
| Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

I’m beyond grateful for your commitment to supporting us. = Talk soon, Tom Malinowski * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. Box 01 Ringoes, NJ 08851-0001 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: We did this together.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Friends, I want to take a moment to say _thank you_. Because of support from folks like you, we met our end-of-quarter goal and begin the final quarter of this year in the best position to continue making progress for working families across Central and Southern Illinois. I know that emails from myself or my team asking for a dollar or two may seem like they won’t do much to power our work, but when you add up the $1, $5, or even $10 contributions from everyone who chips in, the impact can be huge. It’s a true testament to grassroots power, and it’s why I was able to flip this seat last year and hit the ground running to work across the aisle to champion legislation like the _Increasing Land Access, Security, and Opportunities Act_ to invest in underserved and beginning farmers. Friend, have you heard what Sen. Rick Scott (R-FL) is trying to do to our Social Security benefits?
**After overseeing the largest Medicare fraud in HISTORY, Scott is trying to use his power in Washington to END Social Security!**
Unlike Rick Scott, most Americans aren’t worth up to a quarter of a billion dollars. Millions of us rely on Social Security benefits to make ends meet and retire in dignity. We’ve spent decades paying into these crucial programs, and now Rick Scott thinks he can take those benefits away.
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell knows that we need to _protect_ and _expand_ Social Security, not destroy it. **That’s why she’s running to defeat Scott and ensure that Americans can count on Social Security for generations to come.**
But we need to know where Americans like you stand. **Please, respond before midnight tonight to tell Rick Scott whether you support Social Security:**
**D o you support Social Security?**

Hey,

Last week, we sent you our urgent petition to stand with President Biden during the GOP’s baseless impeachment inquiry.

But our records indicate that you didn’t sign. Without your signature, we’re still [5] local signatures short of our signature goal. So we’re giving you a second chance to add your signature now. **[_Click HERE or use the button below to sign »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-biden-sept23/?source=FFR_20231003_EMPET_E1_T0_NS&t=7&akid=20259%2E4449941%2El0JAv-)** | [SECOND CHANCE: Add my name now »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-biden-sept23/?source=FFR_20231003_EMPET_E1_T0_NS&t=8&akid=20259%2E4449941%2El0JAv-)

Andrew

| | Peter—I’m just sitting here going through my photos from last week’s 9th Annual Alsobrooks Family BBQ thinking how **LUCKY** I am to call you all friends, family and supporters! [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/6966?t=9&amount=25&akid=531%2E52803%2E3rrwvS) | | | [Donate Now!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/6966?t=10&amount=25&akid=531%2E52803%2E3rrwvS)
---
I am SO proud of the people-powered campaign we’re building here in Maryland. And I could not be any more thankful for the incredible volunteers and supporters who make it all possible!
I know there’s still a long way to go and a lot of work left to be done. But nights like last Tuesday remind me of what’s possible when we all join together for a cause greater than our own.
**So thank you, Peter—for your continued hard work and gracious support.**
And if you weren’t able to attend last week’s 9th Annual Alsobrooks Family BBQ, [**I hope you’ll consider supporting our U.S. Senate campaign by contributing a $25 donation to help us continue getting our message out to Maryland voters and win this race.**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/6966?t=11&amount=25&akid=531%2E52803%2E3rrwvS)
| | [Donate Now!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/6966?t=12&amount=25&akid=531%2E52803%2E3rrwvS)
---
Thanks for all of your support, Peter. It truly means the world to me.
Sincerely,
Angela Alsobrooks

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Another Republican in the Michigan Senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=726%2E135344%2EDV1Rsx)

Friend --
We know that we have been in your inbox a lot lately, but there was just some BIG news in the Michigan Senate race that we didn’t want you to miss: **James Craig, former Detroit Chief of Police and one of last year's failed Republican candidates for Governor of Michigan, announced he is running for the Senate.**
This announcement is another big inflection point in our campaign. Craig marks the second serious Republican opponent to enter the race. Last month, former Congressman Mike Rogers announced his candidacy for the Michigan Senate seat. This potentially sets up a messy Republican primary.
And we know what that means: Both will be fighting to prove which of them deserves Donald Trump’s seal of approval as the Republican nominee, which of them holds sway with the restive base of the Republican party, and which of them is the most extreme on the issues of the day.
Craig, the former Detroit Police Chief, claims the mantle of the most Trump-aligned of the declared serious candidates thus far. He is against any additional gun safety laws, he opposes all abortion, including for victims of rape and incest, and denied the results of the 2020 election.
And last year, Craig was one of the 5 Republican Gubernatorial candidates that was disqualified from the primary after it was discovered that he submitted thousands of fraudulent nominating petition signatures.
**The public polling in this race so far shows that Craig is leading the list of potential Republican candidates. It also shows a general election race between us and him would be very close -- Elissa leads by 1, 40-39, with 21% of voters still undecided.**
When you see a figure like that, it makes our game plan clear: we're going to spend the rest of this campaign reaching every single one of those voters and persuading them to give us a look in comparison to the other side.
But it’s going to take all of us coming together in a big way, especially since Democrats hold a one-seat majority in the Senate:
That’s why we’re asking in honor of a serious candidate getting in the race: [**Will you make a $3 contribution to our campaign today? We don’t expect you to donate to every email we send, but this is a big moment for us and a big opportunity to push back against a MAGA Republican running statewide.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231003-1-30&amount=3&t=2&akid=726%2E135344%2EDV1Rsx)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231003-1-30&amount=3&t=3&akid=726%2E135344%2EDV1Rsx)**
Thank you,
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=726%2E135344%2EDV1Rsx).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Lynn Peterson
subject: Kevin McCarthy 🤝 Lori Chavez-DeRemer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress
body:
My opponent Lori Chavez-DeRemer flipped one of the decisive House districts last year, and Kevin McCarthy owes his majority to members like her.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70882286/430612666/-2024045026?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTEwYTRjYS0xZDYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xMod8IxVZRgI9ItemXzdJRqSYXvD9iOmhz8jU1WPNEc=&emci=2e7b54a7-1162-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=1e10a4ca-1d62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=29359352)
---

| | Peter — We are lucky that cooler heads _finally_ prevailed in Congress over the weekend. A government shutdown was averted, and key funding for agriculture, housing, nutritional assistance, and education was preserved. Temporarily, at least, the gambit of extremist MAGA Republicans in the House failed. But Peter, this is no way for a government to keep functioning. I'm sick of seeing manufactured crises in the House again and again. There won't always be an 11th-hour solution, and I'm concerned that in November, we'll be right back in the thick of the chaos that gripped the House for much of the past month. **Why does all of this keep happening? Because Republicans won a narrow House majority in 2022 and then proceeded to let their most extreme members run the show.** Having worked in local government I can tell you this: if elected officials continually came close to failing to do their basic duty of keeping the lights on, _they would be fired by their constituents_. My opponent Lori Chavez-DeRemer flipped one of the decisive House districts last year, and Kevin McCarthy owes his majority to members like her. She made sure to make as few public statements as possible during this shutdown debate — but she did make time to vote for the GOP's preferred budget plan (one that, thankfully, did not pass). **Chavez-DeRemer is on the record now as supporting severe cuts to aid for millions of working families.** She voted to make college less affordable, to make it harder for parents to send their kids to school, to make housing harder to find, and to make food less accessible. **Republicans wanted to force America to choose between a cruel and unfair budget or a government shutdown, and my opponent would've been very happy had this budget passed.** Unlike her, I believed in rejecting false choices. And I'm glad that – for the moment – other members of Congress agreed. Now, we need to hold Republicans like Chavez-DeRemer accountable for their weak "leadership," and we need to keep the pressure on Congress to pass a long-term bill that funds the government properly by their new deadline in November. If the last few days showed us anything, it's that it's time for some new voices in Congress — and that fake-moderate Republicans like my opponent have had their chance and failed. The people of the 5th District deserve better, and I'm more determined than ever to fight for them. _Lynn_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: My opponent Lori Chavez-DeRemer flipped one of the decisive House districts last year, and Kevin McCarthy owes his majority to members like her. | | | | Peter — We are lucky that cooler heads finally prevailed in Congress over the weekend. A government shutdown was averted, and key funding for agriculture, housing, nutritional assistance, and education was preserved. Temporarily, at least, the gambit of extremist MAGA Republicans in the House failed. But Peter, this is no way for a government to keep functioning. I'm sick of seeing manufactured crises in the House again and again. There won't always be an 11th-hour solution, and I'm concerned that in November, we'll be right back in the thick of the chaos that gripped the House for much of the past month. Why does all of this keep happening? Because Republicans won a narrow House majority in 2022 and then proceeded to let their most extreme members run the show. Having worked in local government I can tell you this: if elected officials continually came close to failing to do their basic duty of keeping the lights on, they would be fired by their constituents. My opponent Lori Chavez-DeRemer flipped one of the decisive House districts last year, and Kevin McCarthy owes his majority to members like her. She made sure to make as few public statements as possible during this shutdown debate — but she did make time to vote for the GOP's preferred budget plan (one that, thankfully, did not pass). Chavez-DeRemer is on the record now as supporting severe cuts to aid for millions of working families. She voted to make college less affordable, to make it harder for parents to send their kids to school, to make housing harder to find, and to make food less accessible. Republicans wanted to force America to choose between a cruel and unfair budget or a government shutdown, and my opponent would've been very happy had this budget passed. Unlike her, I believed in rejecting false choices. And I'm glad that – for the moment – other members of Congress agreed. Now, we need to hold Republicans like Chavez-DeRemer accountable for their weak "leadership," and we need to keep the pressure on Congress to pass a long-term bill that funds the government properly by their new deadline in November. If the last few days showed us anything, it's that it's time for some new voices in Congress — and that fake-moderate Republicans like my opponent have had their chance and failed. The people of the 5th District deserve better, and I'm more determined than ever to fight for them. Lynn | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress |

body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE16Yq3cn0CZ98JsJ-X0f71bUM8BtRYWsT0NooHHP6BH02psOGQLK2wUQ6Uzc_J8J7rHyZrsBzmPqPuuMikFKG7Ao-xS-DJOL8wXcoGPqVJ9Y7Pix9fQg3yLIxDh3tlPCNSoSoo4Bo4dTiyt8T-UjLBNu_TtgjXSIVYQ5LDn2uht-5wFitP07nu91hibOpKqNmVx1wOu6Qa80Kp1aCdvisk3zNX8NKoXTYao0n8JwEPXG2tqtkFIqInlD6CiGtNMCWqoxm7ODqbYLoE6nzI8_WHHS9y4rId2ihlDHksR9CC-dx7XImC9o6wbYlaS7veqtCH0FGbZR7B2pKYuCMTQTbhP7HZqREaEdKRal2UfAhutwFRZr9oUY571H4uVLlNtE-4Hg6d4Qvl1IRSJGLJxE7__xPxTmpryj5yQ5vOuP0UceoJpGllBmD6ldY4gmUsuym0m6O0g5yFaX7cItzFanqzL/404/jk-FhWWxQQGP4IqcxRtJbg/h0/MvLSZvUw_5_lhDHbkpEeuZ22HfFwLVp1td4APj1cYYY)

Peter,

I wanted to give my sincerest, most heartfelt thank you to everyone who contributed to our campaign this quarter, and to anyone who has supported our campaign in your own way.

With your support, we met and exceeded our quarterly fundraising goal and sent a strong message that we’re here to stay!

I’m happy to be writing to you knowing that we’ve barely evaded a government shutdown. But these past weeks were some of the strongest examples yet that we have to take back the majority. Our government can’t be a hostage for dangerous policies or Republicans who wish to abandon our seniors, veterans, and working families.

That’s what makes meeting our quarterly fundraising goal even more critical. While National Republicans recruit challengers for IL-17, every milestone we hit and every dollar matters – especially when we know there are dark money PACs that are going to be relentlessly attacking me in short time.

I’m heartened to know that grassroots supporters like you have consistently come through for us when we needed it most. Without your backing, I wouldn’t have been elected to Congress.

All of my thanks,

Eric

clean_body: | | Peter, I wanted to give my sincerest, most heartfelt thank you to everyone who contributed to our campaign this quarter, and to anyone who has supported our campaign in your own way. With your support, we met and exceeded our quarterly fundraising goal and sent a strong message that we’re here to stay! I’m happy to be writing to you knowing that we’ve barely evaded a government shutdown. But these past weeks were some of the strongest examples yet that we have to take back the majority. Our government can’t be a hostage for dangerous policies or Republicans who wish to abandon our seniors, veterans, and working families. That’s what makes meeting our quarterly fundraising goal even more critical. While National Republicans recruit challengers for IL-17, every milestone we hit and every dollar matters – especially when we know there are dark money PACs that are going to be relentlessly attacking me in short time. I’m heartened to know that grassroots supporters like you have consistently come through for us when we needed it most. Without your backing, I wouldn’t have been elected to Congress. All of my thanks, Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . name: Madeleine Dean
subject: I appreciate you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
**** Thank you to everyone who helped us reach our fundraising goal ahead of last week’s Federal Election Commission deadline. With your support, we’ve been able to show the strength of our team here in the Philadelphia suburbs to everyone watching.

Come next year, we must retake the House majority to end the dysfunction and obstruction – we must get back to legislating for _all_ Americans. Hello,
We’re emailing to ask for $1 to help Adam Frisch defeat Lauren Boebert.
No, that’s not a typo. Our next fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight, and we’re still $11,843 short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to kick Boebert out of Congress.
We know $1 might not seem like a lot – and it’s not. But combined with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors chipping in, your $1 has _enormous_ impact.
$1 lets us fill up the tank as Adam continues crisscrossing the district, meeting with voters who are fed up with Lauren Boebert’s angertainment antics.
$1 lets us invest early in staff and the critical resources it takes to build a winning campaign.
$1 lets us counter the Super PAC lies and hold Boebert accountable.
And $1 lets us take the lead in what was the closest race in the country last year – decided by just 546 votes.
**If everyone reading this email chips in just $1, we will hit our fundraising goal and defeat Lauren Boebert once and for all in 2024. But Adam’s counting on your support now if he’s going to win:**

clean_body: We’re emailing to ask for $1 to help Adam Frisch defeat Lauren Boebert. Hello, We’re emailing to ask for $1 to help Adam Frisch defeat Lauren Boebert. No, that’s not a typo. Our next fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight, and we’re still $11,843 short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to kick Boebert out of Congress. We know $1 might not seem like a lot – and it’s not. But combined with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors chipping in, your $1 has enormous impact. $1 lets us fill up the tank as Adam continues crisscrossing the district, meeting with voters who are fed up with Lauren Boebert’s angertainment antics. $1 lets us invest early in staff and the critical resources it takes to build a winning campaign. $1 lets us counter the Super PAC lies and hold Boebert accountable. And $1 lets us take the lead in what was the closest race in the country last year – decided by just 546 votes. If everyone reading this email chips in just $1, we will hit our fundraising goal and defeat Lauren Boebert once and for all in 2024. But Adam’s counting on your support now if he’s going to win: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Adam is not taking money from corporate PACs like Boebert is. Instead, he’s funding his campaign entirely with support from people like you. So truly no amount you can afford to give today is too small. When we defeat Lauren Boebert on Election Night next year, it will be because grassroots donors like you gave what you could now. Thank you for everything you do, Team Frisch ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

# TRUMP Goes to Court While Jamaal Bowman Actually BREAKS THE LAW...
While Congress narrowly averts a government shutdown, Jamaal Bowman does everything he can to disrupt a scheduled vote by pulling a fire alarm in the Capitol. Shouldn't we be raising questions about potential charges?
Meanwhile, Donald Trump makes his way to civil court as his politically-motivated trial begins in New York. And Gavin Newsom selects Laphonza Butler as Feinstein's successor in his boldest identity politics play to date.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a61ad8f45c&e=f6564bbe3b)
Don’t forget to subscribe and hit the bell to get notified every time a new episode drops.
Would also greatly appreciate it if you could subscribe to the audio version and give us a 5 star review. It really makes a big difference in growing this show and being able to put out great content at no cost to you all.

# Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene joins The Sean Spicer Show...

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I’m voting to remove Kevin McCarthy from the Speakership
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Nobody trusts McCarthy, he can’t govern, and I’m not going to save him.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4198%2E5257348%2ETRo1dD)
| **BREAKING:** Far-right Rep. Matt Gaetz has filed a “motion to vacate” in the House — a vote on whether to keep or remove Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House that is up for a vote TODAY. **[Nobody trusts McCarthy, he can’t govern, and I’m not going to save him. Add your name to my petition if you agree Democrats should vote to kick McCarthy out of the Speaker’s office.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20231003-motion-to-vacate.fKeGSb&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231003_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4198%2E5257348%2ETRo1dD)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20231003-motion-to-vacate.fKeGSb&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231003_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4198%2E5257348%2ETRo1dD)
---

Derek, you can always count on Kevin McCarthy to do the right thing — **_only after he’s tried to do literally everything else._**
That’s the message I delivered on MSNBC’s _Morning Joe:_
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20231003-motion-to-vacate.fKeGSb&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231003_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4198%2E5257348%2ETRo1dD)
McCarthy had tried everything to placate the far-right fringe of his caucus while refusing to work with Democrats ahead of an impending government shutdown last Saturday.
Meaningless messaging bills. A bogus impeachment inquiry. Lurching from crisis to crisis.
And finally, on the edge of a shutdown at 12:01 am Sunday morning, McCarthy relented — kicking the can down the road for 45 days.
Here’s what I have to say about that: **We need a Congress that works. One that can fund itself for more than 45 days at a time.**
**But with Donald Trump leading the party and Kevin McCarthy leading the House, our Congress is _completely dysfunctional._**
McCarthy is the weakest Speaker in the history of the country. He’s more concerned with remaining in Donald Trump’s good graces — even if it means turning a blind eye to his abuses of power and inciting a violent insurrection against our government on January 6.
**Now, far-right Rep. Matt Gaetz has filed a “motion to vacate” — essentially, a vote to kick McCarthy out of the Speaker’s office.**
I don’t have anything good to say about Matt Gaetz, not his politics, not his ethics, nothing. But this much is true:
_No one trusts Kevin McCarthy._
McCarthy broke his word with the president over the debt ceiling deal.
His own conference doesn’t trust him. And Democrats can’t trust a word that comes out of his mouth.
_He doesn’t stand for anything other than the desire to hold onto that Speaker’s gavel._
[**That’s why I’ll be voting to remove Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House today. Join me by adding your name to my urgent petition — we are voting TODAY._**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20231003-motion-to-vacate.fKeGSb&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231003_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4198%2E5257348%2ETRo1dD)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20231003-motion-to-vacate.fKeGSb&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231003_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=4198%2E5257348%2ETRo1dD)
---
McCarthy has got to go. We can’t come this close to a default on our debt, or a government shutdown again. America deserves a Speaker that keeps their word and has some ability to govern. It’s that simple.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1813?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231003_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=4198%2E5257348%2ETRo1dD)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1807?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231003_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=4198%2E5257348%2ETRo1dD)
---

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

body:
Sharing four reasons why we NEED to fire Josh Hawley in 2023. Four months ago, I announced my candidacy for the U.S. Senate to give Missourians a fighting chance for a better life. So, to commemorate this occasion, I will be sharing four reasons why we NEED to fire Josh Hawley in 2023.
1. Josh Hawley supported Jan 6th insurrectionists by giving a thumbs up and raising his fist in solidarity with them (BEFORE HE RAN AWAY).
2. In 2022, Josh Hawley tweeted, "At long last, _Roe_ is OVERRULED," celebrating his wife's victory in overturning _Roe v. Wade_.
3. Josh Hawley seemingly believes there's only one gender.
4. Josh Hawley lied to striking UAW workers, saying, "I want to stand with them and their bold struggle to actually get what they deserve,” while repeatedly voting against the interest of workers time and time again and taking more than $26,000 from GM, Ford, and Toyota.

Missourians need a leader willing to fight to protect workers, create jobs, reinvest in our rural communities, protect our climate, and provide high-quality education. Not someone who supports insurrectionists, votes against workers, and supports attempts to outlaw abortion.

clean_body: Sharing four reasons why we NEED to fire Josh Hawley in 2023. Four months ago, I announced my candidacy for the U.S. Senate to give Missourians a fighting chance for a better life. So, to commemorate this occasion, I will be sharing four reasons why we NEED to fire Josh Hawley in 2023. 1. Josh Hawley supported Jan 6th insurrectionists by giving a thumbs up and raising his fist in solidarity with them (BEFORE HE RAN AWAY). 2. In 2022, Josh Hawley tweeted, "At long last, Roe is OVERRULED," celebrating his wife's victory in overturning Roe v. Wade. 3. Josh Hawley seemingly believes there's only one gender. 4. Josh Hawley lied to striking UAW workers, saying, "I want to stand with them and their bold struggle to actually get what they deserve,” while repeatedly voting against the interest of workers time and time again and taking more than $26,000 from GM, Ford, and Toyota. Missourians need a leader willing to fight to protect workers, create jobs, reinvest in our rural communities, protect our climate, and provide high-quality education. Not someone who supports insurrectionists, votes against workers, and supports attempts to outlaw abortion. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks, Wesley = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI 7253 WATSON RD #1115, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

subject: The truth about Josh Hawley’s record on labor issues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
He’s not pro-worker. He’s just a liar and a fraud.
#
Peter — Josh Hawley knows that Lucas has already built a powerful coalition of working people who are ready to take this Senate seat back for everyday Missourians. **So now, he’s doing anything he can to convince voters that he’s “pro-worker” before it’s too late:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37589?refcode=em20231003-3906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3906%2E614464%2EhpFSVM)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37589?refcode=em20231003-3906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3906%2E614464%2EhpFSVM)**
**Here’s the truth about Josh Hawley’s record on labor issues:**
**IN 2015 —** Hawley supported anti-union “Right-to-Work” legislation in Missouri and called for an “end to union-backed candidates” in the GOP.
**IN 2018 —** 237,000 Missourians lost overtime pay protections due to a lawsuit brought by Hawley during his time as our state’s attorney general. To this day, Missouri workers are losing $27 MILLION in overtime raises each year.
**IN 2019 —** Hawley earned a _0% agreement rating_ on the most recent United Auto Workers Labor Union scorecard.
**IN 2021 —** When it finally came time to make real investments into American workers, Hawley broke with members of his own party by voting against the historic bipartisan infrastructure bill.
**AND JUST LAST WEEK —** Hawley affirmed that he opposes the PRO Act, federal legislation backed by UAW that would empower workers to organize and protect them from corporate retaliation, saying it “hurts workers more than it helps.”
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37589?refcode=em20231003-3906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3906%2E614464%2EhpFSVM)**
**Hawley’s record makes it clear: he’s not pro-worker, he’s just a liar and a fraud.**
Missouri workers deserve a senator who will actually stand up and fight for them, not one who sells them out or uses them as campaign props. That’s why Lucas Kunce is running to defeat Hawley — with support from the Missouri AFL-CIO, Missouri Fire Fighters, and dozens more statewide and union locals across the state — and it’s why we need your help today, Peter.
**[Will you please chip in $10 or whatever works best for you today so we can continue holding Hawley accountable and reaching voters with this message? Only one candidate stands with working people in this race, and we need everyone to know it before they head to the polls on November 5, 2024.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37589?refcode=em20231003-3906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3906%2E614464%2EhpFSVM)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37590?refcode=em20231003-3906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=3906%2E614464%2EhpFSVM) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37590?refcode=em20231003-3906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=3906%2E614464%2EhpFSVM) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37590?refcode=em20231003-3906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=3906%2E614464%2EhpFSVM) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37590?refcode=em20231003-3906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=3906%2E614464%2EhpFSVM) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37590?refcode=em20231003-3906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=3906%2E614464%2EhpFSVM) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37590?refcode=em20231003-3906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=3906%2E614464%2EhpFSVM) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37589?refcode=em20231003-3906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=3906%2E614464%2EhpFSVM)

body:
#
**Tell Biden to decriminalize marijuana! >> [_We're looking for 5,000 signatures by midnight tonight._](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/122?t=1&akid=475%2E8507%2Ej-V3jm)**
---

**The good news:** Joe Biden vowed to decriminalize marijuana!!

**The bad news:** We are _still_ waiting for him to act on his promise!!

[NOW >> We’re asking 5,000 supporters to add their name to our petition and tell Joe Biden to finally decriminalize marijuana!](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/122?t=2&akid=475%2E8507%2Ej-V3jm)

[SIGN ON: Tell Biden to decriminalize marijuana!](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/122?t=3&akid=475%2E8507%2Ej-V3jm)

During his 2020 presidential campaign, President Biden vowed to decriminalize cannabis.

His administration has recommended marijuana be reclassified to a Schedule III drug from a Schedule I – and has acknowledged the medical benefits of the drug.

_But we are still waiting for him to act on his promise and decriminalize marijuana!_

**THE TIME TO ACT IS NOW:** [_Tell President Biden to act now and finally make good on his promise to decriminalize cannabis ASAP! >>_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/122?t=4&akid=475%2E8507%2Ej-V3jm)

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/122?t=5&akid=475%2E8507%2Ej-V3jm)

**Our goal is to add 5,000 signatures before midnight tonight so he hears us loud and clear.**

Thank you for taking action,

Malamed HQ

subject: Kevin McCarthy has enabled Trump and his MAGA allies’ election denial.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70890375/430621417/-664199346?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmZlYzcxMC0yNDYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mLU_o7euTtXR0gRqqvPuVPrgK8di1BxaJKVjbT91dB4=)
Folks, As Rep. Matt Gaetz drives the House into chaos in an attempt to oust Kevin McCarthy, we thought we’d remind folks about the role McCarthy has played in enabling Trump and his MAGA allies’ election denial.
* In the wake of the January 6th insurrection, McCarthy refused to condemn Donald Trump for the role he played in spurring it on.
* In fact, he retreated to Mar-a-Lago just weeks after the insurrection.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70890376/430621418/-248329306?refcode=em-10.03.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmZlYzcxMC0yNDYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mLU_o7euTtXR0gRqqvPuVPrgK8di1BxaJKVjbT91dB4=)

* He handed over tens of thousands of hours of Jan. 6 footage to Tucker Carlson, the biggest cheerleader of the ultra-MAGA movement.

**We defeated these anti-democracy candidates thanks to unprecedented support from grassroots donors like you. But the battle for our democracy is far from over.**

body:

---
**_October 5, 2023_**
---
# The election is five weeks away, and I need your help!
It's hard to believe I started this journey almost three years ago and it all comes down to a few weeks. I am out every day campaigning, connecting with voters and raising the money I need to get my message out to the people who I'm not able to reach through our grassroots victory plan.
---
There are many ways you can help make a difference, but right now my critical need is for money to pay for our advertising. I asked my team to break down how contributions of any amount can help make a big difference when it comes to reaching voters. There are not many people who like to ask for help. I have devoted two years to this campaign for mayor. I retired from my career of over 30 years because I believe that my leadership can make a big difference in Fort Wayne. I need to you believe along with me so we can cross that finish line together in just five short weeks! | [](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/ci3rNCjS2e7vxog_JdCc3VJzKjA4c0z-WvNTo6XtEdU=/dp0XNXpca_HbJSzmRDKwh798FjpwhnjebMTfpIV2cSI=)
---|---
| | [Dontate Now](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/ci3rNCjS2e7vxog_JdCc3VJzKjA4c0z-WvNTo6XtEdU=/dp0XNXpca_HbJSzmRDKwh5XFO9kxrRfpovsjolL5hSU= "Dontate Now")
---
Every cent you donate moving forward funds my marketing campaign to get voters out to support our Republican team in Fort Wayne and to influence voters who may still be on the fence about which candidate they want to support. I believe in my heart that we are going to win. Click this link to make a donation online. If you would prefer to send a check you can direct it to: Citizens to Elect Tom Didier
303 E. Washington Blvd. #101
Fort Wayne, IN 46802 Thanks for your time! Together I know we can win in '23! God Bless, P.S. - If you'd rather support one of the upcoming events I am holding, you can find information about them below. We have [Senator Mike Braun visiting as a special guest this Friday](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/ci3rNCjS2e7vxog_JdCc3VJzKjA4c0z-WvNTo6XtEdU=/dp0XNXpca_HbJSzmRDKwh4c86DcRQ58MeijQa2UJMOk= "Senator Mike Braun visiting as a special guest this Friday") and my friends are holding a [reception to support my campaign at Fort Wayne Country Club on October 19th](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/ci3rNCjS2e7vxog_JdCc3VJzKjA4c0z-WvNTo6XtEdU=/dp0XNXpca_HbJSzmRDKwhwPjyvwAe7TsHw3U1DYGqR4= "reception to support my campaign at Fort Wayne Country Club on October 19th")

I believe in my heart that we are going to win. Click this link to make a donation online. If you would prefer to send a check you can direct it to: Citizens to Elect Tom Didier 303 E. Washington Blvd. #101 Fort Wayne, IN 46802 Thanks for your time! Together I know we can win in '23! God Bless, P.S. - If you'd rather support one of the upcoming events I am holding, you can find information about them below. We have = "Senator Mike Braun visiting as a special guest this Friday" and my friends are holding a = "reception to support my campaign at Fort Wayne Country Club on October 19th" = | Didier Dinner Featuring Special Guest U.S. Senator Mike Braun Friday, October 6th, 6:00 pm 10650 Diebold Road U.S. Senator Mike Braun is working hard for Hoosiers every day in the Senate, and he knows Tom Didier will always put Fort Wayne first! = "RSVP Today!" More info: mailto:dpillie@tomdidierfortwayne.com "Contact Derek Pillie" ---|--- = | Fort Wayne Country Club Reception supporting Tom Didier Thursday, October 19th, 5:30 pm 5221 Covington Road This is going to be a great event at a wonderful venue to help raise funds to support Tom Didier's campaign for mayor of Fort Wayne! = "RSVP Today!" name: Gloria Johnson
subject: What do you care about?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
Here are some of my priorities:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70891675/430622398/-849459103?refcode=ea.2b1cf653-2562-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.2b1cf653-2562-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjFjZjY1My0yNTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpdLwpMS30sHYln57UJr1JAtkg9xpwRlnF59UuRVtVU=&emci=be5228b3-1962-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=2b1cf653-2562-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
---
Hi there, I’ll be honest: I never thought that after a decade of public service, I’d find myself facing expulsion from the Tennessee House _just for standing up._ I don’t regret for a second standing in solidarity with Covenant families and all Tennesseans who want to live their lives without the threat of violence. I’d do it again tomorrow. But the last six months have put so much into perspective for me. _Tennesseans deserve better than what we’ve got._ **I’ve spent my career fighting to fix the problems facing our communities in our state — because I know they are bigger than party or politics. Our families just want to be safe and healthy and to have leaders who care.** Expanding health care access, preventing gun violence, and defending voting rights are just a few of the priorities that are on my mind right now, but what’s most important is what _you_ and _your_ families care about. **_[Could you take my one-minute Priorities Survey to share the issues on your mind?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70891676/430622399/-362712357?refcode=ea.2b1cf653-2562-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.2b1cf653-2562-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjFjZjY1My0yNTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpdLwpMS30sHYln57UJr1JAtkg9xpwRlnF59UuRVtVU=&emci=be5228b3-1962-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=2b1cf653-2562-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)_** | [**TAKE MY SURVEY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70891678/430622400/-362712357?refcode=ea.2b1cf653-2562-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.2b1cf653-2562-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjFjZjY1My0yNTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpdLwpMS30sHYln57UJr1JAtkg9xpwRlnF59UuRVtVU=&emci=be5228b3-1962-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=2b1cf653-2562-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
---
Thanks so much,
Gloria
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70891681/430622401/-362712357?refcode=ea.2b1cf653-2562-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.2b1cf653-2562-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjFjZjY1My0yNTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpdLwpMS30sHYln57UJr1JAtkg9xpwRlnF59UuRVtVU=&emci=be5228b3-1962-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=2b1cf653-2562-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

clean_body: Here are some of my priorities: | Hi there, I’ll be honest: I never thought that after a decade of public service, I’d find myself facing expulsion from the Tennessee House just for standing up. I don’t regret for a second standing in solidarity with Covenant families and all Tennesseans who want to live their lives without the threat of violence. I’d do it again tomorrow. But the last six months have put so much into perspective for me. Tennesseans deserve better than what we’ve got. I’ve spent my career fighting to fix the problems facing our communities in our state — because I know they are bigger than party or politics. Our families just want to be safe and healthy and to have leaders who care. Expanding health care access, preventing gun violence, and defending voting rights are just a few of the priorities that are on my mind right now, but what’s most important is what you and your families care about. | Thanks so much, Gloria | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: New attacks on Texas women
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

The thing to remember about Texas Republicans is that no matter how bad
you think it is, it can always get worse.

More than a year after enacting the most extreme abortion ban in the
nation — with no exception for rape or incest — they’ve found new ways to
try to intimidate and harass Texans who seek to make their own
reproductive healthcare choices.

Several Texas counties have recently passed ordinances to ban women from
driving to seek an abortion out of state — and as if that weren’t extreme
enough, the travel bans are enforceable by private citizens, empowering
vigilantes to police roads and harass women exercising whatever privacy
and freedom they have left to make their own decisions about their own
bodies.

According to the Texas Tribune:

“Anti-abortion advocates behind the measures are targeting regions along
interstates and in areas with airports, with the goal of blocking off
the main arteries out of Texas and keeping pregnant women hemmed within
the confines of their anti-abortion state.”

The latest travel ban passed on Thursday in Cochran County. Cochran
borders New Mexico, now the closest state where Texas women can legally
seek an abortion. (Texas’ three other neighboring states have full
abortion bans in place.)

It’s clearer now than ever before: this isn’t about protecting life. It’s
about controlling women.

But here’s what gives me hope. At least two Texas counties
have recently voted down this type of travel ban after receiving immense
public pressure from their constituents — proving that when we organize,
we can stop these authoritarian attacks on the lives of Texas women.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231003.cXrvih&refcode=ema20231003-232827&t=1001&akid=232827%2E444211%2ETNoQX4 ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $3 today to support
Powered by People’s efforts to organize, register, and mobilize the voters
we need to fire Republican extremists in 2024 and replace them with true
leaders who will ensure every woman has the freedom to make her own
decisions about her own body, her own health care, and her own future.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231003.cXrvih&refcode=ema20231003-232827&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=232827%2E444211%2ETNoQX4 ]Donate $3

The next election will decide whether we’ll have strong local leaders in
place to block these measures at the city and county level, whether we’ll
have a fighting chance at overturning Texas’ abortion ban in the state
legislature, and, ultimately, whether Congress can stop a nationwide
abortion ban.

Powered by People has built a network of tens of thousands of volunteers
who are ready to register and turn out hundreds of thousands of new
Democratic voters who can help turn the tide of extremism in Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231003.cXrvih&refcode=ema20231003-232827&t=1021&akid=232827%2E444211%2ETNoQX4 ]Your support ensures we have the resources to do this work — so thank
you for chipping in whatever you can today.

Thank you for being with us at this critical moment.

— Beto

Peter, I just wanted to reach out and say thank you for everything you do for our movement. Now, more than ever, it’s important that we continue to stick together and fight back against dangerous Republican proposals for our state and country. With supporters like you, we can flip the script and achieve progress for Hoosier families. Indiana needs more balance after 20 years of one party rule. Friend: **I filed a Motion to Vacate our Democrat-Owned Speaker Of The House - Kevin McCarthy.** Now, the RINOs are teaming up with Democrats to EXPEL me from Congress. But I'm not backing down.
| [ **VACATE KEVIN MCCARTHY** ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGv4iAUhX8N3dnABcEuupgZo4tJ3M-KIL1U5hWpF2rj-_Uvmufbnu_knM-leYrh0TPzmwFc4lAYAJO_GMDt35po-Z_-Hjen03Fz06e0fUL4wwDqY8af5vdIi8nF6ZmafTP0MgxcNdgL3WmppQDRXPqgO8-N3ik8h8EJf0aDIii180GpAK6JPXCQgnMpuu1Odi0Y3ykMBoI6O24cU_z107qEFL0Tpa6OKOfU-pyaqb_UOpeX2IHBYXRYP0Mmn68jYSkt4f3e-vxGdshXm5NFsne3-UiWin0bMHlYarIVKTG5X0kw0IR-IYrXkcl9pQUb6od5jdMUizZM8fHl5nP6CgAA__8JW2yM)
