**Our Speaker tells us he is being "the adult in the room" by lying to House conservatives and cutting a deal with the Democrats.** He wants you to believe the "adult" thing to do is to perpetuate the same system that has put us $33T into debt. Well then, my message is simple, Friend: _If he is still our Speaker by this time next week... It will be because his new Democrat bosses have bailed him out._ He can be THEIR Speaker. Not MINE. _**Are you with me?**_ **[Join me and demand NEW LEADERSHIP.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGv4iAUhX8N3dnABcEuupgZo4tJ3M-KIL1U5hWpF2rj-_Uvmufbnu_knM-leYrh0TPzmwFc4lAYAJO_GMDt35po-Z_-Hjen03Fz06e0fUL4wwDqY8af5vdIi8nF6ZmafTP0MgxcNdgL3WmppQDRXPqgO8-N3ik8h8EJf0aDIii180GpAK6JPXCQgnMpuu1Odi0Y3ykMBoI6O24cU_z107qEFL0Tpa6OKOfU-pyaqb_UOpeX2IHBYXRYP0Mmn68jYSkt4f3e-vxGdshXm5NFsne3-UiWin0bMHlYarIVKTG5X0kw0IR-IYrXkcl9pQUb6od5jdMUizZM8fHl5nP6CgAA__8JW2yM)**

Peter, Election Day may seem far off, but that doesn't mean we can spend this time sitting idly and twiddling our thumbs._**Republicans certainly are not.**_
Instead, far-right extremists are using these calmer months to ensure that _as many_ voter suppression laws as possible are in place by 2024. **And their efforts have not gone in vain: During last year's midterm elections, voter suppression laws blocked more than 4.6 million people from voting. **
Peter, this is only the beginning. Republicans know they can't win in 2024 unless they suppress the will of the people, and that's _exactly_ what they're trying to do.
We must fight back against these voter suppression attempts – and to do that as effectively as possible, we need to know how top Democrats like _you_ prefer to vote.
So please, we need [52] more responses before midnight to ensure statistically significant results.

Your contribution could have a major impact in the outcome of some of the biggest local elections of the year, Peter:
* $5 to help elect **Van Turner** for Mayor of Memphis
* $10 to help elect **Gabe Amo** and make history as the first Black congressman representing Rhode Island (RI-01)
* $50 to help elect **Dr. Shawn Wilson** for governor of Louisiana, making history as the state’s first Black governor
* Or $200 to help **_block a Republican trifecta_** under Glenn Youngkin in Virginia

**_Local elections are key_ , Peter,** and we need your help now more than ever to push our slate of endorsed candidates across the finish line before Election Day.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, At Collective, we’re dedicated to expanding black political representation in our country — that extends up and down the ballot at all levels of government. But first, our endorsed candidates are counting on us to support their campaigns and push them to victory in November. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: For the first time ever, you can file an application directly with the Department of Education.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, it’s past
time for student debt cancellation.

But outrageously, student loan repayments started again this month after a
three year pause. Many jobs require a degree, which requires taking on
tens or hundreds of thousands of dollars of student loan debt, but the
promise of higher pay has failed recent graduates.

It’s time to close the racial and class disparities that exist in higher
education by canceling student loan debt. Student debt cancellation is a
matter of economic justice and racial justice.

Today, instead of asking for a donation to support our own work, we wanted
to share a critical tool from The Debt Collective:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138592?t=1001&akid=31151%2E1203867%2EyiyPy5 ]For the first time ever, you can file an application directly with the
Department of Education and request student debt cancellation thanks to
the Debt Collective's Student Debt Release Tool. Submit your application
today!

Submit your application

Together we will continue to fight for social, economic, racial, and
environmental justice for all. We know that a brighter future for all is
worth fighting for.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Laphonza Butler
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Friends,
This afternoon, I was honored to participate in the swearing-in for California’s newest United States Senator, Laphonza Butler.
I’ve known — and worked with — Senator Butler for years, dating back to my time as California’s Secretary of State, and I’m glad to welcome her to the Senate as a colleague.
For those of you who don’t know her like I do, here’s a little bit of her background:
Before her appointment, she was President of EMILYs List, working to elect pro-choice Democratic women to public office at all levels.
And before that, she spent over a decade leading SEIU Local 2015, California’s largest labor union, which represents more than 300,000 home care workers across the state.
Laphonza also made some history today as the second Black woman to represent California in the U.S. Senate, and only the third Black woman in the history of the Senate. She’s also the first openly Black lesbian to serve in the U.S. Congress.
And like myself, she’s a working parent — one of only a handful in the Senate — so she understands first-hand the struggles working people and parents face.
Will you join me in congratulating Senator Laphonza Butler on her appointment to the U.S. Senate today? Use this link to sign the card:
[**https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/Congratulations-Laphonza**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/congratulate-laphonza-em/?source=em231003-1-30&refcode2=1555.159979.MEtDmz&akid=1555%2E159979%2EMEtDmz)
I know Laphonza will represent our great state well, and I’m looking forward to working closely with her to deliver for the people of California.
Thank you,
Alex Padilla
U.S. Senator for California
**[SIGN THE CARD](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/congratulate-laphonza-em/?source=em231003-1-30&refcode2=1555.159979.MEtDmz&akid=1555%2E159979%2EMEtDmz)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1555%2E159979%2EMEtDmz)

name: Lose Cruz HQ
subject: Guess who voted to shut down the government last week?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOSE CRUZ PAC
body:
Ted Cruz *really* loves government shutdowns.
# [](https://act.losecruzpac.com/go/128?t=1&akid=108%2E623276%2EXlrKKF)
Ted Cruz _really loves_ government shutdowns and wants you to know.
That’s why we found it puzzling when his office released the following statement:👇
_"No one wants a government shutdown..."_
**_It’s very simple: if Ted didn’t want a government shutdown, he wouldn’t have voted for one._**
Since his election to the Senate in 2012, the federal government has seen _three_ shutdowns — and barely averted what would have been another catastrophic shutdown over the weekend.
In _two_ of those shutdowns, Ted played a key role in both. Most infamously, in 2013, he decided to use the filibuster to bore his fellow senators by reading Dr. Seuss’s _Green Eggs and Ham_ in a failed attempt to repeal Obamacare — a decision that would have taken away the healthcare of millions had his stunt succeeded.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231003?refcode=em20231003&amount=5&refcode2=108_623276_XlrKKF&akid=108%2E623276%2EXlrKKF)
But it’s not like Ted would care. clean_body: Ted Cruz really loves government shutdowns. Ted Cruz really loves government shutdowns and wants you to know. That’s why we found it puzzling when his office released the following statement:👇 "No one wants a government shutdown..." It’s very simple: if Ted didn’t want a government shutdown, he wouldn’t have voted for one. Since his election to the Senate in 2012, the federal government has seen three shutdowns — and barely averted what would have been another catastrophic shutdown over the weekend. In two of those shutdowns, Ted played a key role in both. Most infamously, in 2013, he decided to use the filibuster to bore his fellow senators by reading Dr. Seuss’s Green Eggs and Ham in a failed attempt to repeal Obamacare — a decision that would have taken away the healthcare of millions had his stunt succeeded. But it’s not like Ted would care. Despite the fact that military personnel and even his own Senate staffers would not have been paid during a shutdown, Ted still would have received his salary — all the while putting Texans last by holding the government hostage to force his unpopular, far-right policies onto the rest of us. The need to Lose Cruz has never been more important. We’re long overdue for a senator who will work to put Texas first. Ted’s popularity with Texans has declined to a new low, which gives us the powerful opportunity to part ways with our part-time senator. But how successful we are depends on the support from folks like you. In solidarity, — LCHQ

body:
Before the trial begins later this month, we want to lay out everything you need to know about Fair Fight’s case against True the Vote. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70898423/430627818/1793776944?ms=bsc_emm_ff_20231003_e_ttv1_v1s2&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231003_e_ttv1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTExZjM1Ni0yYTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0TFlL9ndwHF4MnRmbwB1ISi_55nCbG3CdF-EaQqSU1o=&emci=8ab2d5d0-2862-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=d911f356-2a62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70898424/430627819/1188178520?ms=bsc_emm_ff_20231003_e_ttv1_v1s2&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231003_e_ttv1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTExZjM1Ni0yYTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0TFlL9ndwHF4MnRmbwB1ISi_55nCbG3CdF-EaQqSU1o=) **Before the trial begins on October 26, we want to lay out key facts you need to know about Fair Fight’s case against True the Vote.**
* In 2020, TTV **pushed unsubstantiated claims that 67,000 ineligible voters cast their ballots** in the presidential election.
* Leading up to the 2021 U.S. Senate runoff election, TTV announced plans to **challenge the eligibility of over 364,000 registered Georgia voters** — a tried-and-true voter suppression tactic.
* Ultimately, TTV worked with its supporters to **submit challenges against a total of 250,783 voters across 65 counties.**
* Data analysis shows TTV was more likely to challenge individuals in counties with **higher proportions of Black and brown voters.**
* For that runoff, they also announced the recruitment of “citizen watchdogs” to **surveil absentee ballot dropboxes and incentivized their supporters with a fund of over $1 million** as “compensation” for reporting allegations of so-called “illegal voting.”
* While the overwhelming majority of TTV’s challenges were dismissed, they still **placed a burden on election workers** and local election administration while **intimidating voters** and discouraging them from participating in future elections.
* TTV’s fundraising continues to echo their claims that people voted illegally, despite a **persistent refusal to provide evidence** of supposed unlawful voting.

Mass challenges like those orchestrated by True the Vote weaken our democracy and silence eligible voters. And voter intimidation isn’t just wrong — it’s illegal. So we filed a lawsuit against True the Vote in December 2020, with our trial date set for later this month (October 26). We now have a long-awaited opportunity to seek justice for voters and deter other anti-voter groups from undermining free and fair elections. Like the many federal voting rights cases that have come before, the stakes of our case are high, but this is a battle worth fighting **— because voter intimidation and baseless conspiracy theories have no place in our democracy.** That’s why we continue to fight back both inside and outside the courtroom to help mitigate the dangerous effects of mass challenges. We’re so grateful for your support along the way. Thank you, The Fair Fight Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70898425/430627820/1188178520?ms=bsc_emm_ff_20231003_e_ttv1_v1s2&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231003_e_ttv1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTExZjM1Ni0yYTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0TFlL9ndwHF4MnRmbwB1ISi_55nCbG3CdF-EaQqSU1o=)

| | | Friend, have you heard the news out of Florida? running **Former Congresswoman Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is officially running to DEFEAT extremist Republican Sen. Rick Scott!** This is one of our best — and only — chances to expand our Senate majority in 2024. Experts are already saying that Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection — and early polling puts Debbie ONE POINT AHEAD in this neck-and-neck race. But last time around, Scott spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this seat. Debbie is counting on strong, early support from grassroots donors like you to build a war chest capable of taking on Rick Scott’s money machine in this critical battleground race. [**Please, will you split $20 or more between Debbie and Serve America before midnight to become a Founding Donor in our fight to flip Florida blue?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70898430/430627827/1377474255?refcode=231003_SAP_DMP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzlhYjhlZi0yOTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gvYwBzWwsw_tn94MC4PUSWlcswKugbvlQZPxYpLXaTs=) Rick Scott is one of the worst Republicans in Washington. His radical policies are even too extreme for Mitch McConnell! He wrote the plan to raise taxes on working families and end Medicare and Social Security. And he’s supported a nationwide ban on abortions. **But here’s the good news:** As Scott has grown more radical and unpopular, his favorability ratings and chances of winning reelection have PLUMMETED. He won his seat last time with only **0.12%** of the vote — and now, experts at _CNN, Roll Call_ , and _FiveThirtyEight_ are calling Florida one of Democrats’ best pickup opportunities in 2024. Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running against him to defend our democracy, strengthen our economy, stop gun violence, and protect reproductive rights. **FAUCI SENTENCED TO LIFE IMPRISONMENT FOR DEATHS OF OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE!**
**View at**[**www.freedomwatchusa.org**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=e5da74e687&e=8edd2b8f7d)**and Freedom Watch YouTube Channel** (Boise, Idaho, October 3, 2023). Today, Citizens’ Judge Michel Pendleton sentenced Dr. Anthony Fauci to life imprisonment. On September 21, 2023, Larry Klayman, Esq., the founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch and current chairman and general counsel of Freedom Watch, as well as a Citizens Prosecutor, announced that the criminal conviction was handed down by Citizens’ Judge Michael Pendleton, after evidence was presented to Judge Pendleton by way of Freedom Watch’s Citizens’ Grand Jury and the criminal trial of Dr. Anthony Fauci that took place in July 2022. The Citizens’ Court found that Dr. Anthony Fauci had committed crimes against the American people and others worldwide. Specifically, Fauci was found guilty of negligent homicide and other felonies which resulted in the deaths of millions in the United States and worldwide. The legal bases for We the People to indict, try, convict and sentence persons like Fauci can be found at [www.freedomwatchusa.org](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=64b7c8863d&e=8edd2b8f7d) and in a book written by Klayman “It Takes a Counter-Revolution: Wake Up America!, which can be obtained by going to [www.freedomwatchusa.org](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=849a68dabd&e=8edd2b8f7d) and is sold online by all major booksellers, including Amazon and Barnes and Noble. Klayman had this to say in response to the sentencing of Fauci before a Citizens Court and Citizens Judge: “Today, Fauci was sentenced to life imprisonment by Citizens Judge Pendleton and ordered to serve out his life sentence. This is HUGE, folks! _The National Journal_ just released their top 20 House Power Rankings of the seats most likely to flip in 2024. Not only was NY-04 named second most likely to flip, but they even put our opponent, Anthony D’Esposito, square in their sights:
_“The math in Long Island simply doesn’t favor [D’Esposito]...who represents the bluest district held by a Republican. Biden carried the seat by nearly 15 points...both parties say that the freshman is the most vulnerable in New York.”_ **-_National Journal_**
---
These rankings show that the stakes couldn’t be higher in this race. We're not just fighting to win an election; we're fighting to free ourselves from the chaos of MAGA Republican rule.

**Our district is key to Democrats taking back the majority, and it's up to us to seize this opportunity.**

**With your support, we WILL make America strong and proud again. **

As president, I will focus on the issues that **MATTER** like our skyrocketing debt, out-of-control government spending, lack of transparency in schools, high crime in our cities, and chaos on the border.

_We have a country to save, but I need your help to make it happen._

I assure you that your dedication and commitment to a better future will never go unnoticed. Thank you for standing with me, and thank you for believing that America is worth fighting for!

**[I look forward to having you by my side and finishing this race STRONG.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=c3abf3f149144d4a923fa7c143aef7fd&_e=OXC0YzmDc163P-AcbuM1Sh6xWH22afn-54JiD8nyuSXPzl87wVso7Xj806iMTQDDmUP4Sq64HDjevV-ybsjZ8s38K4lxeMFuqgJ8KqEHn8QvdZHNnYbSbDPdvOtdhhU-zgAFWyoXL3KWtlPHKqyaDXhE45G4aGBnOMTdTtn6hx2tp-Y61B296vimrjOSnH3PWUxDjmdjGf3ND-cHJEX3CdThKXo6nYH-8WwB6VWKhO0v5EWO1NUWWPKRH-3xjJqFtpOJr10u2aY9tcp5FXWKqBWCqAXe9zTswHGeOVh1T5y9abNBlL90yPjw2CR5ABUFaxevYStym5_Vmm1NMeNji4U9bwcan7DN9WYToE5ftDCNbOhB9DYimNimgNMLSWkxkI4GXxKq0NLnRlqRJ7kpA9NlAThQyoMqTawpmzeKRr1EO4vUkd1t8elTzRhp3jDTS_dI-1N6NY4uIo5_PYFJsKwwDjzCAi5Xai5aaikVt1lF4LiAX6AeryiNRkgVdJSbWo2bYN6DjRM2jqtgBlm-7hE5gAugDRFQ5YYqI16J6_QxDlZvcjh0q8yGHYUS5w0GRdA1XdPiYfdPHrZrxUkjHA%3D%3D "I look forward to having you by my side and finishing this race STRONG.")**

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=c3abf3f149144d4a923fa7c143aef7fd&_e=OXC0YzmDc163P-AcbuM1Sh6xWH22afn-54JiD8nyuSXPzl87wVso7Xj806iMTQDDd5UGX0dpTybMECYwGWBITWhKD-mrUtKwgY4DH1Jhru3hQHkvP-UpoVAgs_4EZ_msQGAenhVqGiKos04vZWi4KFo-0rkq4JlYkAE92TPX43KRZ2Ynj22l5LrbGolT7Nxr746VyNSw6ArFTsvDMJPlgGAgmX0JwMQbyu9n_kWqSizgzGB4H0-k7zx2WM-14d7wJjLLw2Rli5I22W0E4zSTPZslt2y_k1_PPutFHFk2dZaNCz7aYK2kNzovtlGJb565T_hVFXtsidHe8cRBY7UvhJyjSf_3AueaYaZ52Cdp2U4JZRFMvDAA1QX3RqnnEOho9deQKfzwFIUThun_DHO95rGYjXu9KUwCuo_Y9flPlwpVCrFWjRd3dGbXCVf_ZHj_-175kYrQDMv5RN3WL0MQwrBLlZyXRAJCHZNojRCsodyv5Xirq__WXlbOhx6Mt9Afkws8ilDOzn4eAeb6g3-Ux1-h87AgzQi_j35x6gWwyH9NJzaFzH5vcx9ITspP-6H8fFNQZJq5usf2_nRnicPp2w%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, I wanted to reach out to personally say thank you. On Wednesday, I had the opportunity to take the stage for my second presidential debate and prove to America that I am the ONLY candidate who can win this fight and save our country's future. From the moment I left the stage, I've been FLOODED with a nonstop SURGE OF SUPPORT. "Right now, momentum is on our side, but I need YOUR help to keep it going. Can I count on your support right now?" | | We're closer than ever to VICTORY , but our work is far from over. We must continue the momentum, never let up, and keep pouring 100% into every day. We can't lose sight of what's to come. We have less than 4 months left until the first votes are cast. The stakes are now higher than ever to win this race. "Will you rush an immediate donation to help me continue to FUEL the momentum and WIN the fight for our future? " | | With your support, we WILL make America strong and proud again. As president, I will focus on the issues that MATTER like our skyrocketing debt, out-of-control government spending, lack of transparency in schools, high crime in our cities, and chaos on the border. We have a country to save, but I need your help to make it happen. I assure you that your dedication and commitment to a better future will never go unnoticed. Thank you for standing with me, and thank you for believing that America is worth fighting for! "I look forward to having you by my side and finishing this race STRONG." My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492

disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70902187/430630451/1312961101?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTNmMGFmZS0yZDYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRbz7kVIqGnumgrPoxD8DwO7LzoBXeXwkl0HijTqrfM=&emci=3f2bbb01-0162-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ce3f0afe-2d62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160) I support our workers, Peter. I grew up in a working-class family and watched my parents work hard to provide for me and my siblings. I carried those values when I launched my own company, and that’s why I always prioritized the well-being of my employees. At Total Wine, we were one of the first companies to “ban the box”, hiring over 1,400 formerly incarcerated citizens to our workforce. Additionally, all of our employees could share in same-sex partner benefits and take advantage of cost-free education benefits. Members of the United Auto Workers Union (UAW) are on strike, fighting for better wages and fair working conditions. Their demands aren't extreme, Peter – they’re necessary. I’m 100% behind their mission. And as Maryland’s Senator, I'll continue my track record of standing up for workers’ rights. **[But I want to hear where you stand, Peter. Click here to take our one-question poll, and let me know if you stand with me in support of UAW workers on strike.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70902188/430630452/1312961101?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTNmMGFmZS0yZDYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRbz7kVIqGnumgrPoxD8DwO7LzoBXeXwkl0HijTqrfM=&emci=3f2bbb01-0162-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ce3f0afe-2d62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160)** | [Do you stand with the UAW workers? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70902189/430630453/1312961101?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTNmMGFmZS0yZDYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRbz7kVIqGnumgrPoxD8DwO7LzoBXeXwkl0HijTqrfM=&emci=3f2bbb01-0162-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ce3f0afe-2d62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160)

clean_body: | I support our workers, Peter. I grew up in a working-class family and watched my parents work hard to provide for me and my siblings. I carried those values when I launched my own company, and that’s why I always prioritized the well-being of my employees. At Total Wine, we were one of the first companies to “ban the box”, hiring over 1,400 formerly incarcerated citizens to our workforce. Additionally, all of our employees could share in same-sex partner benefits and take advantage of cost-free education benefits. Members of the United Auto Workers Union (UAW) are on strike, fighting for better wages and fair working conditions. Their demands aren't extreme, Peter – they’re necessary. I’m 100% behind their mission. And as Maryland’s Senator, I'll continue my track record of standing up for workers’ rights. | Thank you, David Trone Mitch McConnell's super PAC is preparing to spend hundreds of millions to flip the Senate in 2024, and we need to be ready to fight back with everything we've got. David Trone knows that the path to holding our Democratic Senate majority runs right through Maryland – that's why he needs our support. | David Trone for Maryland P.O. Box 83998 Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998 United States | mailto:info@davidtrone.com Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: SIGN NOW: Critical animal welfare rule is at risk
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2029480?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: We MUST hold Big Ag accountable for inhumane treatment of innocent farm animals.[_Take action now! >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2029481?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** In 2017, a critical animal welfare rule that would ensure the humane treatment of organic livestock was _OVERTURNED._ This move has allowed Big Ag to skirt past organic agriculture standards by **denying innocent farm animals** adequate space to move around and access to fresh air and sunlight. The good news is that after years of delay, the USDA has finalized the _**Organic Livestock and Poultry Standard Rule (OLPS)**_ , which would strengthen animal welfare regulations in organic agriculture. But recently, Senator Marshall (R-KS) introduced an amendment that would _**BLOCK**_ the OLPS from moving forward. It’s urgent that the USDA enacts the animal welfare rule immediately — _**before more farm animals are subjected to inhumane treatment.**_ [_**Please, Friend, will you step up now to help defend farm animals and the organic industry from Big Ag’s corporate greed?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2029482?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2029483?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Organic agriculture began from public demands for a _**healthier, safer, and more transparent food system**_. The OLPS animal welfare rule would ensure that _all_ animals on organic farms have plenty of room to move around and access to the outdoors.
_It’s imperative that we keep the organic label strong._ Shoppers who look for the organic label are trusting that the products meet the **highest quality standards** and that animals on organic farms are treated with dignity and respect.
And while most organic farmers already meet these expectations, they are losing business to large corporations that are **finding loopholes** in the system.
[_**But Friends of the Earth is siding with organic farmers, consumers, and animal activists who overwhelmingly support the OLPS rule. Together, we are fighting back against Big Ag companies that are threatening the integrity of the organic label, and we need environmentalists like you to speak up today to show strong public support. Friend, can we count on you? Add your name right now! >>**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2029484?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2029483?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

body:
We won’t let their plan succeed. Help us fight back today!| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=20e92d7fc09948a2955c155709c11bf7&_e=66r8Amaa365w-v3v4HaU7OG1mRlb5Cw8sbvjOobQmT513-dAxMAKHdF586gvYPWEAkKpDWpnTM8fuJODsOd-_ITHfzI8GKZoqgq1wJzpobgoRgsVa4GfHTkLsZR7JxRdOWGU3a0cefmAN5TPrGwrqR7eB_iyEUPdcVCMfg_Lirwa0jeeXepwxYBCYWic8iE5_RMYyoMiCjHhQwZ317pTL9YtA1xUT6ltt9Qzygah51bmbU4faj5mKSrqW3nrh835EnA6E_7d13QrqonnUwjOvxY7jEcpJGBT9-LRfFoZFoNhiSi361BCf6Zz8tytq_yn14XM1VcGBPN7Kghrd7378X4izU0cfvlpUhkXvCmPXvOp2vNQYr5KZfdDY_V1xM1t)
---
Peter, We've uncovered the Left's secret new plan to overtake America's elections, and it all ties back to George Soros.
---
[PUT AN END TO THEIR PLANS - DONATE NOW](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=20e92d7fc09948a2955c155709c11bf7&_e=66r8Amaa365w-v3v4HaU7OG1mRlb5Cw8sbvjOobQmT513-dAxMAKHdF586gvYPWEAkKpDWpnTM8fuJODsOd-_ITHfzI8GKZoqgq1wJzpobgoRgsVa4GfHTkLsZR7JxRdOWGU3a0cefmAN5TPrGwrqR7eB_iyEUPdcVCMfg_Lirwa0jeeXepwxYBCYWic8iE5_RMYyoMiCjHhQwZ317pTL5dDM4QeKN8YoK3gzQSqg-Qgl3KrMEy7oq31xG1q2hHAnlXHckJiOq7BhQqPRwpyc_MlJHL3Pf7Fu4YuD4IpuEUO4dmkmdGhtGQ-on5POIlTWdc9Z5CBLYW4J5kDowso6e9zOd1uQ_Rnq5UuwnhdyRLcjDcojW4cPDruqNA2In8w)
---
Despite the Left's plan to centralize America's elections to be run by DC bureaucrats, our elections are still run and funded by state and local governments. Because of this, they sometimes need support from the federal government.

In 2020, that help came in two forms: 1\. The CARES Act, which poured $400 million into elections.
2\. An additional $420 million from billionaire Mark Zuckerburg. Now, some state governments are fabricating new reasons to try and get more federal money. The leading proponent for this is Issue One, a political organization run by _**[George Soros' son, Jonathan](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=20e92d7fc09948a2955c155709c11bf7&_e=66r8Amaa365w-v3v4HaU7OG1mRlb5Cw8sbvjOobQmT513-dAxMAKHdF586gvYPWEAkKpDWpnTM8fuJODsOd-_ITHfzI8GKZoqgq1wJzpobgoRgsVa4GfHTkLsZR7JxRdOWGU3a0cefmAN5TPrGwrqR7eB_iyEUPdcVCMfg_Lirwa0jeeXepwxYBCYWic8iE5_RMYyoMiCjHhQwZ317pTL0yK0B8WVk2D0k3aMLvqhmVzRM_QwXprUDq_w_9ba7-JClXIGJOByGZ52W6WUhDs_KmTgsv1s0AI6dbDG-xs-VBWa6bD9mCn3yN1OKrZeqgvyY4iOwJCDWM6AYd9tomCdJKnLCko73fsNRmegPCgKehphW8owxUInX8qYqfO8_HJ)**_.

They want more federal money in elections because they want more influence in our elections. They want to absolve the power given to the states in the Constitution and give it to DC bureaucrats.
---
[HELP STOP THEM](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=20e92d7fc09948a2955c155709c11bf7&_e=66r8Amaa365w-v3v4HaU7OG1mRlb5Cw8sbvjOobQmT513-dAxMAKHdF586gvYPWEAkKpDWpnTM8fuJODsOd-_ITHfzI8GKZoqgq1wJzpobgoRgsVa4GfHTkLsZR7JxRdOWGU3a0cefmAN5TPrGwrqR7eB_iyEUPdcVCMfg_Lirwa0jeeXepwxYBCYWic8iE5_RMYyoMiCjHhQwZ317pTL60UxOe2TdzgPO3MgHXAM8L8HQ2JSla0OVqBNa-b_D0bnYZke0DSNtvzubapDY3NHtUK7hA_aF-2dI0yMasirfGOIrv4qi9C8DJ-7ep3TgKtsVDyDWMqhUgO4YtCKxAp1q_IeOn52OYoyYkrVjWKZAZWihKl263WSr3bvZ8sRSKw)
---
But we won't let it happen. Voter Reference Foundation was founded to fight against activists trying to destroy our election integrity.

We refuse to sit idly by while our Constitution is dragged through the mud.

Your support is crucial in this fight. By making a donation today, you will help us ensure that our elections remain fair, transparent, and free from undue influence.

clean_body: We won’t let their plan succeed. Help us fight back today!| | | Peter, We've uncovered the Left's secret new plan to overtake America's elections, and it all ties back to George Soros. Despite the Left's plan to centralize America's elections to be run by DC bureaucrats, our elections are still run and funded by state and local governments. Because of this, they sometimes need support from the federal government. In 2020, that help came in two forms: 1\. The CARES Act, which poured $400 million into elections. 2\. An additional $420 million from billionaire Mark Zuckerburg. Now, some state governments are fabricating new reasons to try and get more federal money. The leading proponent for this is Issue One, a political organization run by . They want more federal money in elections because they want more influence in our elections. They want to absolve the power given to the states in the Constitution and give it to DC bureaucrats. But we won't let it happen. Voter Reference Foundation was founded to fight against activists trying to destroy our election integrity. We refuse to sit idly by while our Constitution is dragged through the mud. Your support is crucial in this fight. By making a donation today, you will help us ensure that our elections remain fair, transparent, and free from undue influence. Thank you, Voter Reference Foundation Team | | | | | | | | Paid for by Voter Reference Foundation | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: A Unified Front: Our Strength in the Face of Division
disclaimer_text: Paid for by One Georgia Leadership Committee
body:
Hi Derek,
Last week's GOP debate was more than just a political event; it was a symbolic representation of a party struggling to find its footing. The absence of their front-runner, Donald Trump, was telling. While we might wonder about the reasons behind his no-show, it underscores the current state of the GOP: fragmented, inconsistent and seemingly lacking direction.
Candidates like Nikki Haley and Vivek Ramaswamy tried to fill the void with misleading comments on immigration and misinformed views on transgenderism. But their attempts only highlighted the deeper divisions within their party.
In contrast, the Democratic party stands as a beacon of unity and purpose. Our commitment to the truth, our dedication to inclusivity, and our unwavering vision for a progressive America set us apart. While the GOP grapples with its identity, we are clear about our mission and the path ahead.
Derek, this is our moment. And we are unified. **[Your contribution demonstrates our unity and how we champion democratic values.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70902547/430631681/2129541143?refcode=fr100323&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTQvMS85NDA4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlNWIyNy0yZjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7H9qDrlz0JoyuON7H3uSbzjXCTwVZ_rCNrzEyZAgObU=)**
Together, let's show the nation that unity, truth and dedication are the true hallmarks of leadership.
With determination and gratitude,
Stacey

931 Monroe Dr NE
A102 #345
Atlanta, GA 30308

name: Robert Garcia
subject: No on Kevin McCarthy and No on Shutdowns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70903142/430634178/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODY1NmY4Mi0zMDYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bX2YQb5y59u6cn6WkkPXCiG1nzNzYV27trKi7QxhCIk=)
Team -
I’m voting to oust Kevin McCarthy as Speaker. He cannot be trusted and he almost plunged our government into chaos last week.
On Saturday night, we were just hours away from a government shutdown caused by our anti-American MAGA wing of the House.
Extremist House Republicans including Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz, and Lauren Boebert had been holding the government hostage over the past few weeks. They blackmailed Kevin McCarthy by threatening a shutdown if their extreme demands were not included in the bill to fund the government. And when McCarthy caved to their extreme demands and called a vote on a bill that included 30% cuts to social security, the far right still voted the bill down because they wanted a shutdown.
But at the eleventh hour, House Democrats came through. 209 of us voted to keep the government open while only 126 Republicans did. 90 Republicans voted NAY, sending a clear message that this extreme wing is no longer a small fraction of the GOP. Almost half of the Republican caucus was willing to shut down the government to protect their political interests, but Democrats chose to put the people first.
Team, while Democrats are ready to do the people’s work and fund the government, MAGA Republicans have once again thrown the House into chaos with their own infighting. Kevin McCarthy can’t keep his own party in order, nevermind the House. That’s why I am voting against his Speakership today.
So I am asking for your help to make sure MAGA extremists are no longer allowed to run our government again after 2024. Together, we can hold those MAGA extremists accountable at the polls next year, unseat every last one of them, and take back the House majority.
**[If you are with me, please contribute to my reelection campaign so I can support Democrats in races across the country that can help us take back the House majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70903143/430634179/871887458?refcode2=28656f82-3062-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&refcode=em231003-1-t3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODY1NmY4Mi0zMDYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bX2YQb5y59u6cn6WkkPXCiG1nzNzYV27trKi7QxhCIk=)**

No small group of extremists should be able to hold the government, the livelihoods of working Americans, and our national security hostage. And we will hold them accountable at the polls.

Robert

clean_body: = Team - I’m voting to oust Kevin McCarthy as Speaker. He cannot be trusted and he almost plunged our government into chaos last week. On Saturday night, we were just hours away from a government shutdown caused by our anti-American MAGA wing of the House. Extremist House Republicans including Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz, and Lauren Boebert had been holding the government hostage over the past few weeks. They blackmailed Kevin McCarthy by threatening a shutdown if their extreme demands were not included in the bill to fund the government. And when McCarthy caved to their extreme demands and called a vote on a bill that included 30% cuts to social security, the far right still voted the bill down because they wanted a shutdown. But at the eleventh hour, House Democrats came through. 209 of us voted to keep the government open while only 126 Republicans did. 90 Republicans voted NAY, sending a clear message that this extreme wing is no longer a small fraction of the GOP. Almost half of the Republican caucus was willing to shut down the government to protect their political interests, but Democrats chose to put the people first. Team, while Democrats are ready to do the people’s work and fund the government, MAGA Republicans have once again thrown the House into chaos with their own infighting. Kevin McCarthy can’t keep his own party in order, nevermind the House. That’s why I am voting against his Speakership today. So I am asking for your help to make sure MAGA extremists are no longer allowed to run our government again after 2024. Together, we can hold those MAGA extremists accountable at the polls next year, unseat every last one of them, and take back the House majority. = = No small group of extremists should be able to hold the government, the livelihoods of working Americans, and our national security hostage. And we will hold them accountable at the polls. Thank you, Robert * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

| Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to say thank you for all your support this past month. **Thanks to dedicated grassroots supporters like you who recognized the urgency of this moment, we not only achieved but surpassed our quarterly fundraising goal!**

I can now devote less time to fundraising efforts and focus more on addressing the pressing issues that directly affect families across the greater Lehigh Valley and the United States.

However, our work is far from complete. Right now, I have three Republican extremists working to unseat me, and National Republicans have already spent big money on attack ads against me, so we need to keep up the momentum going forward.

Thank you,

Susan Wild

**P.S.** The fight will only get tougher from here, so we must build our grassroots support to defend this toss-up seat and take back the House next November. Friend, I called Kevin McCarthy out in our debate for choosing the Speakership over Democracy, and now he is paying the price!
McCarthy’s decision to play partisan games instead of helping California's working families led him down this disastrous career path.
We need to make sure he doesn’t leave any more chaos in his wake, Friend. We CAN stop him by beating him at the ballot box!
With your help, we can get McCarthy out of Congress once and for all. Friend, will you chip in today to ensure this is McCarthy’s last term in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wood-email?refcode=20231003_em_fr_b1_MW_react]

Today, the House of Representatives is poised to historically reclaim the Speaker's gavel from McCarthy, but we still need to make him lose his seat on Election Day.
Friend, our community deserves a representative who leads with our values and fights for our shared future.
Remember, as long as Kevin McCarthy is in Congress, he's still going to support an agenda that:

3️⃣ Gives handouts to billionaires and big corporations
Friend, I need you with me to take Kevin McCarthy out of public service once and for all. name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: MAGA Republicans’ Chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
| Team, today, MAGA Republicans voted to oust Kevin McCarthy as House Speaker. I don’t believe this is a time for celebration. It’s a serious and sad moment for this Congress and our country. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70903629/430635883/-349209756?amount=5&refcode=JMFC_20231003_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDk1YWNhZS0zMzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=747Z7yGXZ-VsbRmS_5b3nKf_JtOIwZQbGZsdnFp7nh8=) Our institutions are in jeopardy. It’s time that we put people over politics.

I remain committed to finding common ground and working across the aisle for what is best for my constituents and the country.

name: Rick Coplen
subject: Perry Does NOT care about us!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
First, I want to thank you for your generous support ahead of last week's end-of-quarter deadline. With a team like this, I'm confident that we have many more successes ahead.

Now, I want to update you on Scott Perry's failure to lead our district. Scott Perry's spokesman brashly declared in PennLive today that in 2024, Perry will put his record up against _**“whichever out-of-touch liberal is left standing to run alongside Joe Biden ...”**_

Perry's legislative record of doing things that help the people of the 10th Congressional District is **NONEXISTENT**. Just this past weekend, Perry again voted against the interests of the people that he claims to know and represent. He voted to shut down our government. Unacceptable. Again!

My ongoing efforts to listen to ALL the people of the 10th Congressional District, including residents of Dauphin, York, and Cumberland Counties, recently took me back to the streets of Allison Hill in Harrisburg. After enjoying a delicious slice of pepperoni pizza from Pizza Bolis while sitting in the adjacent community garden in front of the beautiful mural, I walked the streets to listen to residents' concerns.

While approaching four African American people I clearly heard one of them say, _**“No one can survive on a minimum wage of $7.25 an hour.”**_ I listened to these four good people for nearly 20 minutes. Then I asked a simple question, _**“Have you ever seen Scott Perry here on the streets of Allison Hill?”**_ In unison, all four laughed out loud. Then one stated, _**“Scott Perry has never been with us here on the Allison Hill streets. Scott Perry will never be with us here. Scott Perry does not care about us.”**_

**I do care about the people who live in Allison Hill and throughout the 10th Congressional District.** With your help, I will defeat Scott Perry in 2024. I will then continue to walk the streets, listening to the residents of Allison Hill and everyone else in PA 10. I will establish Congressional offices in Harrisburg, York City, and Cumberland County. I will staff those offices with professionals who genuinely care about ALL the people of PA 10 and who will take swift and effective action to help them.

I can beat Scott Perry. **I’ve won elections in a Republican district twice before** , and with YOUR help, I can do it again. No other candidate has my proven record, unique experience, and expertise to help ALL the people of PA10. Your donation to our campaign today will be greatly appreciated and put to good use.

Thanks,

Rick

P.S. In 2025, I will aggressively advocate for and vote to pass federal legislation for a federal minimum wage of at least $15 per hour. After passage in the Democratically controlled House and Senate, President Joe Biden will sign it into law. That will help ALL the residents of PA 10. More on the economics of how well that works later... regardless of the false claims of those who know nothing of what they speak.

clean_body: | First, I want to thank you for your generous support ahead of last week's end-of-quarter deadline. With a team like this, I'm confident that we have many more successes ahead. Now, I want to update you on Scott Perry's failure to lead our district. Scott Perry's spokesman brashly declared in PennLive today that in 2024, Perry will put his record up against “whichever out-of-touch liberal is left standing to run alongside Joe Biden ...” Perry's legislative record of doing things that help the people of the 10th Congressional District is NONEXISTENT. Just this past weekend, Perry again voted against the interests of the people that he claims to know and represent. He voted to shut down our government. Unacceptable. Again! My ongoing efforts to listen to ALL the people of the 10th Congressional District, including residents of Dauphin, York, and Cumberland Counties, recently took me back to the streets of Allison Hill in Harrisburg. After enjoying a delicious slice of pepperoni pizza from Pizza Bolis while sitting in the adjacent community garden in front of the beautiful mural, I walked the streets to listen to residents' concerns. While approaching four African American people I clearly heard one of them say, “No one can survive on a minimum wage of $7.25 an hour.” I listened to these four good people for nearly 20 minutes. Then I asked a simple question, “Have you ever seen Scott Perry here on the streets of Allison Hill?” In unison, all four laughed out loud. Then one stated, “Scott Perry has never been with us here on the Allison Hill streets. Scott Perry will never be with us here. Scott Perry does not care about us.” I do care about the people who live in Allison Hill and throughout the 10th Congressional District. With your help, I will defeat Scott Perry in 2024. I will then continue to walk the streets, listening to the residents of Allison Hill and everyone else in PA 10. I will establish Congressional offices in Harrisburg, York City, and Cumberland County. I will staff those offices with professionals who genuinely care about ALL the people of PA 10 and who will take swift and effective action to help them. I can beat Scott Perry. I’ve won elections in a Republican district twice before , and with YOUR help, I can do it again. No other candidate has my proven record, unique experience, and expertise to help ALL the people of PA10. Your donation to our campaign today will be greatly appreciated and put to good use. Thanks, Rick P.S. In 2025, I will aggressively advocate for and vote to pass federal legislation for a federal minimum wage of at least $15 per hour. After passage in the Democratically controlled House and Senate, President Joe Biden will sign it into law. That will help ALL the residents of PA 10. More on the economics of how well that works later... regardless of the false claims of those who know nothing of what they speak. | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

body:

name: Katie Porter
subject: Play stupid games, win stupid prizes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Help us take back the majority.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=30854%2E3422442%2EdmiWOh)
Hello from Washington, where Kevin McCarthy was just removed as Speaker.
We’re in this unprecedented circus because House Republicans have been unable to govern ever since they regained the majority. Remember back in January, when it took days of votes to finally elect a Speaker? McCarthy had to give all sorts of concessions to the most extreme members of his party in order to finally get the Speakership, and now we’re seeing the results.
Speaker McCarthy and House Republicans have engineered this crisis, and the American people are paying the price.
**It reminds me of the Taylor Swift lyric: play stupid games, win stupid prizes.**
Let me be clear, it’s not Democrats’ job to save Kevin McCarthy. This is a problem created by the GOP caucus, and they need to work their BS out.
Democrats have proven we can govern, and today is another reminder of why we *must* take back the majority in 2024. Today you can help us do that by making a donation that will be split between my campaign and Will Rollins. **[Will is running to flip a highly-competitive GOP-held seat in Southern California, and by winning just a few races like this one, we can put an end to this GOP majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231003-2?refcode=EMAM03_2_SPE_20231003_V1_F&refcode2=30854_3422442_dmiWOh&akid=30854%2E3422442%2EdmiWOh)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231003-2?refcode=EMAM03_2_SPE_20231003_V1_F&refcode2=30854_3422442_dmiWOh&akid=30854%2E3422442%2EdmiWOh)
Onward,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM03_2_SPE_20231003_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=30854_3422442_dmiWOh&akid=30854%2E3422442%2EdmiWOh)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=30854%2E3422442%2EdmiWOh)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=30854%2E3422442%2EdmiWOh)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

I couldn’t be more proud of what our grassroots movement has accomplished together.
→ For too long, Americans have struggled to keep up with the skyrocketing price of prescription drugs. **That’s why I led the effort to finally lift the ban on Medicare negotiating lower prescription drug prices.** Now I’m going back for more so we can continue bringing down healthcare costs.

→ More than 130,000 homes and small businesses across Minnesota lack access to broadband – despite the fact that high-speed internet is a necessity for modern life. **So I led the bipartisan effort to secure critical federal funds to expand rural broadband ****access.** These funds will be game-changing for communities across the state.
Peter helped me deliver real results to make Americans’ lives better. **But there’s still so much more we can do****–****and that’s why I promise to never give up on the fights that matter.**
**[I never would have made it this far without supporters like you. I hope I can count on you to stick with me by donating to my reelection campaign and Patty Murray today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70903975/430637043/-434033308?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk150-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWM1MTViNS0zNDYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0IwLwcZWgUQfIP1zxcZK7lgH7e01Fw2jkt8CPvIDDls=)**
Let’s continue working together to get things done.

– Amy

name: Christina Coffman
subject: do women need abortion?
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | Dear Peter,

Abortion is hailed as an empowering choice for women in America.

But is it all it’s cracked up to be?

All politics aside, there are legitimate and serious risks that come with abortion. If nothing else, women at least deserve the whole truth to make an informed choice.

We need to know the psychological risks, which for post-abortive women include:

* 115% increase in suicidal behaviors
* 110% increase in alcohol use/abuse
* 37% increase in depression
* 34% increase in anxiety disorders
* Sense of loneliness or isolation
* Loss of self-confidence
* Insomnia or nightmares
* Relationship issues

And we need to know the physical risks, which could be:

* Damage to cervix
* Scarring of uterine lining
* [Breast cancer](http://newsletter.studentsforlife.org/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cCUzQSUyRiUyRmh1c2hmaWxtLmNvbSUyRnNjaWVuY2UlMkY=&sig=4a5jyYyB1nKE4i3BmtzbjjTJHbEyVJvDChttNNcYrEwh&iat=1696387119&a=%7C%7C649951085%7C%7C&account=studentsforlife%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=fiGFHTedlI12kAuN2r9LH261CfruYrlEkjJbjSRGuO8iVyDK%3AH2IBdPyEcdP7DyYUBSJeFJk3qr9iU3W7&s=e8ce76248dd02de8a72576da08bdf2f9&i=2919A2894A1A27634 "http://newsletter.studentsforlife.org/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cCUzQSUyRiUyRmh1c2hmaWxtLmNvbSUyRnNjaWVuY2UlMkY=&sig=4a5jyYyB1nKE4i3BmtzbjjTJHbEyVJvDChttNNcYrEwh&iat=1696387119&a=%7C%7C649951085%7C%7C&account=studentsforlife%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=fiGFHTedlI12kAuN2r9LH261CfruYrlEkjJbjSRGuO8iVyDK%3AH2IBdPyEcdP7DyYUBSJeFJk3qr9iU3W7&s=e8ce76248dd02de8a72576da08bdf2f9&i=2919A2894A1A27634")
* Future premature birth(s) or miscarriages
* Infection or sepsis
* Placenta Previa
* Perforation of uterus
* Damage to other organs
* Death

It’s not fair to women considering abortion to not know these risks.

Women should be asking these questions. But that’s not all we should be asking.

We should be asking...

... why we were told to view our offspring as intruders who deserve punishment.

... why abortion is “crucial” to our equality to men.

... and why abortion is presented as a solution when all it does it create more problems.

**Abortion doesn’t solve any of the problems that bring women to abortion facilities.** An impoverished woman leaves an abortion facility and goes right back to poverty.

A survivor of sexual abuse returns to her abuser.

A young girl still bears the weight of the adult experience of gained & lost motherhood after leaving Planned Parenthood.

The only difference is now, these women also have any number of physical & psychological harms as a result of abortion to add to their original problem.

There is endless love and support for women experiencing unplanned pregnancies. If you or a loved one faces one yourself, don’t be fooled by an abortion business that is only motivated to tell you, “You can’t.”

There is a massive network of compassionate people ready to tell you, “You can.”

Text HELPLINE to 313131 for no-cost, judgement-free support. Or just email me for help!

For Life,

---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
| |
---
| | Christina Coffman
Director of Pro-Life Future
Students for Life of America

P.S. -- Do you have questions about abortion? Visit [www.askaprolifer.com](http://newsletter.studentsforlife.org/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cCUzQSUyRiUyRnd3dy5hc2thcHJvbGlmZXIuY29tJTJG&sig=ADGChThTTnfxh6EkJYfzZomEWtfpawy3GvZ5VCJf6kw2&iat=1696387119&a=%7C%7C649951085%7C%7C&account=studentsforlife%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=fiGFHTedlI12kAuN2r9LH261CfruYrlEkjJbjSRGuO8iVyDK%3AH2IBdPyEcdP7DyYUBSJeFJk3qr9iU3W7&s=e8ce76248dd02de8a72576da08bdf2f9&i=2919A2894A1A27635) to get answers.

---
| | |
---
Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](http://newsletter.studentsforlife.org/proc.php?nl=1&c=2919&m=2894&s=e8ce76248dd02de8a72576da08bdf2f9&act=unsub)

Students for Life of America, 4755 Jefferson Davis Highway, Fredericksburg, VA 22408, United States

name: Janna Gonzalez
subject: Mark's birthday today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Gonzalez for Senate
body:
markagonzalez.com [markagonzalez.com]
Hi friends,
My name is Janna Gonzalez, Mark’s wife.
Mark has been a lot of things over the last 44 years — a devoted husband, a loving father, a passionate lawyer turned District Attorney, and now, a candidate for US Senate. Through it all though, one thing has always shined through: his commitment to the people who he cares about.
And, that commitment extends to all Texans — even those he doesn’t know.
actblue.com/donate/Marks44th [actblue.com/donate/Marks44th]
I couldn’t be prouder of Mark for always standing up for what’s right. Now, on his 44th birthday, it’s clear the best way for him to do that over the next year will be by defeating Ted Cruz and giving Texas a Senator who cares about all of us.
Click here to donate to Mark Gonzalez [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Marks44th]
I hope you’ll consider making a donation to Mark’s campaign to help him celebrate 44. [actblue.com/donate/marks44th] It’s going to be a long ride to win this race — but I’ll always bet on Mark.
Best,
Janna
P.S.: Don't forget to follow Mark's campaign on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram at the links below!
https://www.facebook.com/MarkGonzalezTX/ [https://www.facebook.com/MarkGonzalezTX/] https://twitter.com/DAMarkGonzalez [https://twitter.com/DAMarkGonzalez] https://instagram.com/MarkForTexas [https://instagram.com/MarkForTexas]

subject: Highly Classified Questionnaire

body:
This must not be shared with anyone. Including | Fellow American,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Julie=20Clark?=
subject: 🚨McCarthy Removed as House Speaker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
The END of the RINO movement | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3baf1b6ddeac/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12654753?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=c2b763dace&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| History was made with the removal of Republican House Speaker Kevin McCarthy today.

**Promises were made to We The People, and when our political party was given our vote to deliver on those pledges,_words failed to materialize into action_.**

Our movement to reject **RINOs** who refuse to honor their promises to their constituents is WINNING!
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=84a41b6d2a&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| Rep. Tony Gonzales failed to uphold our Republican Platform and we censured him.

Speaker McCarthy failed to use the power he was given to make the desperately needed changes in our nation, and brave America First public servants represented our voice by holding him accountable.

**The END of the RINO movement is coming, and we’re on the path to reestablishing the foundation of a Constitutional Republic that is beholden to its people!**

Peter, join me in celebrating this triumphant moment for our America First movement by backing my **RINO** hunting campaign with a contribution of ANY amount today!
---
| [JOIN JULIE’S RINO HUNT »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=3e76939df5&e=c982eb7ad4 "JOIN JULIE’S RINO HUNT »")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=d9cb303e20&e=c982eb7ad4 "CONTRIBUTE TODAY »")
---
| For America,

Julie Clark
Former Medina County Republican Chair
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23

I've got to say I was a little embarrassed when I gave an update to our generous donor that there were only 53 people who accepted his generous 1500% match.

Ever since I broke the news to my supporters, I've been shaking in my boots because this fundraising push was supposed to obliterate every fundraising worry this campaign's had for months, and contributions have just totally undermined our expectations.

**I 'm going to make this short, the data folks have crunched the numbers and we need at least 300 more contributions by MIDNIGHT to reach our projections.**

I 'm going to make this short, the data folks have crunched the numbers and we need at least 300 more contributions by MIDNIGHT to reach our projections. | Best, John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. Greetings Friend, Change is afoot in Virginia’s 7th district. At its vanguard is Cameron Hamilton, a man I've had the privilege of calling a friend. While many are familiar with his political aspirations, few know of the depth of his commitment. His service as a Navy SEAL bears witness to his courage, while his love for his family showcases his heart. In these polarized times, our district yearns for authentic representation. By endorsing Cameron, we can unite behind a shared vision of prosperity, security, and community. Your endorsement would not only strengthen Cameron's campaign but also send a powerful message of unity. The future of VA-07 lies in our hands. By supporting Cameron, we are taking a decisive step towards that brighter future.

clean_body: It’s time we move forward | | | | | | Greetings Friend, Change is afoot in Virginia’s 7th district. At its vanguard is Cameron Hamilton, a man I've had the privilege of calling a friend. While many are familiar with his political aspirations, few know of the depth of his commitment. His service as a Navy SEAL bears witness to his courage, while his love for his family showcases his heart. In these polarized times, our district yearns for authentic representation. By endorsing Cameron, we can unite behind a shared vision of prosperity, security, and community. Your endorsement would not only strengthen Cameron's campaign but also send a powerful message of unity. The future of VA-07 lies in our hands. By supporting Cameron, we are taking a decisive step towards that brighter future. In anticipation of your support, Nick Freitas | | Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas

name: Andy Beshear for Governor
subject: $5 to help in the last 5 weeks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
What if we told you that a single $5 donation was enough to help make a real difference in this campaign? Peter,

What if we told you that a single $5 donation was enough to help make a real difference in this campaign? It might sound crazy...but it's true! Let us explain:

Behind this campaign are thousands of grassroots supporters. People like you who want to make our Commonwealth the best place to live, work, and raise a family.

On the other hand, Andy's opponent, Daniel Cameron, has a Wall Street billionaire from Pennsylvania, Rand Paul, and other outside interest groups putting money into super PACs. Cameron wants to undo our progress, and his backers have the deep pockets to help him do it.

That's why we're asking for $5. You see, if you and a fraction of other supporters reading this email chip in just $5 – or whatever you can afford – we'll be able to keep pace with the super PACs spending big to defeat Andy, and that gets us one step closer to winning this tough race.

[**So, what do you say, Peter? ---

| | **Thank you so much for your incredible support of the work Movement Labs does!** We put together ambitious goals every quarter, and you helped us knock it out of the park. As we always say: we don't believe in off-years. **We're on the ground year-round because the hard work of grassroots organizing never stops.** But if we didn't have gracious donors and supporters like you who not only support us financially by chipping in hard-earned dollars, but also by volunteering, amplifying our message, running for office, and knocking doors for local candidates, it would mean more Republicans go uncontested and more rural counties go unorganized. Here's what we're doing because of your support in 2023 alone:
* Sending out another round of $500 quarterly grants to over 300 rural Democratic county parties
* Identifying over 71,000 prospective candidates to step up and run for local office this year
* Issuing digital organizing grants to 10 Black-led progressive organizations

Feeling inspired all over again? Help us bring new, like-minded folks into the fold. Forward this email to a friend and let them know why you care about electing progressives to local office and turning red counties purple! Onward, _Yoni_ Yoni Landau
CEO

clean_body: We couldn’t have done it without you, thank you! | | | | Thank you so much for your incredible support of the work Movement Labs does! We put together ambitious goals every quarter, and you helped us knock it out of the park. As we always say: we don't believe in off-years. We're on the ground year-round because the hard work of grassroots organizing never stops. But if we didn't have gracious donors and supporters like you who not only support us financially by chipping in hard-earned dollars, but also by volunteering, amplifying our message, running for office, and knocking doors for local candidates, it would mean more Republicans go uncontested and more rural counties go unorganized. Here's what we're doing because of your support in 2023 alone: Sending out another round of $500 quarterly grants to over 300 rural Democratic county parties Identifying over 71,000 prospective candidates to step up and run for local office this year Issuing digital organizing grants to 10 Black-led progressive organizations Feeling inspired all over again? Help us bring new, like-minded folks into the fold. Forward this email to a friend and let them know why you care about electing progressives to local office and turning red counties purple! Onward, Yoni Yoni Landau CEO Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. |

We leaned on this team heavily for our fundraising in the last quarter, and you all came through. All the love and support we've received from this team has put the Governor in such a good mood that he just had to bust the moves out this weekend.1 [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70905283/430641935/1392254909?refcode=em20231003-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Q5ODM0YS0zYTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N8VGFD9ImnbBiYmaEuGxtfW9AYBdS-aHxn-gxCwdvWM=) But we know we can't rest on our laurels. clean_body: = Friend, Thank you to grassroots supporters like you for contributing toward our movement for a brighter future for Maryland. We leaned on this team heavily for our fundraising in the last quarter, and you all came through. All the love and support we've received from this team has put the Governor in such a good mood that he just had to bust the moves out this weekend.1 = But we know we can't rest on our laurels. There's a lot of work to do here in Maryland and across the country. And to get that work done, we'll need a strong start to our final quarter of the year. = | = Wes is fighting for all of us – not just a select few. He spends his time working tirelessly for all Marylander families to realize their potential in this great state. We can’t thank you enough for supporting this vision. In gratitude, Team Wes Moore P.S. We’ll be grateful if you’re able to help us start our October fundraising on a strong foot. = = * 1 -

We can’t keep doing the same thing - we need bold action. Most polling groups continue to ask you the same questions over and over again. But we want to do something new - something unique - that lets you share your opinion and improves our odds of winning in 2024. We’ve been conducting surveys like this for decades, and we have never seen anything like this before. This survey is not for everyone. If you don’t want the truth, then this isn’t for you, please don’t take it. We don’t even care if you donate after this survey, but we hope that you will because you love your country so much. body:
They don't want you to be a part of the fight

[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kLtygzAQRb9m6cxIu0JAoSKOo1SZSRG7F3qAJsImIMfD32dMnLT7OPfMNeOUYlgV1HtAHKJbABHoCRCvmU7meHyb1x3277vX6oT9fYnPgJjXyf9fPiClH01M92l9KJwSaHiwhVdctpJqXkteDKoiLqogjTS2DQ0555uGOhQhVB1vJS-iQobEGSNERMHKmhGF1pFlleBd1YBgW1AZZu_zEM-ffnYmprW0l7FIash5WjYxDagvrivPV5v8dfn9spcRUD-UAfU3oN6_fDT9rRVHBNJbCXT44lOWt8SLWbnpFlOKi6xBsP6P8hMAAP__xS1eIg) | [Unsubscribe](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kLFuwyAQhp_mvMWCg0A8MLSN3KlSl2THcI5RsU0NVuS3r5K6Xf-7--7Tb8cUQ78Z0K-AOASfARHECyCuRVzt5fKxbAe8fR7ej1e8PYb4BohlS_S_uUNqGm2Ij1SfK28kWt67igxXjRKaa8WrwVilpOu9pI4YI-kaq0mfTk51DH3DfBUMMhScMYGIKFmtmRB944VjR8m74wkkez6q-4WoDGH6osXbELfazWMVzVBKyk-xFrCdfVdPq4u05t8rN4-A7a4M2Oa1y24JqYR5yoDtOu1JRyDaZyPi_M1TUffIq8X4dA8xhqw0SHb7Q_4EAAD__683ZYo)

Friend, I need your immediate attention. **I was just ATTACKED and BOOED by RINOs** _****_**for asking you to weigh in and contribute to this fight** _**.**_ I will NOT be lectured by Republicans who grovel and bend knee for the lobbyists and special interests who have hollowed out this town and borrowed against the future of our future generations. These lobbyists and special interests own our leadership and HATE that I fund my political operation by asking Patriotic Americans for $10, $20, and $30 at a time. **We’re finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and** [**I’m asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8js1OwzAQhJ_GuTVydvPTHnIAqnJC4tJeI9deOxZxHK2dovD0qBXlOt9o5lNhmbzdetG9CoDRmyQABL4IgDXjRZ3PH7ztwH3u3psLuDuENwGQt4X-m38jJQXlp3vaHQvT16Aqqwvqq_bQYld1bVWMvaYr2r1t5KHBtkJUddMSWNS2JmuMKXwPErCSEgEAall2EtEeDGrZ1NW12YtaPo5Ky0R59PMXsVF-2kodQzH1Y85LeoidBJycovxjI-s4O6aUSqbbrdTxiQYT5yGGgXhIt11wA6fhKSDwtOYwZOIg8GizAQEtk16Z_ewEHjOvVHBvlm8_TT61naile7jpGH4DAAD__2x7a8Y)
| [ **DEFEND MATT GAETZ** ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8js1OwzAQhJ_GuTVydvPTHnIAqnJC4tJeI9deOxZxHK2dovD0qBXlOt9o5lNhmbzdetG9CoDRmyQABL4IgDXjRZ3PH7ztwH3u3psLuDuENwGQt4X-m38jJQXlp3vaHQvT16Aqqwvqq_bQYld1bVWMvaYr2r1t5KHBtkJUddMSWNS2JmuMKXwPErCSEgEAall2EtEeDGrZ1NW12YtaPo5Ky0R59PMXsVF-2kodQzH1Y85LeoidBJycovxjI-s4O6aUSqbbrdTxiQYT5yGGgXhIt11wA6fhKSDwtOYwZOIg8GizAQEtk16Z_ewEHjOvVHBvlm8_TT61naile7jpGH4DAAD__2x7a8Y)
---
The Lobbyists and Special Interests want Congress to work just the way it does: _**FOR THEM!**_ I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: _**FOR YOU!**_ I’ve got more enemies than ever, just because I won’t bend the knee. **Stand with me.** **[RUSH an emergency donation. ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8js1OwzAQhJ_GuTVydvPTHnIAqnJC4tJeI9deOxZxHK2dovD0qBXlOt9o5lNhmbzdetG9CoDRmyQABL4IgDXjRZ3PH7ztwH3u3psLuDuENwGQt4X-m38jJQXlp3vaHQvT16Aqqwvqq_bQYld1bVWMvaYr2r1t5KHBtkJUddMSWNS2JmuMKXwPErCSEgEAall2EtEeDGrZ1NW12YtaPo5Ky0R59PMXsVF-2kodQzH1Y85LeoidBJycovxjI-s4O6aUSqbbrdTxiQYT5yGGgXhIt11wA6fhKSDwtOYwZOIg8GizAQEtk16Z_ewEHjOvVHBvlm8_TT61naile7jpGH4DAAD__2x7a8Y)** Thanks for standing strong, Matt Gaetz

subject: They cannot be trusted.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless than acknowledge the truth we present.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=33920348d3e3480e9c293715eff71bcd&_t=pSc3nlNFq3Rm4DLJg5WI7yiRjfiMKFSVD4pW2cLk9S7qfZL66hxVsGXyCak4Z1nkB55bgwb6x2bl_KUgLwHSV_R2dkkVsUzmU6W8Do7ws2Y%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=33920348d3e3480e9c293715eff71bcd&_t=pSc3nlNFq3Rm4DLJg5WI7yiRjfiMKFSVD4pW2cLk9S7qfZL66hxVsGXyCak4Z1nkB55bgwb6x2bl_KUgLwHSV_R2dkkVsUzmU6W8Do7ws2Y%3D)

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=33920348d3e3480e9c293715eff71bcd&_e=h4Sz2kowciGQCG9xL2bzKO0IiGuuhwe77S7EPZm3YUitgS5EmFqcqulvM4YGRaYVOdDPcAC_NdSxFSishzx4E2Bnxo5iQSKdFMhCC36HTcw6udm0M7G39bZyNysAjCp2bLQcKcokGJ570A7rgl-nFWmHBRYKIPUUXdVvCE8n82r1t6qrFQTBRhkla0NoCksc8RBok3duA1uHG77LYv-muCescKxv6wSacY_yMDqkw8MqfbwxTU5mdDVJkEtW9mGH1IDG2RuEQV9s6PiJ7bwYyxBzImLqX6vqVlkWK2XS4QETNAlMAwTzhkRFM5uLdReVWcYK5JyHQ2BznjOrQp9aoPBWhsvxsL0xxlz8oREO6seAo6WlQziER5JCucfXy64q)
Hey Fellow American,

The establishment has long pulled the strings, holding back individuals like us who refuse to conform to their twisted narrative.

They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless, than acknowledge the truth we present.

But together, we can expose their lies and return power to the people where it belongs.

I need your support, and not just in spirit. The establishment has big money and even bigger corporations in their corner. They also have career politicians like Nikki Haley, Mike Pence and Chris Christie in their pockets. Nothing ever really changes. It's the same old politicians who will do anything to make a buck.

I will tell you what no one else on that stage will - **THE ESTABLISHMENT IS LYING TO YOU.**

They cannot be trusted.
The politicians. The media. The corporations. They're all in it together. _**And you're the one who pays.**_

What we have, though, is the strength of conviction and the passion of warriors like you.

Here's where you come in, Fellow American: **[To truly challenge the establishment, we need resources.
