body:
Yesterday afternoon, news broke that John Kelly, Donald Trump's longest-serving Chief of Staff, confirmed some of the worst stories about Trump's disdain for our troops.
#
Derek,
Yesterday afternoon, news broke that John Kelly, Donald Trump's longest-serving Chief of Staff, confirmed some of the worst stories about Trump's disdain for our troops.
On multiple occasions, Trump not only disparaged our fallen troops, but insulted those wounded in battle.
He said he didn't want to go to an American Cemetery in France because "it's filled with losers."
He said the nearly 2,000 Marines who fought and died in Belleau Wood were "suckers."
He didn't want to be seen with service members who had amputated limbs because "it doesn't look good for me."
He wondered while standing in Arlington National Cemetery, "I don't get it. What was in it for them?"
Fallen servicemembers who Traitor Trump feels such disdain for can’t speak for themselves, but their Gold Star families can. It’s our job as the largest organization fighting for Veterans and Military families to amplify the most credible voices to fight back against Trump.
We are going to lead the fight against Trump in 2024, just like we did in 2020. We were one of the largest outside spending organizations of the campaign. And it's because messages like this are decisive. Help us make it happen:

| Peter, wanted to reach out personally to give a sincere thank you for supporting my campaign in the past month.

As North Carolina faced severe attacks on voting rights, reproductive rights, and LGBTQ+ rights, you stepped up. Republicans aren't done pushing their extreme agenda, but our strong network here in North Carolina and beyond reaffirms my belief that we’ve got what it takes to fight back.

But Peter, we need to be much louder to drown out the noise that comes from the Republican party’s hateful rhetoric. Supporting campaigns like mine goes a long way in expressing support and helping us fight back against legislative attacks. We can’t afford to quiet down.

As we enter another important quarter for fundraising, **I hope you’ll continue supporting my campaign. Defeating extreme Republican policies will take a concerted effort from all of us, but I know it’s within reach.**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Sharing my thoughts with you after two days in court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
It’s sad to see what’s happened to the city I grew up in...| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=02f052ab66a1439ab3a9ee5f87f2560e&_e=TnnAgupDu5SAgSYgfccNoGiZ3Sb2lKIQzOVj_OwJxeTpj36eazw-XNYYq5mXHnHsjvPi_A2M1ObSMKhAFDg8yMSJdCb7lZCt9u0xXH2C4Nmn7Xx5y1-nPcY7Lub2qi9MD8Z5p8EuBs5sVP3t3lPi87E40P_fvl3i9rsP0cyVOFMjSwCGh5nkaAzkn9xlmQEe_iTmSqKzrK5qm4bvXLiLK1kOhnwhYWmFxTNqI6yS25gEYCCLoJ-G6JGJhO9QOl4E_TRJQUPhlMWd9m7RsVpGYwSV4hGrhWF0h-4MUTJt0f7-Lvir9FeL1_mrpVH6OOEP0moaBslQZ8PtX55NHTTjjhM9aPlyxKHhkjpn5llkM0wB06_hORG_JBqEFxdaX3yoZWSsjWQwtgVqHj6GkQiuwblfojNM9JvsVVHq0QBSiwcTb-6oSFX9I2PjOotb8n0IAVdJHbDqEPCB4Z7FfAH08tEBnCI8mKwknFKhkCsFpJUbFphErYeNDClLl-n1Pl4q)
---
| | Patriot,

---
I just finished the second day of my sham trial in New York.
---
For the past two days, I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I built a tremendous organization in, the city I loved – and I listened to the Democrats fervently try to destroy everything my family and I have built.
---
The Left wants to take down “Trump Tower” – a world-famous New York landmark, they want to dissolve the Trump Organization, and their ultimate goal is to financially ruin me _and_ my family.
---
It was also here in New York that I was wrongfully arrested by a Soros-backed District Attorney earlier this year. It was the first time I was ever arrested in my entire life.
---
**Think about it – I went my entire life without ever being arrested, and then all of the sudden, I ran for president and I got arrested**** _4 times in 1 year_****– despite committing no crime at all.**

---
But the truth is: this is not the same city I knew and loved. Frankly, this is not even the same _country_ we once knew.
---
Radical Left thugs have let crime, vandalism, filth, left-wing extremism, and illegal immigration pollute what was once the greatest city in the world.
---
And that’s what they want to do to all of America.
---
Patriot, I’m not running for President for myself. I’m running because I truly believe our country is dying. When I go back to a place like New York and see what’s happened, my resolve grows even stronger to save America.
---
2024 is our final chance to fix the greatest country in history – and I have absolute faith that with your support, we can turn it around, and turn it around FAST!
---
After writing a note on the utter destruction of our country, I have to say that if you are doing poorly right now, please don’t even think about donating. I simply wanted to share my thoughts with my top supporters like you at the conclusion of my second day on trial.
---

clean_body: It’s sad to see what’s happened to the city I grew up in...| | | | | Patriot, I just finished the second day of my sham trial in New York. For the past two days, I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I built a tremendous organization in, the city I loved – and I listened to the Democrats fervently try to destroy everything my family and I have built. The Left wants to take down “Trump Tower” – a world-famous New York landmark, they want to dissolve the Trump Organization, and their ultimate goal is to financially ruin me and my family. It was also here in New York that I was wrongfully arrested by a Soros-backed District Attorney earlier this year. It was the first time I was ever arrested in my entire life. Think about it – I went my entire life without ever being arrested, and then all of the sudden, I ran for president and I got arrested 4 times in 1 year– despite committing no crime at all. But the truth is: this is not the same city I knew and loved. Frankly, this is not even the same country we once knew. Radical Left thugs have let crime, vandalism, filth, left-wing extremism, and illegal immigration pollute what was once the greatest city in the world. And that’s what they want to do to all of America. Patriot, I’m not running for President for myself. I’m running because I truly believe our country is dying. When I go back to a place like New York and see what’s happened, my resolve grows even stronger to save America. 2024 is our final chance to fix the greatest country in history – and I have absolute faith that with your support, we can turn it around, and turn it around FAST! After writing a note on the utter destruction of our country, I have to say that if you are doing poorly right now, please don’t even think about donating. I simply wanted to share my thoughts with my top supporters like you at the conclusion of my second day on trial. | | Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Trump | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Tina Smith
subject: Union strong 💪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team, organized labor is having a moment. Across the country, we’re seeing workers and organized labor mobilize and join in solidarity to strike for better wages, benefits, and working conditions. From the UAW autoworkers to SAG-AFTRA actors and entertainment professionals, these strikes are making headlines and demonstrating to mega-corporations everywhere that workers will not stand for lower wages and unfair working conditions. President Joe Biden joined the autoworkers on strike in Michigan last week — the first time a sitting President has ever done so. I’m proud to support a President who is unabashedly pro-union; it’s what workers deserve. These workers are fighting for better conditions, and I will continue to do everything in my power to support this movement. From supporting the _PRO Act_ in the Senate to calling on company leaders to level the playing field for their employees, I’m keeping up the fight to support our workers. Here’s a great reminder for us all: When workers join together, they are often better able to secure livable wages, a safe work environment, and quality benefits for families. In solidarity, Tina P.S. Because of your ongoing support, we smashed our fundraising goals for the last quarter. With your help, our grassroots team is in a great position to turn out Democrats in Minnesota and across the country next year. Thank you! | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70905895/430644098/1669815119?refcode=AU_TSM_CL_GEN_NOA_AC30_20231003_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDYwNTQ1My0zZTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_SPMOZu_hizSnNKRBNi_sTqTMiStJr8ENI2RcqE7nc=)

**Wow.**

Thanks to the continuous generosity of grassroots donors like you, we were able to surpass our end-of-quarter fundraising goal and close our Q3 budget gap!

I truly can’t thank you enough. Your support means the world to me.

In a race as competitive and expensive as ours, hitting each and every fundraising goal is instrumental in keeping our campaign on track to defend OR-06 next November.

**So whether you chipped in [$1, $10, or $100](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70906056/430644723/-1808795974?refcode=em_msg_2023.10.03_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzRlMTFlMS0zZTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VRIzLUoKqRTr5CjSaEuev1UeEPhkFIyTnn7tFp8AyA0=), I hope you know that you are directly fueling our fight for a better future. **

Thank you for all you do,

Andrea

name: Impeachment Alert (via Courier Newsroom)
subject: 6 hours, 4 witnesses, 0 evidence
body:
Even House Republicans’ own witnesses see no legitimacy to this illegitimate impeachment inquiry.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1665%2E120351%2EiUSrdR)
Peter,
Ever since the Fox News-driven impeachment inquiry into President Biden got started, Republicans — by their own admission — have presented _**no evidence**_ to support their ludicrous allegations.
Here’s a quick recap of what happened during last Thursday’s hearing:
* Rather than going after the target of this inquiry, Republicans zeroed in on Hunter Biden in a six-hour-long hearing that was allegation-heavy, but light on providing any proof of wrongdoing.
* Despite promising that the House Committee on Oversight and Accountability had “uncovered a mountain of evidence” against Biden, Republicans didn’t provide _any_ of this evidence during the hearing.
* One of the four witnesses called on by Republicans — all of whom did not witness any alleged wrongdoing — even said, “The current record does not establish any crime, let alone an impeachable offense.”

As Republicans continue to push this sham impeachment, at Courier, we’ll remain at the forefront of cutting through the noise and conspiracy theories being pushed by Fox News and the right-wing disinformation machine.**[If you want to help us fight back, can you chip in today to power our honest, impactful journalism?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20231003?refcode=em20231003&amount=5&refcode2=1665_120351_iUSrdR&akid=1665%2E120351%2EiUSrdR)**
While some news outlets appropriately highlighted and emphasized the glaring fact that there’s no evidence to support this inquiry, for the average Fox News viewer, none of this would have been covered.
Instead, the GOP sought refuge in Sean Hannity and Jesse Watters as they attempted to distract their viewers with a text message that was revealed to have been taken out of context to look incriminating. As usual, a simple debunk of the text didn’t stop Fox from pushing this fabricated “evidence” to its viewers.
**The GOP’s endgame is clear to us, Peter.** This impeachment stunt was never about anything else other than to undermine President Biden as the 2024 election approaches and an attempt to sow enough division with outright lies and disinformation campaigns to help Donald Trump get back into the White House.
That makes our job at Courier even more critical. Our network of newsrooms are committed to fighting misinformation in the spaces where it thrives, holding bad actors accountable for their campaigns of deceit, and correcting the record.
**[If you want to help us continue to expose Fox News and the GOP's disinformation crusades, will you pitch in $5 or anything you can today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20231003?refcode=em20231003&amount=5&refcode2=1665_120351_iUSrdR&akid=1665%2E120351%2EiUSrdR)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20231003?refcode=em20231003&amount=5&refcode2=1665_120351_iUSrdR&akid=1665%2E120351%2EiUSrdR)**
Thank you, team!
— Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer--1665&t=2&refcode2=1665_120351_iUSrdR&akid=1665%2E120351%2EiUSrdR)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1665%2E120351%2EiUSrdR)

Courier Newsroom

New York, NY 10032

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The Supreme Court is currently determining whether or not the CFPB is Constitutional. It is.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
My colleagues Sherrod Brown and Raphael Warnock and I put together an explainer video on the case.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=95%2E4032634%2Ez4fEcX)
---
Today the Supreme Court heard arguments in a case to determine whether the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau is constitutional. (Spoiler alert: _It is._) This hearing also falls on a significant anniversary: 15 years ago today was when Congress bailed out the big banks responsible for crashing our economy and throwing millions of Americans out of work. In the aftermath, I fought to hold these big banks accountable and protect consumers from predatory financial institutions, and we created the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. The agency was designed to protect consumers from the tricks and traps of financial institutions and corporations. It eliminates junk fees, cracks down on payday lenders who prey on military families, and watches out for first-time homebuyers scammed by mortgage lenders — just to name a few services. So far, the agency has returned over $17 billion to Americans who have been cheated. So of course financial institutions have an issue with it — and Wall Street banks and payday lenders are hoping the Supreme Court will gut it through this case. [**My colleagues Sherrod Brown and Raphael Warnock and I put together an explainer video on the case. You can watch it here — and please share it to help get the word out about what's going on.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/788?t=8&akid=95%2E4032634%2Ez4fEcX) | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/788?t=9&akid=95%2E4032634%2Ez4fEcX)
---
[**WATCH ON FACEBOOK**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/788?t=10&akid=95%2E4032634%2Ez4fEcX)
---
[**WATCH ON INSTAGRAM**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/792?t=11&akid=95%2E4032634%2Ez4fEcX)
---
[**WATCH ON TWITTER**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/793?t=12&akid=95%2E4032634%2Ez4fEcX)
---
Basically, these special interests that the agency protects consumers from are asking the Supreme Court to invalidate the CFPB’s independent funding structure. That would leave funding up to Congress every year, and at the whim of whoever the heck is going to lead Republicans’ extremist majorities.
If the Supreme Court says that Congress doesn't have the power to set up government agencies and laws without going through appropriations, other programs like Social Security and Medicare — that are funded the same way the CFPB is — could also be at risk. The implications of this case could echo through the lives of every person in the country.
Look, the only option is for the Supreme Court to outright reject this bogus challenge and affirm the constitutionality of the CFPB. And I’m going to keep fighting for this.
Alongside this grassroots team and a terrific array of labor unions, civil rights groups, consumer advocates, and more, I fought tooth and nail to turn the CFPB from an unlikely idea to a concrete, consumer-protecting reality. And I won’t stop fighting to keep it that way.
Stay tuned for more updates.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/777?t=16&akid=95%2E4032634%2Ez4fEcX)
---
| [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=4&akid=95%2E4032634%2Ez4fEcX) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=5&akid=95%2E4032634%2Ez4fEcX) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=6&akid=95%2E4032634%2Ez4fEcX) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=7&akid=95%2E4032634%2Ez4fEcX)

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin."

In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

clean_body: Today, I’m just asking you to please endorse my campaign. | Fellow American, I launched this campaign just a little over 2 months ago and already the race is moving rapidly towards next year’s election. I am thankful that my campaign for Congress has earned the endorsement of elected officials and steadfast conservative leaders, including... A victory in Pennsylvania’s 7th is KEY to holding the House and keeping Republicans in control of Congress. But these endorsements alone will not defeat the Democrat Machine. You have my promise that I will continue to fight for every taxpayer and American in Congress. It will take significant resources to flip this district next year but today, Thank you, Ryan Mackenzie MEET RYAN * When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers. A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching. It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin." In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law. | | Paid for by Mackenzie for Congress

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Montana U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy.

I’m a former Navy SEAL and small business owner, not a politician, and _**I’m learning that in politics, things tend to happen all at once or not at all**_.

Coming off a busy summer, things have quieted down a bit for us here in Montana. I wanted to take a minute to reintroduce myself to you. **[I’m linking a 65-second video to the image below that I’m hoping you’ll watch today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=972fb0778a494e74b4d7365e5434b026&_e=pXueUJ1mJbL3f79EUu3FX_1Hu7FkvEekltFyhvIFiDX22ImOm8nxrdVNlrADrLb7NwNmZsqJqT8WdsY7AL0UQfy1w9ZewX-cvBOv7Tx6BV8bJf8hIGCoj1-8aax5XJUqt5OfRZ2_sP81m0AYsTXeKYMFu8Y7AX4WzpdBcFT0UcuE6htHX3CLfKXZFqWTFL4F41-MObtXTHcIYSEk89P_ibFU1-FazMzRkmV5flGpIKc4DZ-5Ku799ggEkIOqE-Nz1QwKHAwp618tvF26JGwD_9h-r5gjCTh4yzTfM347QbKxZ_vGwn_gCPLHzedEJNpjyQOgfWvMhp53XrZzYUWIRui7nEjwqiuFc7osun-6zhP03BOBpw0R6WTh4I_kHMAss87idWFdj9zZ1_OiAhMjvX6t6uVfpeugUj8565RIn5c%3D)**

clean_body: I’ve been emailing you for two months now, but I realized, you may not really know who I am. So, take a minute, literally, to get to know me a bit better. | | Fellow Conservative, It’s Montana U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. I’m a former Navy SEAL and small business owner, not a politician, and I’m learning that in politics, things tend to happen all at once or not at all. Coming off a busy summer, things have quieted down a bit for us here in Montana. I wanted to take a minute to reintroduce myself to you. If you are wondering who I am, why I’m running for the U.S. Senate, or if investing in me is worth your time, this short bio video should not only provide answers to some lingering questions you may have about me, but you’ll get to hear straight from the source why I think I’m the best candidate to flip this Democrat-held Senate seat, Republican. God Bless, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I'm under attack

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70906830/430647523/1575385346?code=jtk4479-su-nd&refcode=jtk4479-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTU3NTA0NS00MTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cv0gjFWYF4_-vDTdcBATN_Je9a9kITMvTkbq-Pzv3xY=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. clean_body: tough news | | | Friend, this is bad news for Democrats: Donald Trump’s time as president was full of chaos, extremism and lies. He was impeached TWICE. He incited a deadly insurrection. He spread conspiracy theories about the pandemic, the election and more. And now, he's been indicted FOUR times and is facing nearly 100 felony charges. But despite ALL of this, a string of new polls show that the race for president is still neck and neck! This data is shocking. We need to be 100% certain that we know who will vote for Democrats in 2024. That's why we've selected you to be one of just 50 respondents from 43614 in our live poll. Please, will you respond ASAP to confirm that you're still a Democrat? | | DEMOCRATIC VOTER UPDATE Supporter on File: Democratic Party Status:UNCONFIRMED Deadline: 11:59 p.m. Please respond IMMEDIATELY: Are you still a Democrat? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: The work ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
The road ahead won’t be easy, but thanks to this team’s continued support, I know we can win this race, take back the House, and restore the leadership we need in Congress next year. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70906939/430647976/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzdiNjhmOC00MTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mr6E3eTQKYkbmYMGPKPUhclc_QiG1hihmECoECbwCUM=&emci=19623799-2062-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=637b68f8-4162-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

On Saturday, we faced our third FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of this election cycle. **Thanks to the incredible support of this grassroots team, I'm incredibly proud to announce that we not only reached our FEC end-of-quarter goal, we surpassed it!**

But over the past week, we also saw how much work we have ahead of us. While we narrowly avoided a government shutdown, House Republicans have shown they’re willing to put our country on the brink of a reckless shutdown for the sake of political theater.

We also saw how, after kowtowing to the most extreme elements of his own party, Speaker McCarthy ultimately caved at the last possible second and depended on Democrats to keep the government open.

And afterwards, Speaker McCarthy had the audacity to claim full credit – and blame House Democrats for the near-shutdown! Let’s be clear: Democrats united to protect the American people from an unnecessary and economically devastating shutdown – which 91 Republicans voted _for._

And the chaos only continues. Matt Gaetz and his Freedom Caucus cronies introduced a motion to vacate – grinding House business to a halt yet again and leaving the House without a Speaker.

**The chaos and dysfunction will not stop as long as the Republicans have the majority – we _must_ flip the House next November.**

The road ahead won’t be easy, but thanks to this team’s continued support, I know we can win this race, take back the House, and restore the leadership we need in Congress next year.

Thank you once again,

Kim
**Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: McCarthy has broken his commitments time and again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Republicans are in ruin.
#
Peter — the GOP is in disarray, and we’re not voting to save them from themselves.
Nobody in Congress — or in our country — trusts Kevin McCarthy, _and why should we?_**He has broken his commitments time and again.**
As Speaker, he went back on his promise to President Biden and nearly caused a disastrous government shutdown. He tried to distract from Republicans’ ruin by opening a baseless impeachment inquiry against President Biden. And he’s continued to support January 6 insurrectionists who attacked our democracy.
**Republicans are in ruin.** They have given us all reason after reason to let them deal with their own problems. They are wallowing in their own pigsty of incompetence.
Instead of their caucus of chaos, we choose to lead with determination and care for our communities, constituents, and for our country.
**[If you’re ready to start building the democracy we deserve, chip in $3 today to power our fight.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46082?refcode=em20231003-2998&t=1&akid=2998%2E420207%2EpCXGD9)**
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46082?refcode=em20231003-2998&t=20&akid=2998%2E420207%2EpCXGD9)**
Together,
Pramila Jaypal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231003-2998-footer&t=21&refcode2=2998_420207_pCXGD9&akid=2998%2E420207%2EpCXGD9)**

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr. Alert
subject: “Make no mistake”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Team, Republicans just never give up on their efforts to undermine our democracy.
|
---

Team, Republicans just _never_ give up on their efforts to undermine our democracy.

→ In **Wisconsin** , the GOP legislature is threatening to impeach a duly-elected state supreme court justice in an effort to protect their gerrymandered majority.

→ In **Alabama** , Republican lawmakers openly defied the Supreme Court by refusing to enact a congressional map that doesn’t discriminate against Black voters.

→ In **North Carolina** , conservative lawmakers are scrambling to push through new voting restrictions and a new gerrymandered map ahead of the 2024 election.

**In response to the challenges we’re facing, Attorney General Eric Holder had this to say:** | **“Make no mistake – the forces of gerrymandering and political manipulation are persistent, but so are we.”

_Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr._**
---
_He’s right!_

Last year, our grassroots fight for fair maps helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” Now, we have an important choice to make.
(1) If we **keep fighting** their efforts to gerrymander, we can help secure an _even fairer_ map ahead of a highly consequential election.

(2) But if we **grow complacent** and let the GOP get away with re-securing gerrymandered maps, they unfairly secure a House majority before a single ballot is even cast in 2024 by manipulating districts in their favor.
[**_What we do over the next few months will help shape the landscape in 2024, team. Can we count on your donation today to help the NDRC fight for fairness across the country?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70907075/430648435/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231002_FR_10C_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwYTRiYmE5LTQyNjItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ScNOw2AxqKm80fmxcAJhzv_bOFllP5NTYptdKX62VjM=)

clean_body: Team, Republicans just never give up on their efforts to undermine our democracy. | Team, Republicans just never give up on their efforts to undermine our democracy. → In Wisconsin , the GOP legislature is threatening to impeach a duly-elected state supreme court justice in an effort to protect their gerrymandered majority. → In Alabama , Republican lawmakers openly defied the Supreme Court by refusing to enact a congressional map that doesn’t discriminate against Black voters. → In North Carolina , conservative lawmakers are scrambling to push through new voting restrictions and a new gerrymandered map ahead of the 2024 election. In response to the challenges we’re facing, Attorney General Eric Holder had this to say: | “Make no mistake – the forces of gerrymandering and political manipulation are persistent, but so are we.” Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr. He’s right! Last year, our grassroots fight for fair maps helped secure what the New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” Now, we have an important choice to make. (1) If we keep fighting their efforts to gerrymander, we can help secure an even fairer map ahead of a highly consequential election. (2) But if we grow complacent and let the GOP get away with re-securing gerrymandered maps, they unfairly secure a House majority before a single ballot is even cast in 2024 by manipulating districts in their favor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. name: Dan Kildee
subject: A critical moment for our nation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DAN KILDEE
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70907217/430648809/972226503?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTAzZjIzMy00NDYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tJ-r6Jedm0bI74n2yFlDCbXuO73xD0ZYuKxdZqSV9oM=) Hey there, it’s been a few busy days in Washington, but I wanted to reach out with an update. Before the weekend, we were a little short of our critical end-of-quarter fundraising benchmarks. But with just a few hours to spare, we reached our goal. _**To everyone who chipped in to get us there: thank you.**_ Here’s why that’s such a big deal: if we want to flip the House next year, this is a seat we _absolutely_ have to win. So when we hit our critical fundraising goals, it shows the national GOP that this campaign is well-prepared for 2024, and is ready to take on whatever attacks they throw at us. **This weekend, we also averted a government shutdown.** Earlier this year, Republicans and Democrats negotiated a budget. But Speaker McCarthy walked away from this bipartisan deal and brought us to the brink of another government shutdown. On Saturday, it was House Democrats, working with only a minority of House Republicans, who voted to keep the government open. This short-term budget bill gives us more time to enact a longer, bipartisan budget and stopped deep cuts proposed by the most extreme Republican voices like Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene in Congress. I first ran for Congress to put the politics aside and just get things done for mid-Michigan. Today, that goal hasn’t changed one bit. I’m grateful for your support throughout this campaign. Together, I know we can win this race, help Democrats take back the House, and continue bringing results to hard-working Michiganders. – Dan | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70907218/430648810/757665689?refcode=email_100323_Thank-you&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTAzZjIzMy00NDYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tJ-r6Jedm0bI74n2yFlDCbXuO73xD0ZYuKxdZqSV9oM=)

**TO:** Rep. Jamie Raskin
**FROM:** A grateful Democrat
**SUBJECT:** Thank You!

Rep. Raskin,

**I couldn’t be more thrilled to have your voice in the House at this critical time in our history.**

Time and time again, you’ve stood up to Donald Trump and his MAGA minions, even if it meant facing brutal attacks from the GOP!

_Now, in the face of those same MAGA Republicans trying to shut down the government and impeach President Biden, you did what was right — and we can’t thank you enough._

[From preventing MAGA Republicans’ attempts to ruin our country to protecting President Biden, we couldn’t ask for a better hero in the House. subject: Nancy Mace just threw the House into chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael B
body:
Instead of tackling our existing crises, Nancy Mace is creating new ones.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70907634/430650158/-1369586090?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.10.03_B1_RapidResponse_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzkwNDQ4OGYtNDc2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9Galq2l5ChnUn_xy0bhIeTzyt_oSAi_Is8g6krUzb6I=&emci=a377f90c-4062-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=7904488f-4762-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=14781535) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70907635/430650159/-1846418929?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.10.03_B1_RapidResponse_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzkwNDQ4OGYtNDc2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9Galq2l5ChnUn_xy0bhIeTzyt_oSAi_Is8g6krUzb6I=) Peter – Nancy Mace just joined forces with Matt Gaetz and his crew.
